This is a [Next.js](https://nextjs.org) project bootstrapped with [`create-next-app`](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/tree/canary/packages/create-next-app).

## Getting Started

First, run the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
# or
yarn dev
# or
pnpm dev
# or
bun dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.

You can start editing the page by modifying `app/page.js`. The page auto-updates as you edit the file.

This project uses [`next/font`](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/optimizing/fonts) to automatically optimize and load [Geist](https://vercel.com/font), a new font family for Vercel.

## Learn More

To learn more about Next.js, take a look at the following resources:

- [Next.js Documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs) - learn about Next.js features and API.
- [Learn Next.js](https://nextjs.org/learn) - an interactive Next.js tutorial.

You can check out [the Next.js GitHub repository](https://github.com/vercel/next.js) - your feedback and contributions are welcome!

## Deploy on Vercel

The easiest way to deploy your Next.js app is to use the [Vercel Platform](https://vercel.com/new?utm_medium=default-template&filter=next.js&utm_source=create-next-app&utm_campaign=create-next-app-readme) from the creators of Next.js.

Check out our [Next.js deployment documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/deploying) for more details.

    const products = [
    {
      id: 1,
      name: 'Cooking-range',
      slug: 'cooking-range',
      image: "/Cooking Range.jpeg",
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial gas and electric cooking ranges designed for professional kitchens, built with premium stainless steel and engineered for durability, hygiene, and efficiency.',
      longDescription: `A Cooking Range is the central component of any commercial kitchen — the engine that drives your culinary operations. Whether you run a high-volume hotel kitchen, a bustling cloud kitchen, or a compact restaurant setup, you need a cooking solution that combines speed, control, durability, and hygiene.

At SAG Engineering Products, we manufacture a wide range of commercial-grade gas and electric cooking ranges, built from high-quality stainless steel and engineered to deliver consistent performance in the toughest kitchen environments.

With over 15 years of manufacturing experience and deep product knowledge, our team ensures each cooking range meets the operational demands of Indian and international kitchens alike.

### Types of Cooking Ranges We Offer
- **Single Burner Range**: Ideal for tight spaces or small-volume kitchens.
- **Two Burner Range**: Perfect for restaurants, catering setups, and cloud kitchens.
- **Three & Four Burner Ranges**: Designed for high-volume cooking environments.
- **Bulk Cooking Range**: High-capacity gas ranges for industrial kitchens.
- **Chinese Cooking Range**: Specially built for wok cooking and oriental cuisines.
- **Stock Pot Range**: Built for heavy utensils for broths, soups, and gravies.

Each model can be customized based on fuel type (LPG/PNG/electric), dimensions, number of burners, and layout preferences.

### Buyer Expectations We Fulfill
- **Material Quality & Build**: SS 304/316 construction, heavy-duty burners, ISI-marked safety parts.
- **Performance & Heat Output**: High-efficiency burners, BTU capacity options, pilot burners, sturdy supports.
- **Design & Ergonomics**: Standard working heights, smooth corners, spill trays, splashguards.
- **Customization Options**: Size, burner layout, mounting, shelves, wheels.
- **Hygiene & Maintenance**: Food-grade surfaces, removable trays, rustproof finish.
- **Safety Assurance**: Heat-insulated knobs, flame failure protection, gas leak testing.

### Applications & Industries
Hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, catering, hospitals, schools, canteens, corporate kitchens, and more.

### Free Kitchen Design Support
Equipment planning, gas piping integration, cooking station layout, and custom manufacturing.

### After-Sales Support
Warranty, installation guidance, spare parts, and servicing.

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise
✔ Customized Cooking Ranges
✔ High-Grade SS Construction
✔ Cost-Effective
✔ Fast Delivery & Export Packaging
✔ Trusted Nationwide`,

    {
      id: 2,
      name: 'Electric Hot Plate with Oven',
      slug: "electric-hot-plate-with-oven",
      image: '/Elec. Hot Plate with Oven.jpg',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Dual-function electric cooking solution combining a flat hot plate and built-in oven — engineered for professional kitchens seeking space efficiency, safety, and precision control.',
      longDescription: `Elevate your commercial kitchen with the Electric Hot Plate with Oven from SAG Engineering Products — a powerful, dual-function appliance engineered for performance, convenience, and space optimization.

Perfect for professional kitchens where gas isn’t an option or where electric cooking is preferred for safety and control, this unit combines a flat electric hot plate for surface cooking with a built-in electric oven for baking, roasting, and reheating.

Built entirely in food-grade stainless steel, and powered by advanced heating technology, this equipment is ideal for hotels, restaurants, cafés, cloud kitchens, and institutional kitchens looking for reliable, energy-efficient, and multipurpose cooking solutions.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **2-in-1 Functionality**: Smooth flat hot plate for boiling, sautéing, frying, or simmering. Oven chamber with temperature control for baking, roasting, and warming.
- **Heavy-Duty Construction**: SS 304 body, heat-insulated handles, reinforced legs, adjustable bullet feet.
- **Precision Electric Heating**: Cast iron heating plates, independent controls, thermostatic oven regulation.
- **User-Friendly Operation**: Ergonomic control knobs, power/heating indicators, removable trays.
- **Energy Efficient & Safe**: Reduced consumption, safety thermostat, auto shut-off.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Hot Plate Type**: Solid Cast Iron, Flat Top
- **Number of Hot Plates**: 1, 2, or 4 (as per model)
- **Oven Type**: Electric convection or static heating
- **Power Supply**: 220V/415V AC, Single or Three Phase
- **Temperature Range (Oven)**: 50°C to 300°C
- **Control Type**: Manual thermostatic with safety cutoff
- **Mounting Type**: Floor standing / table-mounted
- **Finish**: Matt or mirror finish SS
- **Optional Accessories**: GN trays, wire racks, baking sheets

### Applications & Use Cases
Cloud kitchens, cafés, bakeries, restaurants, hotels, buffets, corporate kitchens, offshore/marine galleys.

### Customization Options
Custom sizes, multi-plate configurations, digital thermostats, add-on cabinets/warming drawers, custom oven capacity.

**Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Dual-purpose, space-saving design
✔ Food-grade construction for hygiene and durability
✔ Precision temperature control and fast heat-up
✔ Silent, smokeless, flame-free operation
✔ 15+ years of manufacturing excellence
✔ PAN India support & global export standards

### After-Sales Support
Warranty, installation guidance, spare parts, responsive maintenance.

### Packaging & Delivery
Export-grade packaging, timely dispatch, nationwide & global delivery.`,

    {
      id: 3,
      name: 'Griddle Plate',
      slug: "griddle-plate",
      image: '/Griddle Plate.webp',
      shortDescription: 'Precision electric griddle for uniform heating, quick turnaround, and easy cleaning — perfect for high-volume commercial kitchens without open flames or gas lines.',
      longDescription: `Bring speed, uniformity, and versatility to your commercial kitchen with the Electric Griddle Plate from SAG Engineering Products — a must-have solution for high-volume cooking that demands even heating, quick turnaround, and easy cleaning.

Built to withstand demanding foodservice operations, this griddle is ideal for preparing a variety of foods including parathas, burgers, pancakes, eggs, kebabs, sandwiches, and more.

Whether you're running a quick service restaurant (QSR), hotel, cloud kitchen, or catering operation, our electric griddle ensures efficient flat-top cooking without the hassle of open flames or gas supply lines.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Uniform Heating with Precision Control**: High-efficiency embedded electric heating elements ensure consistent temperature across the plate with thermostatic control.
- **Heavy-Duty Flat Top Plate**: Polished MS or optional SS 304 plate, 10–16 mm thickness, excellent heat retention, smooth non-stick-like performance.
- **Stainless Steel Body Construction**: SS 304 housing, corrosion-resistant, fully welded, smooth corners, easy to clean.
- **Energy Efficient & Eco-Friendly**: Electric-only operation, reduced heat loss, no need for gas piping or ventilation hoods in many setups.
- **Safe & User-Friendly**: Ergonomic controls, power/heat indicator lights, non-slip feet or adjustable SS legs, optional grease trap.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Cooking Surface**: Polished MS / Optional SS Plate
- **Plate Thickness**: 10–16 mm
- **Surface Size Options**: 24", 36", 48" or custom
- **Heating Type**: Embedded electric elements
- **Temperature Range**: 50°C to 300°C
- **Control Type**: Thermostat with safety cutoff
- **Power Supply**: 230V / 415V AC – Single or Three Phase
- **Grease Trap**: Yes – Removable tray
- **Mounting**: Table-top / Floor-mounted / With cabinet stand
- **Finish**: Matt finish, fully welded

### Applications & Use Cases
QSRs, burger joints, cafés, bakeries, hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, catering, corporate canteens, snack counters, and marine galleys.

### Customization Options
Custom griddle sizes, MS/SS surface material, multi-zone temperature control, splash guards, cabinet bases, shelves, drawers, wheels for mobility.

**Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Over 15 Years of Manufacturing Experience  
✔ Designed for Heavy-Duty Commercial Use  
✔ Compact & Efficient for Space Optimization  
✔ Gas-Free, Flame-Free, Eco-Friendly  
✔ Reliable After-Sales Support & Spare Parts  
✔ Export-Ready Fabrication Standards

### After-Sales Service & Support
Warranty on heating components, installation guidance, nationwide spares & service, long-term parts availability.

### Packaging & Delivery
Safe, sturdy packaging, bulk order support, PAN India and export-ready delivery.`,

    {
      id: 4,
      name: 'Commercial Hot Plate',
      slug: "commercial-hot-plate",
      image: '/Commercial Hot Plate.jpg',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Compact, sturdy, and versatile hot plate for boiling, simmering, sautéing, and warming — available in electric and gas variants for professional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Simple. Sturdy. Reliable. Built for Consistent Cooking.

The Commercial Hot Plate by SAG Engineering Products is an essential appliance in every professional kitchen, offering a powerful and compact solution for boiling, simmering, sautéing, and warming food. Designed for versatility and durability, our hot plates are ideal for operations where full-size ranges aren’t feasible — such as snack counters, food courts, cafés, and compact kitchens.

Manufactured using high-grade stainless steel, and available in both electric and gas options, our hot plates are engineered to deliver consistent heat, user safety, and low maintenance, even under continuous use.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Compact Yet Powerful**: Ideal for small-to-mid volume cooking with quick heat-up and responsive controls.
- **High-Quality Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel body, polished MS/cast iron plate (electric), or brass/cast iron burner (gas).
- **Energy Options**: Electric (1.5–3.5 kW) with flat heating element/coil or gas-fired with manual flame control.
- **Ergonomic & Safe**: Heat-resistant knobs, spill tray, optional splash guards, and indicator lights (electric models).
- **Easy Maintenance**: Flat design, removable drip trays, easy burner/coil access, minimal moving parts.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Plate Type (Electric)**: Polished MS or Cast Iron
- **Plate Type (Gas)**: Heavy-duty burner with pan support
- **Heating Source**: Electric element (1.5–3.5 kW) or LPG/PNG
- **Power Supply (Electric)**: 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase
- **Control**: Thermostat with safety cut-off (electric) / Manual flame regulator (gas)
- **Size Options**: 12”, 18”, 24” or custom
- **Mounting**: Tabletop / Floor-stand
- **Optional Features**: Splash guards, indicator lights (electric), pilot burner (gas)

### Applications
Snack counters, tea shops, commercial canteens, mess kitchens, food trucks, kiosks, hotels, catering units, bakeries, cafés, cloud kitchens, and compact food setups.

### Customization Options
- Plate thickness for different load requirements
- Size adjustments for counters/trolleys
- Single or double plate configurations
- Built-in storage rack or open stand
- GN pan compatibility
- Integration into custom cooking islands or combo units

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Commercial Hot Plate?**
✔ Food-grade stainless steel  
✔ Gas & electric variants  
✔ Compact footprint  
✔ Custom-built options  
✔ Low maintenance & long service life  
✔ Made in India with export-ready quality  
✔ 15+ years of expertise

### After-Sales Support
Warranty, installation assistance, spare parts availability, PAN India delivery, export packaging, and responsive maintenance support.

### Packaging & Delivery
Export-standard safe packaging with foam or wooden crate options for fragile shipments. Bulk order and institutional supply available.`,

    {
      id: 1,
      name: 'Bulk Fryer',
      slug: "bulk-fryer",
      image: '/Bulk Fryer.webp',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity commercial fryer built for large-scale frying in hotels, catering setups, industrial canteens, and cloud kitchens — available in gas and electric models with precise temperature control.',
      longDescription: `When your food service demands large-scale frying with consistency, speed, and safety, the Bulk Fryer from SAG Engineering Products is your go-to solution. Built to withstand intense, all-day use in high-volume environments, our bulk fryer delivers powerful performance, precise temperature control, and unmatched efficiency — making it ideal for large kitchens in hotels, catering setups, industrial canteens, and more.

Crafted using food-grade stainless steel, our fryer is available in gas and electric models, with custom capacity options to suit your specific production requirements. Whether you’re frying samosas, cutlets, pakoras, snacks, or frozen foods, our fryer ensures uniform results with reduced oil consumption and safe operation.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High Volume Output**: Continuous frying of large batches — perfect for events, bulk orders, and central kitchens. Capacities from 20L to 100+L with uniform oil temperature.
- **Durable, Food-Grade Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel (SS 316 optional), reinforced frame, hygienic oil tank design.
- **Gas & Electric Options**: Gas model with heavy-duty cast iron burners; electric model with immersion heaters and thermostat control.
- **Precision Temperature Control**: 130°C–200°C thermostatic range, manual or digital options.
- **Operator Safety & Convenience**: Insulated handles, heat-resistant knobs, optional oil indicators, pilot flame (gas), removable baskets, and draining system.

### Technical Specifications
- **Material**: SS 304 / SS 316 Construction
- **Capacity**: 20L, 40L, 60L, 80L, 100L & Custom
- **Fuel Type**: LPG / PNG / Electric
- **Burners / Heaters**: Cast Iron Burner / SS Electric Heaters
- **Control Type**: Manual / Thermostat / Digital Panel (Optional)
- **Temperature Range**: 130°C – 200°C
- **Mounting**: Floor Mounted (Stand or Cabinet Type)
- **Drainage System**: Manual Ball Valve / Auto Drain (Optional)
- **Accessories**: SS Frying Baskets, Oil Drain Tray, Cover Lid
- **Power Supply (Electric)**: 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase

### Applications
- Hotels & Banquet Kitchens
- Catering Units & Outdoor Cooking Stations
- Industrial Canteens & Mess Halls
- Cloud Kitchens & Central Production Facilities
- Food Processing Units
- Railways, Defense, Institutions

### Perfect For
Samosas, spring rolls, cutlets, pakoras, bhajiyas, vadas, french fries, nuggets, onion rings, pooris, snacks, and chips.

### Customization Options
- Custom oil tank dimensions (rectangular/circular)
- Multiple basket compartments
- Integrated oil filtration or recycling
- Flame failure device, pilot ignition, digital touchscreen
- Splash guard and chimney provision

**Why SAG Engineering’s Bulk Fryer?**
✔ 15+ Years of Industry Experience  
✔ Built for Round-the-Clock Operation  
✔ Fuel-Efficient Heating  
✔ Easy to Clean, Drain & Maintain  
✔ Uniform Output for Large Batches  
✔ Safe, Compact & Durable  
✔ PAN India & Export Delivery  
✔ Trusted by Hotels, Caterers & Institutions

### After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance
- 1-year warranty on heating elements & burners
- Spare parts availability
- Lifetime technical consultation

### Packaging & Delivery
Heavy-duty packaging with cushioning, knockdown or assembled formats, PAN India delivery, and export-ready packaging for Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.
`,

    {
      id: 6,
      name: 'Chapati Plate and Puffer',
      slug: "chapati-plate-and-puffer",
      image: '/Chapati Plate & Puffer.webp',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance chapati-making equipment with separate roasting and puffing zones, built for speed, consistency, and hygiene in high-demand kitchens.',
      longDescription: `When your kitchen serves hundreds — or thousands — of rotis or chapatis daily, you need equipment that ensures speed, consistency, and hygiene. The Chapati Plate with Puffer by SAG Engineering Products is specially designed to meet the high-volume needs of restaurants, caterers, industrial canteens, hostels, and cloud kitchens.

Made from high-quality stainless steel and engineered with precision, this dual-function equipment features a flat griddle plate for roasting and a puffer section for perfect ballooning — allowing fast preparation of soft, evenly-cooked chapatis with authentic taste and texture.

### Key Features
- **2-in-1 Cooking Surface**: Flat plate (Tava Zone) for roasting and Puffer Zone for final puffing.
- **Heavy-Duty Plate**: Polished MS or optional SS, 10–16 mm thick for uniform heating.
- **Stainless Steel Body**: SS 304 structure for hygiene, durability, and easy maintenance.
- **Energy-Efficient Heating**: Available in LPG, PNG, or Electric variants with high-efficiency burners or heaters.
- **Safety & Convenience**: Heat-insulated knobs, grease collection tray, and optional splashguards.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Top Plate**: MS or SS, 10–16 mm thick
- **Heating Source**: Gas (LPG/PNG) or Electric
- **Burners/Heaters**: ISI Marked (Gas) / Tubular Heating Elements (Electric)
- **Control**: Manual Flame Control / Thermostat (Electric)
- **Plate Size**: 24" x 24", 36" x 24", 48" x 24" or custom
- **Mounting**: Floor-Standing, Optional Undershelf
- **Finish**: Matt or Mirror SS Finish
- **Optional Features**: Splashguards, Under Storage, Pilot Burner, Chimney Port

### Applications
Industrial canteens, hostels, cloud kitchens, QSR chains, restaurants, dhabas, catering units, temples, community kitchens, schools, hospitals, railway kitchens, and army messes.

### Customization Options
- Single or double puffer zones
- Custom height and width
- GN pan-compatible under-storage shelves
- Built-in hood or chimney port
- Gas or electric variants

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise
✔ High Thermal Efficiency
✔ Precision Engineering
✔ Rugged, Low-Maintenance Design
✔ Hygienic SS Body
✔ Export-Grade Quality
✔ PAN India Delivery & Installation Support

### After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on manufacturing defects
- Operation guidance
- Spare parts availability
- Technical support for integration
`,

    {
      id: 7,
      name: 'Chinese Burner',
      slug: "chinese-burner",
      image: '/Chinese Burner.webp',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade high-BTU Chinese Burner designed for authentic wok cooking, high-speed stir-frying, and large-volume Asian cuisine preparation.',
      longDescription: `Crafted to meet the rigorous demands of high-speed stir-frying, deep-frying, and steaming, the Chinese Burner from SAG Engineering Products is a specialized cooking solution for professional kitchens that serve Indo-Chinese and pan-Asian cuisine.

Built for performance, speed, and durability, this unit delivers powerful flame output while ensuring ease of use, energy efficiency, and long-lasting reliability.

Perfect for restaurants, cloud kitchens, hotels, and quick-service establishments, our Chinese Burner is designed with thoughtful features like a water-cooled top, spillage bowl, and sloped front to facilitate fast-paced wok cooking in the most demanding commercial environments.

### Key Features
- **High Flame Output for Wok Cooking**: High BTU heavy-duty burner for intense, concentrated flame.
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body for durability, hygiene, and easy maintenance.
- **Water-Cooled Top**: Prevents discoloration and surface distortion during extended use.
- **Heavy-Duty Pan Support / Wok Ring**: Securely holds round-bottom woks during high-speed tossing.
- **Splash Guard & Spillage Management**: Raised backsplash and optional trays for hygiene.
- **Ergonomic Design**: Sloped front panel, insulated knobs, and anti-skid feet.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Burner Type**: High-BTU Heavy-Duty (Cast Iron / Brass)
- **Burner Control**: Manual with Flame Adjustment
- **No. of Burners**: Single / Double / Triple
- **Cooling Type**: Water-Cooled Top with Drainage
- **Pan Support**: Wok Ring – Cast Iron / SS
- **Worktop Height**: 850–900 mm
- **Optional Features**: Pilot Burner, Splash Guard, Skirting, Under-shelf
- **Mounting**: Floor-Standing with Adjustable Bullet Feet
- **Fuel Type**: LPG / PNG Compatible
- **Finish**: Satin or Mirror SS Finish

### Applications
- Chinese & Pan-Asian Restaurants
- Multi-Cuisine Hotels & Resorts
- Cloud Kitchens & Quick Service Restaurants
- Industrial & Corporate Canteens
- Catering Kitchens & Outdoor Cooking
- Food Courts & Malls

### Customization Options
- Single, Double, or Triple Burner setups
- Optional shelves, racks, or sink compartments
- Size adjustments for any kitchen space
- Integrated side tables or combo counters
- LPG/PNG compatibility
- Fully integrated Chinese Cooking Ranges with exhaust hoods

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise  
✔ High-Output Flame for Authentic Wok Cooking  
✔ Heavy-Duty Commercial Construction  
✔ Custom Fabrication & Modular Designs  
✔ Trusted Nationwide  
✔ PAN India & Export-Ready  

### After-Sales Support

- Installation assistance (on-site or virtual)

- Responsive customer service

    {
      id: 8,
      name: 'Idli And Dhokla Maker',
      slug: "idli-and-dhokla-maker",
      image: '/Idli and Dhokla Maker.webp',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity Idli & Dhokla Maker for bulk production, available in electric or gas models. Ensures consistent, hygienic, and efficient steaming for commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Delivering soft, fluffy idlis and perfectly steamed dhoklas in bulk is a daily demand for many commercial kitchens. With the Idli & Dhokla Maker from SAG Engineering Products, you get a purpose-built, high-capacity steaming solution designed for consistent performance, hygienic cooking, and effortless operation.

Manufactured using food-grade stainless steel and available in electric or gas heating options, our Idli & Dhokla units are a must-have for restaurants, canteens, caterers, cloud kitchens, and food production facilities looking for speed, efficiency, and durability in every batch.

### Key Features
- **High-Volume Production**: Steams up to 60, 90, 120, or more idlis/dhoklas per batch depending on tray configuration. Available in 4, 6, 8, 12, or 16 tray models.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body for hygiene, corrosion resistance, and long life. Fully welded with smooth edges for safety and easy cleaning.
- **Dual Purpose Use**: Works with both idli and dhokla trays (interchangeable) to save space and reduce equipment costs.
- **Efficient Heating System**: Gas-fired with high-efficiency burners or electric with immersion heaters and thermostat control.
- **Steam Insulation & Control**: Insulated body to reduce heat loss, with pressure release valve, drain valve, and water level indicator.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Tray Options**: Idli Trays / Dhokla Trays (Interchangeable)
- **Tray Capacity**: 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, or 16 trays
- **Heating Type**: LPG/PNG (Gas) or Electric Heating Element
- **Power Supply (Electric Model)**: 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase
- **Water Tank Capacity**: 10–20 liters (varies by size)
- **Drain System**: SS Ball Valve at Bottom
- **Mounting Type**: Floor Standing on SS Legs
- **Door Mechanism**: Hinged with Heavy-Duty Handle & Sealing
- **Optional Features**: Timer, Thermostat, Auto Water Refill, Digital Temp Control

### Applications
- South Indian Restaurants & Tiffin Centres
- Gujarati Restaurants & Snack Houses
- Institutional Canteens (Schools, Hostels, Offices)
- Cloud Kitchens & Takeaway Brands
- Event Catering & Bulk Food Preparation
- Industrial Kitchens & Mess Halls

### Customization Options
- Choice of gas or electric models
- Custom tray size, shape, and configuration
- Compact or modular designs
- Integrated trolley or under-shelf
- Special stacking trays and SS steam boxes

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Over 15 Years of Engineering Excellence  
✔ 100% Food-Grade, Hygienic Construction  
✔ Dual Function – Saves Space & Investment  
✔ Heavy-Duty, Long-Lasting Components  
✔ Clean, Uniform Steaming with Energy Savings  
✔ Custom-Built for High-Volume Operations  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Export Ready  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation assistance (on request)
- 1-year warranty on structure and components
- Spare part availability
- Steam management and cleaning guidance

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shockproof packaging with foam and wooden crate
- Fast delivery across India
- Bulk and institutional orders welcome
`,

    {
      id: 9,
      name: 'Idli Steamer',
      slug: "idli-steamer",
      image: '/Idlli Steamer.jpg',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Hygienic, high-capacity commercial idli steamer for consistent, energy-efficient, and hassle-free steaming of idlis, dhoklas, and more.',
      longDescription: `SAG Engineering Products brings you a powerful, durable, and hygienically designed Idli Steamer Maker for commercial kitchens that demand high-volume, uniform, and energy-efficient steaming.

Built from premium SS 304 stainless steel and backed by smart engineering, this appliance ensures consistent results — batch after batch — whether you're operating a restaurant, canteen, hotel, or catering service.

Available in both gas and electric variants, with customizable tray capacities to suit your daily requirements, this steamer is versatile enough for idlis, dhoklas, momos, and other steamed delicacies.

### Key Features
- **High-Capacity Steaming**: Available in 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 72, or 96-idli tray configurations.
- **Gas or Electric Heating Options**: LPG/PNG burners or immersion heaters with thermostat.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel**: SS 304 inside and outside, double-wall insulation.
- **Hygienic & Easy Maintenance**: Removable trays, smooth finish, corrosion-resistant.
- **Fast & Uniform Steaming**: Even steam distribution, condensate trap.
- **Safe Operation**: Pressure release valves, insulated handles, anti-skid legs.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Tray Capacity**: 4 to 24 trays (12–96 idlis per tray)
- **Heating Type**: Gas (LPG/PNG) or Electric
- **Electric Supply**: 230V / 415V AC (electric models)
- **Temperature Control**: Manual thermostat (electric) / Flame control (gas)
- **Insulation**: Glass wool or ceramic fiber
- **Steam Release Valve**: Yes
- **Water Level Indicator**: Yes
- **Drain Valve**: Yes
- **Mounting**: Floor-standing with adjustable legs
- **Optional Features**: Digital controller, sight glass, custom trays

### Applications
- South Indian Restaurants & Udupi Hotels
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Cloud Kitchens & Food Delivery Outlets
- Event Catering & Banquet Kitchens
- Railway & Hospital Kitchens
- Tiffin Services & Mess Kitchens

### Customization Options
- Tray count: 4, 6, 8, 12, or 24 trays
- Tray types: Idli, dhokla, momo, or multi-purpose
- Heating preference: Gas or Electric
- Material options: SS 304 inner + outer OR SS 304 inner + SS 202 outer
- Add-ons: Auto shut-off, timer, digital display, storage cabinet

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Food-safe stainless steel  
✔ Multiple capacities for any business size  
✔ Fast, uniform, energy-efficient steaming  
✔ Built for continuous commercial use  
✔ 15+ years of manufacturing expertise  
✔ Export-grade quality, PAN India delivery  

### After-Sales Support
- Warranty on heating elements and structure
- Spare trays and heating coils available
- Installation guidance and usage instructions
- Responsive service team

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-compliant, damage-proof packaging
- Crated and foam-packed for safety
- Fast nationwide delivery
- Bulk dispatch for caterers & QSRs
`,

    {
      id: 10,
      name: 'Idli Steamer With Boiler',
      slug: "idli-steamer-with-boiler",
      image: '/Idli Steamer with Boiler.png',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity Idli Steamer with integrated boiler, built from food-grade stainless steel for uniform, hygienic, and efficient bulk steaming.',
      longDescription: `When your kitchen demands large-scale idli production with minimal energy consumption, maximum hygiene, and reliable consistency, the Idli Steamer with Boiler from SAG Engineering Products delivers.

Built for commercial kitchens, caterers, industrial canteens, cloud kitchens, and South Indian restaurants, this unit is a complete solution for bulk steaming of idlis with built-in boiler support. It is constructed from food-grade stainless steel, operates on steam cooking technology, and is engineered for uniform cooking, zero contamination, and long service life.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Steam Cooking System with Integrated Boiler**: Powered by a horizontal/vertical steam boiler (built-in or standalone) with continuous steam generation for fast, consistent cooking. Boiler pressure regulated with safety valves, steam traps, and gauges.
- **High Production Capacity**: Available in 60, 120, 240, 480, or more idli capacities per batch. Multiple trays designed for standard-sized idli plates (4, 6, or 8-cavity).
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade, corrosion-resistant, double-jacketed body for insulation and efficiency. Welded, leak-proof steam chamber with gasket-sealed door.
- **Uniform & Hygienic Steaming**: Even steam distribution prevents undercooked or soggy idlis. Enclosed system avoids contamination. Drainage port and condensate trap for dry operation.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Ergonomic handles, latches, and steam vent valves. Easy-pull sliding trays. Optional water level indicators, pressure gauges, and thermometers.
- **Low Maintenance, High Output**: Minimal moving parts, smooth welds, easy cleaning. LPG, PNG, or electric heating available.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 – Food Grade Stainless Steel
- **Plate Type**: Idli plates (4, 6, or 8 cavity – SS)
- **Tray Capacity**: 4 to 20 trays per unit
- **Boiler Type**: Horizontal / Vertical (LPG/PNG/Electric)
- **Steam Pressure**: 5–7 psi (adjustable)
- **Door Type**: Insulated, Gasketed, Hinged
- **Drainage System**: SS drain outlet & trap
- **Mounting**: Floor-standing with leveling legs
- **Power Source**: LPG / PNG / Electric
- **Finish**: 2B Matt finish (polish option available)
- **Optional Accessories**: Water level indicator, safety gauge, chimney outlet, steam vent

### Applications
- South Indian Restaurants & Udupi Kitchens
- Cloud Kitchens & Takeaway Units
- Institutional Canteens (School/College/Corporate)
- Caterers & Event Kitchens
- Industrial Kitchens & Mass Cooking Centers
- Temple Kitchens & Community Meals (Langar)

### Customization Options
- Tray numbers & cavity sizes
- Manual or automatic boiler feed
- Multi-product steaming (dhokla, modak, momos)
- Vertical or horizontal chamber
- Integrated control panels with digital displays

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Idli Steamer with Boiler?**

      id: 11,
      name: 'Deep Fryer',
      slug: "deep-fat-fryer",
      image: '/Deep Fat Fryer.jpg',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Fast, efficient, and consistent frying results for commercial kitchens, available in gas and electric models with single or double tanks.',
      longDescription: `The Deep Fat Fryer from SAG Engineering Products is the trusted choice for restaurants, cloud kitchens, cafés, hotels, and catering operations requiring consistent, high-quality fried foods.

Engineered for safety, efficiency, and durability, our fryers are available in both electric and gas models, with single or double tanks to suit your operational volume. Perfect for fries, samosas, chicken wings, jalebis, and more — delivering speed, temperature control, and oil management every time.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Quick Heat-Up & Precise Temperature Control**: High-efficiency heating elements or gas burners with thermostatic control (50°C to 200°C) for consistent frying.
- **Heavy-Duty SS 304 Construction**: Rust-resistant, hygienic, and easy to clean with removable tanks, baskets, and lids.
- **Safety First Design**: Overheat protection (electric), flame failure device (gas), cool-touch handles, and stable anti-slip feet.
- **Oil Management System**: Oil drain valve, mesh filter, crumb tray, and drip-resistant design for longer oil life.
- **Multiple Variants**: Single tank (5L–12L) or double tank (10L–24L), electric or gas, countertop or floor-standing.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Tank Capacity**: 5L, 8L, 10L, 12L, 16L, 24L
- **No. of Tanks**: Single / Double
- **Heating Source**: Electric Element / Gas Burner
- **Temperature Range**: 50°C to 200°C
- **Control Type**: Manual Thermostat (Electric) / Flame Control (Gas)
- **Power (Electric)**: 2 kW to 6 kW (per tank)
- **Gas Type (Optional)**: LPG / PNG
- **Drain Valve**: Yes
- **Oil Filter System**: Optional add-on
- **Mounting**: Countertop / Floor-standing
- **Finish**: Satin / Mirror SS Finish

### Applications
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)
- Catering Services & Cloud Kitchens
- Hotel Banquet Kitchens
- Cafés, Tea Shops & Dessert Counters
- Snack Bars, Food Trucks & Street Food Chains
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Bakery Chains & Sweet Shops

### Customization Options
- Tank capacity adjustment for menu & volume
- Double fryer with individual thermostats
- SS trolleys or under-counter stands
- Oil filtration system for extended shifts
- Optional glass viewing lid or splash guard

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Deep Fat Fryer?**
✔ Precision temperature control = less oil absorption  
✔ Faster cooking, higher throughput  
✔ Easy oil handling & cleaning  
✔ Built for durability & long service life  
✔ Compact, space-saving design  
✔ Gas or electric models available  
✔ Export-ready with PAN India shipping  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of engineering expertise

### After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating elements & components
- Installation assistance & user guide
- Spare parts availability
- On-call maintenance & servicing

    {
      id: 12,
      name: 'Tilting Bratt Pan Electric',
      slug: "tilting-bratt-pan-electric",
      image: '/Tilting Bratt Pan (elec.).jpg',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Electric Tilting Bratt Pan for multi-function commercial cooking — boil, braise, sauté, shallow fry, and stew in one heavy-duty, flame-free unit.',
      longDescription: `The Electric Tilting Bratt Pan from SAG Engineering Products is the ultimate solution for high-volume, versatile cooking in commercial and institutional kitchens. Designed for efficiency, safety, and user comfort, this powerful unit enables chefs to boil, braise, sauté, shallow fry, simmer, and stew — all in one machine.

Ideal for hotels, industrial canteens, central kitchens, and healthcare facilities, our Bratt Pan combines robust stainless steel construction with precision electric heating, offering a safe, flame-free, and energy-efficient alternative to gas models.

### Key Features & Buyer Benefits
- **Multi-Cooking Functionality**: Prepare large batches of curries, gravies, sauces, rice, pasta, lentils, vegetables, meats, and more. Eliminates the need for multiple pans or burners, improving workflow.
- **Electric Heating System**: Embedded electric heating elements for uniform heat. Thermostat-controlled (50°C to 300°C) for precise cooking. No flames, gas, or fumes.
- **Tilting Mechanism for Easy Discharge**: Manual or motorized tilt options. Smooth forward tilt to discharge food into GN pans or containers, reducing spillage and manual effort.
- **Heavy-Duty Construction**: SS 304-grade body and optional SS 316 inner pan. 5–8 mm thick cooking pan withstands high thermal stress. Sturdy frame with adjustable feet.
- **Hygiene & Safety**: Smooth rounded corners, insulated lid handle, optional gas struts, safety thermostat, and IP-rated splash-proof control panel.

### Technical Specifications
- **Construction Material**: SS 304 body, SS 304/316 inner pan
- **Pan Capacity**: 60L, 80L, 100L, 120L, 150L or custom
- **Pan Thickness**: 5 mm – 8 mm
- **Heating Source**: Electric heating elements
- **Temperature Control**: Thermostat (50°C to 300°C)
- **Tilting Mechanism**: Manual Gear / Motorized
- **Power Supply**: 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase
- **Control Panel**: Splash-proof with indicator lights
- **Mounting Type**: Floor-standing with leveling feet
- **Finish**: Matt / Mirror / Brushed
- **Lid Type**: Hinged or counterbalanced (optional)

### Applications & Industries
- Hotels & Resorts
- Central Kitchens & Cloud Kitchens
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Catering Units & Banquet Kitchens
- Hospitals, Schools & Hostels
- Defence & Railway Kitchens
- Food Processing Units

### Customization Options
- Custom pan sizes & capacities
- Manual or automatic tilting
- Optional integrated lid with vents
- Undershelf storage or GN pan holders
- Drain valves for liquid discharge
- Digital temperature display (premium models)
- Island or trolley integration

**Why SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Flame-Free, Safe Electric Cooking  
✔ Multi-Functional Space-Saving Design  
✔ Industrial-Grade SS Construction  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Standard & Custom Configurations Available  
✔ Easy to Use, Easy to Clean  
✔ Export-Ready with PAN India Delivery  

### After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on electrical & structural parts
- Installation assistance & operation training
- Spare parts & servicing kits
- AMC contracts available
`,

    {
      id: 13,
      name: 'Tilting Bratt Pan LPG',
      slug: "tilting-bratt-pan-lpg",
      image: '/Tilting Bratt Pan (LPG).webp',
      category: 'SAG Engineering Products',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty Tilting Bratt Pan (LPG Operated) for bulk cooking, designed for multi-function use in large-scale commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Tilting Bratt Pan (Gas Operated) from SAG Engineering Products is a heavy-duty, multi-functional cooking appliance designed for large-scale commercial kitchens. Engineered for durability, efficiency, and safety, this versatile unit supports a wide range of cooking techniques including sautéing, shallow frying, boiling, braising, simmering, and stewing.

Ideal for hotels, industrial canteens, hospitals, hostels, and food production units, this LPG-powered bratt pan allows for uniform heat distribution, easy operation, and manual or motorized tilting for effortless emptying and cleaning.

If you're looking for a reliable solution for cooking in bulk, the Tilting Bratt Pan is your all-in-one commercial workhorse.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Multi-Function Cooking**: Sauté, boil, fry, grill, stew, or braise – all in one vessel. A perfect replacement for multiple traditional cooking pots and pans.
- **High-Quality Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated with SS 304-grade food-grade stainless steel body and inner pan. Fully welded inner cooking tank with rounded edges ensures hygiene and easy cleaning.
- **Powerful LPG Heating**: Heavy-duty cast iron or brass burners with high flame output for fast heating. Integrated manual gas control valves and safety knobs. Optional flame failure device for added safety on request.
- **Easy Tilting Mechanism**: Available in manual tilting (worm gear mechanism) or motorized tilting models. Balanced and smooth motion, even when pan is fully loaded.
- **Even Heat Distribution**: Thick SS or MS plate bottom ensures uniform heat flow with no hotspots.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 – Food Grade
- **Inner Tank Material**: SS 304 with 3–5 mm thickness
- **Tank Capacity**: 60L / 80L / 100L / 120L / 150L / Custom
- **Tilting System**: Manual Worm Gear / Optional Motorized
- **Heating Type**: LPG / PNG Burner
- **Burner Type**: Cast Iron / Brass Heavy-duty Burner
- **Gas Control**: Manual Valve with Flame Regulator
- **Temperature Control**: Manual (Optional Thermostat Add-on)
- **Mounting**: Floor Standing with Adjustable Bullet Feet
- **Grease Drain Valve**: Yes – SS Ball Valve Outlet
- **Optional Accessories**: Lid, Thermometer, Oil Trap, Water Inlet Valve

### Applications & Industries
- Hotels & Hospitality Chains
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Cloud Kitchens & Catering Units
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities
- School, College, and Hostel Kitchens
- Army Mess, Railways, and Government Canteens
- Food Processing & Batch Cooking Facilities

### Customization Options
- Custom tank sizes based on food quantity and cooking frequency
- Manual or Motorized tilting option
- Burner output customization for faster cooking
- Lid with insulation for slow cooking or stewing
- Castor wheels for mobility (optional)
- Integrated drain valves for efficient liquid discharge

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Tilting Bratt Pan – LPG?**
✔ Food-grade materials & durable fabrication  
✔ Uniform cooking across full volume  
✔ Heavy-duty gas burners with precise flame control  
✔ Efficient tilting mechanism for operator safety  
✔ Built to handle tough, round-the-clock usage  
✔ Trusted by top commercial kitchens across India  
✔ Over 15 years of engineering & manufacturing expertise  
✔ Export-grade finishing with PAN India delivery  

### After-Sales Support
- Warranty on structural and functional components
- Maintenance advice and operational guidance
- Spare parts availability for burners, valves, knobs, and tilting gear
- Responsive service across major Indian cities and export support
`,

      id: 15,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Tilting Boiling Pan Electric',
      slug: "tilting-boiling-pan-electric",
      image: '/Tilting Boiling Pan Electric.jpeg',
      shortDescription: 'Electric Tilting Boiling Pan for efficient, safe, and hygienic large-scale cooking in commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `When large-scale cooking meets precision and hygiene, you need a solution that’s powerful, space-saving, and operator-friendly. The Electric Tilting Boiling Pan from SAG Engineering Products is engineered for high-volume food production with smooth, safe, and efficient operations.

Ideal for industrial kitchens, institutional food services, cloud kitchens, and catering units, this heavy-duty boiling pan allows you to cook large batches of soups, curries, gravies, sauces, lentils, rice, and vegetables — all while minimizing operator fatigue and maximizing hygiene.

Built with premium food-grade stainless steel and equipped with electrical heating, our boiling pans are safe for indoor, flame-free environments and ideal where gas is not preferred or permitted.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Large Batch Cooking with Less Effort**: Handles 50–200+ liters, ideal for liquid or semi-solid foods. Even heat distribution prevents scorching.
- **Electric Heating – Safe, Clean, and Controlled**: High-efficiency sheathed electric elements under the pan base provide uniform heating. Flame-free operation ensures safety in sensitive environments.
- **Tilting Mechanism for Effortless Handling**: Manual or gear-operated tilting makes transferring cooked food easy and reduces worker strain. Optional electrical tilt model available.
- **Superior Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 inner & outer body with reinforced frame for durability and hygiene. Fully welded and polished surfaces for easy cleaning.
- **Temperature & Time Control**: Thermostatic temperature control with indicator lights and optional digital timer for batch cooking precision.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel (Inner & Outer)
- **Pan Capacity**: 50 L / 100 L / 150 L / 200 L / Custom
- **Heating Type**: Electric – Sheathed Heating Elements
- **Power Supply**: 230V / 415V AC (Single or Three Phase)
- **Temperature Range**: Up to 300°C
- **Control Type**: Thermostat with Indicator Lights
- **Tilting Mechanism**: Manual Gear / Motorized (Optional)
- **Mounting Type**: Floor Mounted
- **Finish**: Matt Finish / Mirror Polish (Inner Optional)
- **Optional Add-ons**: Water Inlet Tap, Drain Valve, Lid Cover, Digital Timer

### Applications & Industries
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Hospitals & School Kitchens
- Hotels & Banquet Halls
- Cloud Kitchens & Tiffin Centers
- Commercial Caterers
- Centralized Food Production Units
- Temple Kitchens & Community Cooking

### Customization Options
- Capacity as per cooking load
- Manual or motorized tilting system
- Integrated drain valve or bottom outlet
- Water inlet connection with control tap
- Thermal insulation for energy efficiency
- Closed lid or open-top design

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Tilting Boiling Pan – Electric?**
✔ Durable, Hygienic & Rust-Free SS 304 Construction  
✔ Designed for Safety & Operator Comfort  
✔ Flame-Free, Energy-Efficient Electric Operation  
✔ High Volume Output in Compact Space  
✔ Smooth Tilting for Easy Food Transfer  
✔ Ideal for High-Capacity Kitchens  
✔ Backed by 15+ Years of Engineering Expertise  
✔ Export-Grade Build Quality  

### After-Sales Support

- PAN India delivery & global export support  
- Bulk supply for canteen chains and contractors

    {
      id: 16,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Tilting Boiling Pan LPG',
      slug: "tilting-boiling-pan-lpg",
      image: '/Tilting-Rice-Boiler-LPG.jpg',
      shortDescription: 'Robust LPG-powered Tilting Boiling Pan for safe, efficient, and hygienic bulk cooking in commercial and institutional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Tilting Boiling Pan (LPG) by SAG Engineering Products is a robust, gas-powered solution engineered for bulk cooking operations where consistency, safety, and output matter most. Ideal for preparing curries, gravies, soups, dals, vegetables, rice, sauces, and milk-based dishes in large quantities, this unit streamlines operations in commercial kitchens, industrial canteens, hospitals, hostels, catering units, and food production facilities.

With a manually or gear-operated tilting mechanism, this boiling pan ensures effortless discharge of hot food while maintaining hygiene and operator safety. Designed with stainless steel construction, precise flame control, and a heavy-duty structure, it is built to withstand the rigors of daily institutional cooking.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Capacity Bulk Cooking**: Available in various capacities (60L, 80L, 100L, 150L, 200L, and more). Cooks large volumes efficiently while maintaining even heat distribution. Ideal for gas-fired central kitchens where continuous cooking is required.
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 food-grade inner and outer body ensures hygiene and corrosion resistance. Heavy-duty MS/SS tubular framework for structural strength and vibration-free operation.
- **Tilting Mechanism for Safety & Convenience**: Manual tilt via side-mounted handle or gear-operated tilt for larger volumes. Enables safe, spill-free transfer of cooked food. Reduces fatigue and minimizes food wastage.
- **LPG/PNG Fired for Powerful Heating**: Equipped with ISI-marked heavy-duty burners compatible with LPG or PNG. Controlled via manual gas valve with adjustable flame for efficient cooking and even heat distribution.
- **Precision & Control**: Flame regulator for precise temperature control. Optional thermometer gauge for monitoring. Heavy-bottom pan ensures uniform heating without burning or sticking.
- **Ease of Cleaning & Maintenance**: Smooth welded corners and polished interiors for hygiene. Includes drainage outlet, removable lid, and spillage groove for clean operations.

### Technical Specifications
- **Capacity**: 60L to 300L (customizable)
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Pan Thickness**: 3mm to 5mm (based on capacity)
- **Heating Source**: LPG / PNG Gas Fired
- **Burner Type**: ISI Marked High-Pressure Gas Burner
- **Frame**: SS or MS Tubular (Powder Coated / SS Finish)
- **Tilting Type**: Manual Handle / Gearbox Tilting
- **Lid Type**: Hinged SS Lid with Heat-Resistant Handle
- **Gas Inlet**: ½" BSP or as per design
- **Finish**: Matt Finish SS with Polished Inner Surface
- **Optional Features**: Thermometer, Steam Jacketed Base, Drain Valve, Flame Failure Device

### Applications & Industries
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens (Factories, Hostels, Defense)
- School & College Canteens
- Commercial Caterers
- Mid-day Meal Kitchens
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities
- Community Kitchens
- Food Processing Units

### Customization Options
- Custom capacities and dimensions
- Manual or gear-driven tilting
- Drain valves, digital temperature indicators, pressure lids
- Optional GN pan support frames or castor wheels
- Integration with gas line layout and safety devices

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s LPG Tilting Boiling Pan?**
✔ Over 15 years of stainless steel equipment manufacturing  
✔ Built to meet FSSAI, ISO, and food safety standards  
✔ Flame-controlled and energy-efficient LPG/PNG operation  
✔ Low maintenance and long service life  
✔ Ideal for central kitchens, MDM programs, and government projects  
✔ Export-grade manufacturing with PAN India delivery  

### After-Sales Service & Support
- One-year warranty on structure and burners  
- Installation and operational guidance  
- Readily available spare parts and accessories  
- Support for kitchen layout integration and commissioning  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Heavy-duty foam and pallet packaging  
- PAN India delivery and export-ready crate shipment  
- Logistics support for bulk and institutional orders  

Upgrade your bulk cooking setup with a reliable, safe, and efficient LPG-powered boiling solution built for professional kitchens.
`,

    {
      id: 17,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Rice Steamer',
      slug: "rice-steamer",
      image: '/Rice steamer.jpg',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity commercial Rice Steamer for perfectly cooked, fluffy rice in every batch — ideal for canteens, hotels, and cloud kitchens.',
      longDescription: `**Steam-Perfected Rice for Every Batch – Fast, Hygienic, and Efficient**

When it comes to bulk rice preparation in commercial kitchens, precision, speed, and hygiene are key. The **Rice Steamer** from SAG Engineering Products is a robust, high-capacity steaming unit built for institutions, hotels, caterers, industrial canteens, and cloud kitchens. Designed to handle large volumes of rice without compromising on quality or texture, this equipment is your dependable solution for uniformly cooked, non-sticky rice — every single time.

Powered by **steam or electricity**, and built with **high-grade stainless steel**, our rice steamers offer operational efficiency, safety, and ease of use — all in one compact footprint.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Volume Steaming Capacity**: Steam large batches of rice in a short time — ideal for institutions serving hundreds or thousands of meals per day. Ensures soft, fluffy rice with no burning or sticking.
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: Entire body, inner trays, and steam chamber made of SS 304 food-grade stainless steel — rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, and easy to clean.
- **Multi-Tier Tray System**: Multiple perforated SS trays or rice containers allow simultaneous steaming of separate batches. Optimized steam circulation ensures uniform cooking.
- **Steam or Electric Options**: Available in direct steam (for boiler kitchens) and self-generating electric versions. Equipped with pressure regulation and safe exhaust.
- **Ergonomic & Safe Design**: Heat-insulated handles and lids, steam release valves, condensate drains, and anti-skid adjustable legs ensure operator comfort and safety.
- **Compact Design**: Space-saving unit ideal for modular and central kitchen layouts.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
- **Steaming Source**: External Steam / Self-generating Electric  
- **Tray / Container Type**: SS 304 Perforated or Solid Rice Pans  
- **Capacity**: 10 kg to 100 kg per batch (custom available)  
- **Power Supply (Electric Model)**: 230V / 415V – Single or Three Phase  
- **Temperature Control**: Thermostat or Pressure-Controlled (Optional)  
- **Safety Features**: Steam Release Valve, Handle Insulation, Pressure Vent  
- **Mounting Type**: Floor-Standing with Adjustable Bullet Feet  
- **Drainage**: Steam Condensate Drain with Outlet  
- **Finish**: Matt / Mirror Polished SS  
- **Optional Add-ons**: Integrated Water Tank, Multi-Chamber Design, Digital Timer  

### Applications & Industries
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Hospitals & Hostels  
- Hotels & Caterers  
- Central / Cloud Kitchens  
- Corporate Cafeterias & Food Courts  
- Temples, Gurudwaras & Community Kitchens  
- Army Messes & School Kitchens  

Whether you serve 200 or 2,000 people a day, our rice steamers are designed to deliver consistency in every batch.

### Customization Options
- Custom capacities from 10 kg to 100 kg per batch  
- Manual or automatic steam control options  
- Optional electrical heating with integrated water tank  
- Multi-chamber units for rice and vegetables  
- Integrated trolley system for GN tray compatibility  
- Custom sizes for compact or modular kitchens  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Rice Steamer?
✔ Built with food-grade stainless steel  
✔ Rapid cooking with even heat distribution  
✔ Flame-free and smoke-free operation  
✔ Easy to operate, clean, and maintain  
✔ 15+ years of trusted manufacturing expertise  
✔ Customizable capacity, power source, and design  
✔ Export-grade build quality  
✔ Trusted by leading commercial kitchens across India  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation and operational training  
- One-year warranty on structure and core components  
- Spare parts readily available  
- Maintenance and technical assistance  
- PAN India and export support  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam and wooden crate packaging  
- Shock-resistant and export-ready  
- Delivered PAN India and worldwide  

**Get the Perfect Rice – Every Time.**
Ready to simplify and standardize your bulk rice cooking process?  
Let our experts help you choose the right Rice Steamer for your kitchen’s needs.  

📐 *Need a custom size or dual-compartment model?*  
📩 *Request a Quote* | 🛠️ *Download Brochure* | ☎️ *Talk to a Kitchen Consultant*`,

    {
      id: 18,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Milk Boiling Pan',
      slug: "milk-boiling-pan",
      image: '/milk boiler.jpg',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity, hygienic, and hassle-free milk heating solution for commercial kitchens, dairy units, and canteens.',
      longDescription: `The **Milk Boiling Pan** by SAG Engineering Products is a purpose-built, high-efficiency solution for boiling, reheating, and pasteurizing milk in bulk. Designed with hygiene, safety, and precision in mind, it’s perfect for commercial kitchens, dairies, and institutions handling large-scale milk operations.

Manufactured using **food-grade stainless steel (SS 304/316)** and available in **tilting or fixed models**, this unit ensures even heating, prevents milk scorching, and simplifies milk handling.

Whether you're serving 100 or 10,000 people daily, this equipment delivers **consistent performance** and **long-term reliability**.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Hygienic Food-Grade Construction** – Entire unit made from SS 304/316 with mirror-polished interior for easy cleaning and hygiene.
- **Uniform Heating with Burn Protection** – Even heat distribution through direct or jacketed systems prevents burning or curdling.
- **Tilting Option for Easy Discharge** – Manual or gear-based tilting for safe, spill-free pouring of hot milk.
- **Safe & Operator-Friendly Design** – Insulated handles, ergonomic height, and non-slip adjustable bullet feet.
- **Low Maintenance & Long Life** – Easy-clean surfaces and robust structure for long service life.
- **Thermostat-Based Control (Electric Models)** – For precision heating and automatic cut-off protection.

### Technical Specifications
- **Material**: SS 304 / SS 316 (Food Grade)
- **Capacity Range**: 50L, 100L, 200L, 300L, 500L, 1000L or custom
- **Heating Source**: LPG / PNG / Electric / Steam
- **Heating Type**: Direct / Indirect (Jacketed)
- **Tilting Mechanism**: Manual / Gear / Fixed with Drain Valve
- **Temperature Control**: Thermostat-based (for electric models)
- **Discharge Outlet**: 1.5”–2” SS Ball Valve or Tilting Spout
- **Mounting**: Floor-standing with Adjustable Legs
- **Finish**: Mirror Polish Inside, Matt Finish Outside

### Applications & Use Cases
- Institutional Kitchens & Mess Halls
- Hotels, Restaurants & Banquet Kitchens
- Dairy Processing & Pasteurization Units
- Catering Services
- Hospitals & Childcare Kitchens
- Large-Scale Beverage & Dessert Preparation

### Customization Options
- Variable tank capacities per operation size  
- Jacketed steam heating for indirect control  
- Integrated thermometers or temperature gauges  
- Optional stirring mechanism for thick liquids  
- Multi-purpose models for milk, tea, kheer, soups  
- SS base cabinets or undershelves for storage  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Milk Boiling Pan?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Designed for Hygiene, Safety & Durability  
✔ Energy-Efficient & Customizable Heating Options  
✔ Fast Cleaning, Safe Tilting & Long Service Life  
✔ Export-Ready Quality at Indian Pricing  
✔ Trusted by Leading Hotels, Institutions & Dairies  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation & operational manual  
- 1-year warranty on structure and heating parts  
- Spare parts availability and responsive support  
- PAN India service & export support  

### Delivery & Packaging
- Foam-padded or wooden crate packaging  
- Timely dispatch for bulk or custom orders  
- PAN India delivery & international export support

      id: 19,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Pot Burner',
      slug: "pot-burner",

      shortDescription: 'High-flame heavy-duty commercial Pot Burner designed for bulk cooking in hotels, canteens, catering, and cloud kitchens.',
      longDescription: `High Flame. Heavy-Duty. Built for Bulk Cooking.

The **Pot Burner** from SAG Engineering Products is a high-performance commercial gas cooking equipment engineered to support large vessels such as boiling pans, stock pots, and bulk cooking utensils. Perfect for cooking dals, curries, rice, soups, gravy bases, and bulk meals — fast and consistently.

With over 15 years of manufacturing expertise, we offer Pot Burners that deliver **maximum heat output**, **fuel efficiency**, and **long operational durability**, making them the top choice for high-volume kitchens.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Frame for Large Vessels**  
  Supports 30L–100+L vessels with reinforced stainless steel structure.
- **High-Performance Burners**  
  ISI-marked cast iron/brass burners with strong flame for fast boiling.
- **Stainless Steel Construction**  
  SS 304-grade body ensures corrosion resistance and hygiene.
- **Precise Flame Control**  
  Smooth manual gas valve with optional pilot burner.
- **Stable & Safe Operation**  
  Anti-skid adjustable legs and optional splash protection.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|--------------|---------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Burner Type | High-pressure Cast Iron / Brass Ring |
| Burner Configuration | Single / Double / Triple Ring Options |
| Power Source | LPG / PNG |
| Ignition | Manual / Optional Pilot Burner |
| Pan Support | Cast Iron / SS Rod Supports |
| Mounting Options | Floor-standing / Platform-mounted |
| Vessel Capacity | Supports 30L – 100+L |
| Finish | Matt / Brushed SS |
| Drip Tray | Optional Removable Tray |

### 🍲 Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Banquet Kitchens
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Large Caterers & Event Kitchens
- Cloud Kitchens & Central Cooking Facilities
- Railways, Military, Government Mess
- High-volume Indian traditional food cooking

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Burner size & flame configuration
- Pilot burner / drip tray / splash guards
- Size & height adjustment as per kitchen layout
- Gas inlet orientation (side/back)
- Multi-unit range integration (griddle + fryer + chapati plate)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG’s Pot Burner?
✔ High-capacity, fast-paced kitchen support  
✔ Strong flame + fuel-efficient performance  
✔ SS body ensures long life & low maintenance  
✔ 100% customizable build  
✔ PAN India delivery + export support  
✔ Trusted brand with 15+ years of experience  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support & Warranty
- 1-year warranty on body & burner parts
- Spare parts always available
- Phone/video support & installation guidance
- Operational safety & maintenance instructions

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-proof foam + wooden crated packing
- Quick lead time for bulk orders
- Labeling for easy installation
- PAN India delivery + export readiness

    {
      id: 20,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Salamander Kitchen Equipment Supplier',
      slug: "salamander-kitchen-equipment-supplier",
      image: '/SALAMANDER.jpeg',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance Salamander Grill for precise browning, finishing, and grilling in commercial kitchens. Built with stainless steel and top-mounted heating for fast, consistent results.',
      longDescription: `**Precision Browning, Finishing & Grilling – All in One Powerful Appliance**

The **Salamander Grill** from **SAG Engineering Products** is a premium-grade kitchen appliance designed to deliver **high-performance broiling, toasting, and finishing** in fast-paced commercial environments. Ideal for chefs who need control, speed, and precision, our salamander is built using **food-grade stainless steel** and offers **intense top-down heating** for that perfect crust, melt, or crisp.

Whether you're browning a gratin, melting cheese over pasta, finishing steaks, or crisping up open sandwiches, this versatile unit adds **finishing finesse and consistency** to your kitchen output — all without compromising energy efficiency or space.

---

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits

- **High-Performance Infrared or Coil Heating**  
  Equipped with top-mounted infrared ceramic elements or electric coils.  
  Delivers intense, focused radiant heat – ideal for fast finishing without overcooking.  
  Rapid heat-up time minimizes prep-to-plate delays.

- **Adjustable Height Grilling Rack**  
  Manually or spring-loaded height adjustment for precise cooking distance from the heat source.  
  Perfect for pizzas, paneer tikka, garlic bread, lasagna, or baked pasta.

- **Sturdy Stainless Steel Construction**  
  Entire body and internal parts fabricated with SS 304 stainless steel.  
  Rust-proof, heat-resistant, and easy to clean even after heavy use.  
  Includes removable crumb/drip tray for effortless maintenance.

- **User-Friendly & Safe Operation**  
  Ergonomic knobs with clear temperature markings.  
  Power and heating indicators for operator safety.  
  Cool-touch handles and insulated body for protection.

---

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|----------|
| **Body Material** | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| **Heating Type** | Infrared / Electric Coil |
| **Power Rating** | 2.5 – 5 kW (based on size) |
| **Power Supply** | 230V / 415V AC |
| **Temperature Control** | Manual Thermostat with Variable Settings |
| **Rack Adjustment** | Manual / Spring-Loaded |
| **Cooking Area Options** | 18”, 24”, 36” or Custom |
| **Mounting Type** | Countertop / Wall-Mounted |
| **Drip Tray** | Removable Stainless Steel Tray |
| **Finish** | Satin / Mirror Finish |

---

### 🍽️ Ideal Applications

- Hotels & Fine-Dine Restaurants  
- Pizzerias & Italian Kitchens  
- Cafés & Bakeries  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Institutional & Canteen Kitchens

---

### 🛠️ Customization Options

- Wall-mounted or countertop versions  
- Multiple width options (18", 24", 36", or custom)  
- Manual or motorized rack adjustment  
- Timer-based operation (optional)  
- Dual-zone heating for independent control  
- Power customization for faster preheating  

---

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Salamander Grill?

✔ Built for heavy-duty commercial use  
✔ Instant, intense radiant heat with low energy loss  
✔ Easy to clean, operate, and maintain  
✔ Compact stainless steel design saves counter space  
✔ Custom configurations for your kitchen layout

✔ Trusted by hotel chains and chefs across India  

---

- Prompt dispatch and nationwide delivery  
- Export-ready documentation & labeling

      name: 'Commercial Tandoor',

      shortDescription: 'Authentic taste meets modern durability – the Commercial Tandoor delivers traditional clay cooking with hygienic stainless steel design for professional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `**Authentic Taste, Engineered for Durability and Performance**

Bring the rich, smoky flavor of traditional Indian cuisine to your commercial kitchen with the **Commercial Tandoor** from SAG Engineering Products. Built for strength, longevity, and performance, our tandoors combine authentic clay craftsmanship with modern stainless steel fabrication, delivering the perfect balance between heritage cooking and hygienic design.

Whether you run a high-end restaurant, a catering business, or a roadside dhaba, our range of gas, charcoal, and electric tandoors caters to every scale and style of operation. Designed for intensive daily use, our tandoors help you prepare flawless naan, roti, kebabs, and tikka dishes while maintaining safety, speed, and energy efficiency.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Authentic Clay Lining for True Flavor**  
  Premium high-temperature baked clay for superior heat retention and even cooking. Maintains the smoky, authentic tandoori flavor.
- **Rugged Stainless Steel Outer Body**  
  SS 304-grade stainless steel outer shell ensures rust resistance, hygiene, and easy maintenance.
- **Fuel Options for Every Kitchen**  
  Gas, Charcoal, Electric, or Combo models available to match your setup and cooking preference.
- **Mobility & Flexibility**  
  Optional wheels/castors for easy movement in banquet kitchens or outdoor setups.
- **High-Heat Efficiency**  
  Clay walls and insulation minimize fuel use while maintaining consistent high temperatures.
- **Built for Commercial Durability**  
  Handles continuous, high-temperature operation with ease — ideal for restaurants and catering use.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|----------------|----------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Inner Lining | Handmade Baked Clay |
| Heating Type | Charcoal / Gas / Electric / Combo |
| Mounting | Floor Standing / On Wheels |
| Shape Options | Round / Square / Drum-Type |
| Fuel Input | LPG / PNG (Gas Models) |
| Temperature Range | Up to 500°C |
| Insulation | Mineral/Ceramic Wool (Optional) |
| Standard Sizes | 24”, 30”, 36”, or Custom |
| Accessories | Skewers, Roti Pad, Steel Lid, Tandoor Hook |

### 🍢 Applications & Use Cases
Perfect for preparing:
- Tandoori Chicken  
- Paneer Tikka  
- Seekh Kebabs  
- Roomali Roti & Tandoori Roti  
- Naan & Stuffed Kulchas  

Used widely in:

- Outer finish: Matt, Mirror, or Powder-Coated  
- Fuel conversions (Gas ↔ Charcoal ↔ Electric)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Commercial Tandoor?
✔ Authentic clay cooking with modern SS finish  
✔ Gas, Charcoal & Electric options available  
✔ Easy to clean, safe to use & built to last  
✔ Compact yet high-capacity models  
✔ 15+ years of manufacturing expertise  
✔ Fully customizable to your kitchen layout

### 🛎️ After-Sales Service & Support

- Spare parts & accessories always available

- Prompt servicing & technical assistance across India

      id: 22,

      longDescription: `**Traditional Taste. Modern Engineering. Timeless Craftsmanship.**

Experience the perfect blend of authentic tandoori flavor and commercial efficiency with the **Copper Tandoor** from SAG Engineering Products — available in Electric, LPG Gas, and Charcoal-fired models. Crafted for high-performance use in restaurants, hotels, and catering operations, our tandoors deliver unmatched durability, elegant design, and reliable cooking performance.

The exterior features beautifully hand-hammered copper for a timeless aesthetic, while the inner body is crafted from premium clay or stainless steel (optional). Whether you're preparing naan, roti, kebabs, or tandoori chicken, this tandoor delivers intense, even heat for the perfect smoky flavor and crisp texture.

---

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits

🔹 **Multiple Fuel Options**
Choose your heating preference:
- **Charcoal Model:** Traditional smoky taste and authentic aroma  
- **LPG/PNG Gas Model:** Clean, easy-to-control operation  
- **Electric Model:** Flame-free, safe for indoor and restricted areas  
- **Combo Model:** Dual fuel flexibility (Gas + Charcoal)

🔹 **Authentic Handcrafted Finish**
- Outer body built from **hand-hammered copper sheets** with a protective lacquer finish  
- Adds an elegant, rustic charm — perfect for open kitchens and live counters  
- Reinforced with stainless steel bands for extra durability  

🔹 **Premium Inner Construction**
- Inner pot made of **high-quality refractory clay** for authentic heat retention  
- Optional **SS inner liner** for easy cleaning and modern kitchens  
- **Ceramic wool or fire brick insulation** for maximum energy efficiency  

🔹 **Superior Heat Retention**
- Reaches up to **800°C** for rapid cooking  
- Ensures consistent heat across the surface for perfect naan and kebabs  
- Designed for high-output commercial use  

🔹 **User-Friendly Design**
- Equipped with **removable ash tray** (charcoal models)  
- **Gas valve control knob** for flame adjustment  
- **Thermostat control** for electric models  
- Mounted on **heavy-duty castor wheels** for mobility  

---

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

| Feature | Details |
|----------|----------|
| **Outer Body Material** | Hand-hammered Copper |
| **Inner Chamber** | Clay pot (traditional) / SS inner lining (optional) |
| **Fuel Type** | Charcoal / LPG / Electric / Combo |
| **Temperature Range** | Up to 800°C |
| **Size Options** | 15”, 18”, 22”, or Custom |
| **Insulation** | Ceramic Wool / Fire Bricks |
| **Burner Type (Gas)** | ISI-marked Gas Ring Burner with Pilot |
| **Heating Coil (Electric)** | Nickel Chromium with Thermostat Control |
| **Mobility** | Castor Wheels / Fixed Legs |
| **Accessories** | Skewers, Roti Pad, Ash Tray, Gas Regulator (optional) |

---

### 🍢 Applications & Use Cases

- Live Counters & Display Kitchens

**Ideal for:**

      id: 14,
      category: 'cooking-equipments',
      name: 'Squear Tandoor (Electric, LPG and Charcoal )',
      slug: 'square-tandoor-electric-lpg-charcoall',

      shortDescription: 'Modern square tandoor offering Electric, LPG, and Charcoal variants for professional kitchens – combining authentic flavor with modern durability and hygiene.',
      longDescription: `The **Square Tandoor** from SAG Engineering Products combines the rich tradition of tandoori cooking with the precision, hygiene, and durability of modern engineering. Designed for professional kitchens, our square tandoors are available in three fuel variants — **Electric, LPG, and Charcoal**, offering unmatched flexibility for restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, and catering services.

Manufactured using high-grade stainless steel and heavy-duty clay liner or SS drum interiors, our tandoors deliver authentic Indian flavor while meeting the safety and efficiency needs of contemporary foodservice operations.

### ✅ Product Highlights & Buyer-Focused Features
- **Available in Electric, LPG & Charcoal Models**  
  - *Electric Tandoor*: Flame-free operation, thermostat-controlled, ideal for indoor and restricted zones.  
  - *LPG Tandoor*: Fast heating and consistent flame control for authentic results.  
  - *Charcoal Tandoor*: Traditional smoky flavor, perfect for open kitchens and North Indian cuisine.

- **Sturdy & Stylish Square Design**  
  - Space-efficient design for compact kitchens.  
  - SS 304-grade body with insulated structure for heat retention and safety.  
  - Optional stone, granite, or marble top for elegant presentation.  

- **Heavy-Duty Inner Lining**  
  - Premium clay pot for gas/charcoal models or SS drum for electric variants.  
  - Clay chamber is seasoned for high heat tolerance and authentic taste.  
  - Electric versions include nichrome coils and thermostatic control.

- **User-Friendly & Safe Operation**  
  - Manual temperature control knobs (electric & gas).  
  - Insulated body with heat-resistant handles.  
  - Optional castor wheels for easy movement in catering environments.  

- **Fuel Efficient Design**  
  - Heat-retaining chamber reduces energy consumption.  
  - Gas and electric versions ensure minimal energy loss and fast heating.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|----------|----------------|
| **Outer Body Material** | SS 304 (Matt / Mirror Finish) |
| **Inner Chamber** | Clay Pot (Gas/Charcoal) or SS Drum (Electric) |
| **Fuel Types** | Electric / LPG / Charcoal |
| **Temperature Control** | Thermostat (Electric), Gas Valve (LPG) |
| **Heating Elements** | Nichrome Coil (Electric) |
| **Dimensions** | 24”x24”, 30”x30”, 36”x36” or Custom |
| **Top Finish Options** | Stainless Steel / Granite / Stone / Marble |
| **Mobility** | Fixed / With Castor Wheels |
| **Accessories** | Skewers, Lid, Ash Tray, Burner Set (Gas Models) |

### 🍢 Ideal Applications
- Indian Restaurants & Takeaway Counters  
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Kitchens  
- Cloud Kitchens (Electric Models)

- Outdoor Grilling Stations  
- Food Trucks & Portable Kitchens

      longDescription: `
The **One Burner Indian Gas Range** from SAG Engineering Products is a high-performance cooking solution engineered for professional commercial kitchens. Crafted from premium AISI-304 Stainless Steel with a reinforced angle framework, this gas range delivers exceptional durability, hygiene, and long-term reliability.

Featuring a **heavy-duty cast iron top**, the range provides superior heat retention and uniform distribution — perfect for all types of cookware. Designed for versatility, it operates on both **LPG and PNG**, making it suitable for all Indian kitchen environments including restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, and catering units.

The burner includes **separate pilot and flame control knobs** for safe, precise flame adjustment, ensuring chefs get accurate cooking temperatures from simmer to high-heat searing.

A **removable stainless steel drip tray** helps maintain cleanliness, making the gas range easy to use and maintain even during peak kitchen hours.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **AISI-304 Stainless Steel Construction**  
  Heavy-duty frame ensures long life, corrosion resistance, and easy cleaning.

- **LPG & PNG Compatible**

- **Precise Flame Control**

- **Heavy-Duty Cast Iron Top**  
  Strong, durable support with uniform heat distribution.

- **Easy Cleaning & Maintenance**  
  Removable drip tray to catch spills and food debris.

- **Commercial Grade Heating**  
  Ideal for first, second, and third course cooking in busy kitchens.

      longDescription: `
The **Three Burner Indian Gas Range** from SAG Engineering Products is engineered for high-productivity commercial kitchens that demand efficiency, multitasking, and nonstop performance. Ideal for restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, catering units, and heavy-duty food production environments, this triple-burner range enables chefs to prepare multiple dishes simultaneously — from gravies and sautéed items to frying, boiling, and bulk cooking.

Built using **AISI-304 food-grade stainless steel** and a reinforced included angle framework, this range provides superior durability, hygiene, and resistance to rust and wear. Designed for tough Indian cooking conditions, it supports heavy cookware like large pots, kadhais, and tawas while maintaining structural stability and consistent performance.

Each burner is independently operated with **individual control and pilot knobs**, ensuring safe ignition and precise flame adjustment. The **heavy-duty cast iron top** offers excellent heat retention and even heat distribution for professional results.
