    {
      id: 201,
      name: 'Fast Food Equipments',
      slug: 'fast-food-equipments',
      image: '/Fast Food Equipments 1.jpeg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Compact, high-performance fast food equipment designed for quick service restaurants, cafés, food trucks, and high-turnover kitchens.',
      longDescription: `In today’s fast-moving food service industry, speed, consistency, and hygiene are critical. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we offer a wide range of compact, rugged, and energy-efficient fast food equipment designed for maximum output with minimal effort.

From burger joints and sandwich counters to high-traffic food courts and food trucks, our equipment supports quick preparation, safe operation, and ease of cleaning — making it ideal for commercial setups focused on high turnover and quality output.

### ✅ Product Range – Fast Food Equipment by SAG Engineering
- **Electric Griddle / Gas Griddle**: Flat or half-ribbed models, thermostatic temperature control, MS or SS plate, single or multi-zone.
- **Deep Fat Fryer (Electric / Gas)**: Table-top or floor-standing, oil drain valve, overheat protection, removable fry basket and oil tank.
- **Toaster / Salamander / Conveyor Toaster**: Adjustable height, fast heat-up, top and bottom heating (salamander).
- **Bain Marie Counter**: GN pan compatible, adjustable thermostat, optional sneeze guard, tray slider, under-storage.
- **Sandwich Griller / Panini Press**: Heavy-duty cast iron plates, non-stick coating, dual-side heating, up to 300°C.
- **Hot Plate with Oven (Optional)**: Dual-use countertop unit for light frying or baking.
- **SS Work Tables & Sink Units**: SS 304, optional undershelves or drawers, easy-to-clean and corrosion-resistant.

We also manufacture customized fast food counters, service trolleys, exhaust hoods, and more.

### 🔧 Key Technical Highlights
| Feature         | Specification |
|-----------------|---------------|
| Material        | SS 304 (Food Grade), optional SS 316 for coastal/marine use |
| Electricals     | 230V (single phase) / 415V (three phase) |
| Gas Compatibility | LPG / PNG |
| Finish          | Matt, Satin, or Mirror |
| Controls        | Thermostatic control, indicator lights, timers |
| Portability     | Optional caster wheels for mobile setups |

### 🏪 Applications & Industry Segments
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)
- Cafés & Coffee Shops
- Food Courts & Mall Kiosks
- Bakeries & Confectioneries
- Canteens & Cafeterias
- Snack Bars & Juice Corners
- Food Trucks & Outdoor Events
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery-Only Brands

### ⚙️ Customization & Design Services
- Custom sizes, heating capacities, and designs
- Layout planning and free kitchen design consultancy
- Modular counter fabrication to match branding
- Combo equipment packages for new setups

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ 15+ Years of Experience in Commercial Kitchens  
✔ One-Stop Solution for Fast Food Equipment  
✔ Heavy-Duty Build with Easy Operation  
✔ Low Energy Consumption & High Output  
✔ Custom Manufacturing & Quick Turnaround  
✔ Nationwide Delivery & Export Support  
✔ Reliable After-Sales Service & Spare Parts  

### 🛠️ After-Sales Service & Support
- Installation support on request
- One-year standard warranty
- Preventive maintenance guidance
- Fast-response service team
- Spare parts availability across India

**We don’t just build machines — we engineer solutions that grow your business.**`,

    {
      id: 202,
      name: 'Sandwich Griller',
      slug: 'sandwich-griller',
      image: '/Sandwich Griller.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty commercial sandwich griller designed for cafés, QSRs, and fast-paced kitchens — delivering crisp, golden results with speed, safety, and consistency.',
      longDescription: `**Crisp Outside. Melted Inside. Built for Fast-Paced Kitchens.**

Elevate your breakfast menu, snack counter, or fast food operation with the Commercial Sandwich Griller from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for heavy-duty commercial use, our sandwich grillers deliver even heating, faster output, and consistent performance — making them an essential appliance for cafés, quick service restaurants, and food courts.

Crafted with high-quality stainless steel and engineered for reliability, our grillers help you prepare perfectly toasted, golden-brown sandwiches that keep customers coming back.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**🔹 Powerful Performance**  
- Flat or grooved cast iron plates for uniform heat distribution and crisp grilling  
- Fast-heating elements reduce wait times and boost service speed  
- Dual-side contact grilling ensures even browning and better sealing of fillings  

**🔹 Durable Construction**  
- Food-grade SS 304 stainless steel body for hygiene and long life  
- Heavy-duty cast iron grill plates with optional food-safe non-stick coating  
- Reinforced hinges and high-quality insulation for continuous commercial use  

**🔹 Energy Efficient Heating**  
- High-efficiency electric heating elements with thermostatic control  
- Accurate temperature adjustment up to 300°C for consistent results  
- Optimized design for minimal power consumption  

**🔹 User-Friendly Operation**  
- Simple temperature control knob  
- Indicator lights for Power ON and Heating Status  
- Cool-touch handles for operator safety  
- Removable drip tray for easy cleaning  

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|--------------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Grill Plate Material | Cast Iron – Flat or Grooved |
| Plate Type | Single or Double Grill Surface |
| Power Rating | 1.8 kW to 3.2 kW |
| Power Supply | 230V / 50Hz / Single Phase |
| Temperature Control | Thermostatic (50°C – 300°C) |
| Control Panel | Manual with indicator lights |
| Handle Type | Cool-touch insulated handle |
| Dimensions | 10" x 10", 14" x 14", or Custom |
| Mounting Type | Table-top |
| Optional Features | Timer, Teflon coating, dual thermostat |

### 🍞 Ideal For
- Cafés & Coffee Shops  
- Fast Food Chains & QSRs  
- Snack Bars & College Canteens  
- Food Trucks & Kiosks  
- Hotel Breakfast Counters  
- Airport Lounges & Corporate Pantries  
- Cloud Kitchens & Meal Prep Businesses  

Whether you're making grilled cheese, paninis, veggie sandwiches, or loaded subs — this griller ensures quality, consistency, and speed.

### 🛠️ Customization & Add-ons
- Single or Double sandwich grill models  
- Choice of grooved or smooth plate surface  
- Non-stick or seasoned cast iron coating  
- Timer-based models for programmed grilling  
- Custom sizes for high-volume operations  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Sandwich Griller?
✔ Premium materials & manufacturing in Mumbai  
✔ Perfect for continuous high-traffic use  
✔ Durable, energy-efficient, and compact  
✔ Designed for speed, safety, and hygiene  
✔ Easy to operate & maintain  
✔ 15+ years of kitchen equipment expertise  
✔ Nationwide service & support  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance  
- One-year standard warranty  
- Replacement parts availability  
- AMC & service across India  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam & carton/wooden box packaging  
- Fast dispatch from Mumbai unit  
- PAN India & export-ready delivery  

**Boost your snack menu with a reliable, stylish, and efficient sandwich griller from SAG Engineering Products.**`,

      images: [

    {
      id: 203,
      name: 'Pizza Oven',
      slug: 'pizza-oven',
      image: '/Pizza Oven  Conveyor Pizza Oven.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial pizza ovens designed for restaurants, cafes, cloud kitchens, and pizzerias — delivering authentic taste, even baking, and consistent results.',
      longDescription: `Deliver perfect, evenly baked pizzas every time with the Commercial Pizza Oven from SAG Engineering Products, a trusted name in commercial kitchen equipment manufacturing based in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Designed to meet the high-performance needs of restaurants, cafes, cloud kitchens, and pizzerias, our pizza ovens combine efficiency, durability, and authentic taste in a robust and user-friendly design.

Whether you’re serving classic margheritas or loaded stuffed-crust delights, our pizza ovens ensure crispy bases, perfectly melted cheese, and even heat distribution — batch after batch.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High Baking Efficiency**: Reaches optimal baking temperatures (350–450°C) quickly and maintains consistent heat for uniform browning and texture.
- **Electric & Gas Models Available**: Electric for clean indoor setups, gas for traditional flame cooking, and hybrid dual-layer models for flexibility.
- **Robust Stainless Steel Body**: Food-grade SS 304, double-walled with premium insulation to retain heat and save energy.
- **Precision Temperature Control**: Digital or manual thermostats, with independent top and bottom heating (electric models).
- **Heavy-Duty Baking Stone or SS Deck**: Choose traditional refractory stone for authentic flavor, or SS trays/baking steel for faster service.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|---------|
| Model Options | Single Deck / Double Deck |
| Capacity | 1–6 pizzas per batch (based on deck size) |
| Fuel Type | Electric / Gas / Hybrid |
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Deck Material | Stone / SS / Perforated Plate |
| Temperature Range | 50°C – 450°C |
| Control Panel | Manual / Digital Thermostat |
| Power Supply (Electric) | 220V / 415V, Single or Three Phase |
| Burner Type (Gas) | ISI-Marked Heavy Duty Burner with Regulator |
| Insulation | Ceramic wool / Glass wool |
| Dimensions | Customizable |
| Finish | Brushed SS Finish |

### 🍕 Suitable For
- Pizzerias & Italian Restaurants
- Fast Food Outlets & Food Courts

- Caster wheels for mobility

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Pizza Oven?
✔ Mumbai-based manufacturing with PAN India service  
✔ Over 15 years of kitchen equipment expertise

**With SAG Engineering Products, you get more than just an oven — you get a dependable tool for consistent food quality and business success.**`,

      id: 204,
      name: 'Conveyor Pizza Oven',
      slug: 'conveyor-pizza-oven',

      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-speed, consistent, and efficient conveyor pizza oven built for commercial kitchens, delivering perfect crusts with minimal operator intervention.',
      longDescription: `Speed up your pizza production without compromising quality with the Conveyor Pizza Oven from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Built for modern foodservice environments, this commercial oven delivers uniform, stone-baked quality pizzas in high volumes — with minimal operator effort.

Whether you’re running a pizzeria, fast food outlet, food court stall, or cloud kitchen, our conveyor ovens combine automation, efficiency, and precision. Fabricated from durable SS 304 stainless steel and equipped with advanced heating technology, they’re ideal for high-demand pizza operations that value consistency and speed.

### ✅ Key Features
- **Automatic Conveyor System** – Integrated moving belt mechanism for hands-free, consistent baking.
- **Uniform Top & Bottom Heating** – Independent heating controls for even cooking on all sides.
- **Digital or Manual Control Panel** – Adjustable temperature, belt speed, and bake time.
- **Heavy-Duty SS 304 Construction** – Hygienic, rust-resistant, and built for heavy commercial use.
- **Energy Efficient & Compact** – Insulated baking chamber retains heat and saves energy.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Specification |
|-----------------------|---------------|
| Construction Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Heating Type          | Electric / Optional Gas |
| Temperature Range     | 50°C to 350°C |
| Belt Width Options    | 14”, 18”, 24”, Custom |
| Control Panel         | Digital / Manual |
| Speed Adjustment      | Variable Belt Speed |
| Power Rating          | 5–15 kW (Model Dependent) |
| Voltage               | 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase |
| Chamber Insulation    | Ceramic / Glass Wool |
| Capacity              | 20–100 pizzas/hour (depending on size) |
| Mounting              | Tabletop / SS Stand with Wheels |
| Accessories           | Crumb tray, top window, GN pan option |

### 🍕 Applications
- Pizza Parlours & QSR Chains
- Cafés & Food Courts
- Cloud & Ghost Kitchens
- Hotel & Banquet Kitchens
- Catering Businesses
- School & College Canteens
- Airport / Highway Food Plazas

Also suitable for garlic bread, subs, pies, flatbreads, quesadillas, and more.

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Conveyor width and belt length customization
- Stackable chambers for extra capacity
- Top window for product viewing
- Gas-fired model for power-limited locations
- Integrated stand with storage
- Built-in exhaust connector

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ Designed & Manufactured in Mumbai  
✔ Durable SS Build with Advanced Heating  
✔ Gas & Electric Variants Available  
✔ Precision Control for Perfect Crust  
✔ High Throughput for Volume Baking  
✔ 15+ Years of Commercial Kitchen Expertise  
✔ Free Layout Consultation & Custom Fitment  
✔ Export-Ready with PAN India Support  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating and electrical components
- Installation assistance and operator training
- Spare parts availability across India
- Annual maintenance contracts available
- Prompt dispatch & secure packaging for PAN India and exports

**SAG Engineering’s Conveyor Pizza Oven — Performance Meets Precision**`,

    {
      id: 205,
      name: 'Conveyor Toaster And Hot Dog Grill',
      slug: 'conveyor-toaster-and-hot-dog-grill',
      image: '/Conveyor Toaster & Hot Dog Grill 2.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Fast, consistent, and compact commercial conveyor toaster and hot dog grill combo designed for high-volume snack service in QSRs, hotels, cafés, and catering setups.',
      longDescription: `Elevate your quick-service setup with SAG Engineering Products’ Conveyor Toaster and Hot Dog Grill – the ultimate combination for speed, consistency, and space-saving cooking. Designed for busy food outlets, QSRs, hotel buffets, and concession stands, these compact yet powerful units are engineered to deliver high-output toasting and grilling with minimal operator effort.

Whether you’re toasting buns, grilling sausages, or preparing snack items on the go, our equipment ensures you serve hot, evenly cooked food every time — with minimal power consumption and maximum durability.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits

#### 🔹 Conveyor Toaster – Precision Toasting for High Demand
- Automatic belt-fed system: feed bread/buns on one side, perfectly toasted slices exit the other.
- Adjustable conveyor speed and heat intensity for light, medium, or dark toast.
- Quartz or metal-sheathed heating elements ensure rapid and even browning.
- Toasts **150–300 slices/hour** depending on model — ideal for rush hours.
- Compact stainless steel design perfect for self-service counters and back kitchens.

#### 🔹 Hot Dog Grill – Consistent Rolling Grill Action
- Multiple rotating stainless steel rollers ensure even **360° grilling**.
- Independent temperature control for front and rear rollers.
- Perfect for sausages, hot dogs, and frankfurters without over-charring.
- Grease collection tray for fast and hygienic cleaning.
- Available in models holding **4, 6, 8, or 11 hot dogs** at once.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Conveyor Toaster                          | Hot Dog Grill                          |
|----------------------|-------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| Material             | SS 304 body, chrome-plated belt           | SS 304 body & SS rollers                |
| Capacity             | 150–300 slices/hour                       | 4–11 hot dogs at once                   |
| Heating Element      | Quartz / Sheathed electric                | Infrared / rod-based                    |
| Power Supply         | 230V AC, 50Hz                             | 230V AC, 50Hz                            |
| Controls             | Speed & heat adjustable                   | Front & rear temperature knobs          |
| Tray                 | Output tray with crumb tray               | Grease tray for drippings                |
| Thermostat           | Yes, adjustable                           | Yes, dual zone                          |
| Dimensions           | Compact models (custom sizes available)   | Variable models based on capacity       |
| Mounting             | Tabletop                                  | Tabletop                                |
| Finish               | Brushed SS                                | Brushed SS                              |

### 🍳 Ideal Applications
- QSR chains & cloud kitchens
- Cafés, food courts & canteens
- Hotel breakfast buffets
- Snack bars & fast food joints
- Catering counters & event kiosks
- Airports & railway station food stalls
- School & corporate cafeterias

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Conveyor toaster models with variable toasting slots
- Hot dog grills with optional bun warmers
- Dual-function combo units for tight spaces
- Variable grill lengths & toaster belt widths
- Digital control panel (available for premium models)

### 💡 Why Buy from SAG Engineering Products?
✔ 15+ years of commercial kitchen equipment expertise  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra – PAN India service  
✔ Food-grade stainless steel construction  
✔ Energy-efficient heating elements  
✔ Low-maintenance, operator-friendly designs  
✔ Fully customizable as per layout or brand standards  
✔ Trusted by hotels, QSRs, and institutional kitchens nationwide  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating elements
- Installation & usage guidance
- Prompt spare parts availability
- PAN India service support
- Bulk order & export assistance

**SAG Engineering’s Conveyor Toaster & Hot Dog Grill — Built for Fast, Consistent, and Space-Saving Snack Service**`,

    {
      id: 206,
      name: 'Fryer',
      slug: 'fryer',
      image: '/Fryer, Bulk Fryer . Batch Fryer.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance electric and gas deep fat fryers for commercial kitchens — built for speed, safety, and oil efficiency, ensuring consistent frying results every time.',
      longDescription: `Looking for a fast, safe, and efficient frying solution for your commercial kitchen? The Deep Fat Fryer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is the perfect blend of robust construction, energy efficiency, and precise temperature control — ensuring every batch of snacks or meals is cooked to perfection.

Whether you're frying samosas, French fries, pakoras, nuggets, puris, or chicken, our fryers deliver consistent results with minimum oil usage and maximum output — helping you maintain high food quality while keeping operating costs in check.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Construction**: SS 304-grade stainless steel body — rustproof, food-safe, and easy to clean. Fully welded frame with rounded edges for hygiene and safety.
- **Power Options**: Available in both Electric and Gas models. Electric models use high-efficiency immersion heaters; gas models feature high-output brass burners with safety valves.
- **Precise Temperature Control**: Thermostatic temperature control from 50°C to 200°C. Auto cut-off feature to prevent overheating and save energy.
- **Oil Tank & Basket Design**: High-gauge stainless steel oil tank with smooth finish. Frying basket with insulated handle for safe lifting. Oil drain valve for easy cleaning and oil disposal.
- **Compact, Safe & User-Friendly**: Tabletop and floor-standing options. Indicator lights for power and heating. Splash guards and insulated control knobs for safety.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification |
|----------------------|---------------|
| Body Material        | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Model Types          | Electric / Gas |
| Basket Type          | Single / Double |
| Oil Capacity         | 6L, 10L, 15L, 20L or Customized |
| Temperature Control  | Thermostat with Auto Cut-off |
| Power Supply         | 230V / 415V AC |
| Gas Type (Gas Model) | LPG / PNG |
| Mounting             | Tabletop / Floor-standing |
| Accessories          | Basket, Lid, Drain Valve, Power Cord |
| Finish               | Matt Finish / Polish Option |

### 🍟 Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- Hotels & Restaurants
- Fast Food Outlets
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains
- Caterers & Banquet Kitchens
- Sweet Shops
- Cafés & Snack Counters
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens

### 🛠️ Customization Available
- Single or twin tank models
- Mobile fryer trolleys with storage
- Custom dimensions to fit your cooking line
- GN pan-compatible basket holders
- Multi-fryer station setups
- Combo fryer-griddle or fryer-warming tray configurations

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Fryers?
✔ Made in Mumbai, Trusted Across India  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Excellence  
✔ Heavy-duty build for daily commercial use  
✔ Available in Electric & Gas variants  
✔ Designed for safety, speed & oil efficiency  
✔ Customizable for your kitchen’s needs  
✔ Export-ready with global support  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation & operation assistance on request
- 12-month warranty on heating elements/burners
- Spare parts readily available
- Responsive customer care team
- Lifetime service support

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam or wooden crate packing
- Easy-to-handle labelling
- PAN India delivery
- Export documentation support

**SAG Engineering’s Deep Fat Fryer — Precision Frying. Built for Performance. Trusted by Professionals.**`,

    {
      id: 207,
      name: 'Bulk Fryer',
      slug: 'bulk-fryer',
      image: '/Bulk Fryer.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-volume commercial fryer designed for continuous or batch frying of snacks, Indian foods, and fried products, built with SS 304 for durability, hygiene, and efficiency.',
      longDescription: `When your kitchen demands continuous, large-scale frying without compromising on taste, safety, or efficiency — the Bulk Fryer from SAG Engineering Products is the perfect solution. Engineered for performance in high-demand commercial environments, our bulk fryers are ideal for preparing snacks, fried foods, and traditional Indian items like samosas, puris, kachoris, pakoras, and namkeen in large quantities.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, and backed by over 15 years of stainless steel fabrication and engineering expertise, SAG Engineering’s bulk fryers are built to last, easy to maintain, and fully customizable to suit your production requirements.

### ✅ Key Features & Advantages
- **High-Capacity Frying Chamber**: Available in rectangular, round, or square vat shapes. Large oil holding capacity ensures steady temperature and crisp frying quality.
- **Durable SS Construction**: Entire body, tank, and structure in SS 304 food-grade stainless steel; optional SS 316 for coastal/export use.
- **Heating Options**: Gas-fired (ISI-marked burners, LPG/PNG) or electric (tubular heating elements, thermostat control).
- **Oil Drainage & Filtration**: Integrated oil drain valve, optional filtration basket, or tilting pan for easy cleaning.
- **Safety & Ease of Use**: Heat-insulated handles, splash guards, oil-level indicators, anti-skid feet or wheels, manual or digital controls.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification |
|----------------------|---------------|
| Body Material        | SS 304 (Optional SS 316) |
| Oil Capacity         | 15–150+ Litres |
| Fryer Shape          | Round / Rectangular / Tilting Pan |
| Fuel Type            | LPG / PNG / Electric |
| Burners / Heaters    | ISI-certified burners / Tubular electric heaters |
| Temperature Range    | 50°C to 250°C |
| Control              | Manual / Thermostatic / Digital thermostat |
| Drain System         | Manual Valve / Tilting Body |
| Mounting             | Floor-standing with skid-proof legs |
| Optional Features    | Oil filter, temperature controller, splash guard |

### 🏭 Applications
- Large Hotels & Banquet Kitchens  
- Industrial Canteens & Messes  
- Food Processing Units  
- Snack & Namkeen Manufacturers  
- Street Food Centers & Sweet Shops  
- Catering Services & Event Kitchens  
- Community Kitchens (Langars, Mandirs, NGOs)  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Tank size and depth  
- Burner power or electric load  
- Single/multiple fry chambers  
- Mesh baskets, oil strainers, gauges, auto tilting  

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Bulk Fryer?**
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise  
✔ High-Output, Energy-Efficient Operation  
✔ Superior SS Fabrication & Reinforced Welding  
✔ Easy to Clean & Hygienic  
✔ Fully Customizable Design & Controls  
✔ Trusted by Hotels, Sweet Shops & Food Units  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Export-Ready Packaging  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation and commissioning (on request)  
- 1-year warranty on structure & heating components  
- Spare parts and burners available nationwide  
- AMC options for heavy-use units`,

      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial fryer with precision frying, high output, and consistent results — built for restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, and catering units.',
      longDescription: `The Match Fryer by SAG Engineering Products is a robust, high-performance deep frying solution designed for professional kitchens that demand speed, consistency, and hygiene. Whether you're frying samosas, vadas, french fries, chicken, or snacks in bulk, our match fryer ensures even frying, oil efficiency, and easy operation — making it a favorite in restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, and catering units.

Manufactured at our facility in Mumbai, Maharashtra, every unit is built from food-grade stainless steel and tailored to meet the rigorous needs of Indian and international kitchens.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**  
  Built from SS 304 grade steel for corrosion resistance, food safety, and long-term durability.  
  Double-walled insulated body (available in premium models) for heat retention and operator safety.  
  Fully welded seams with smooth edges for easy cleaning and hygiene compliance.

- **High-Capacity Frying Tank**  
  Deep, wide oil tank to accommodate large batch frying.  
  Heavy-duty frying basket with insulated handle for safe and smooth operation.  
  Drain valve for hassle-free oil removal and cleaning.

- **Fast & Uniform Heating**  
  Available in both gas-fired and electric models:  
  Gas Model: Uses high-efficiency ISI-marked burners with adjustable flame control.  
  Electric Model: Features precision heating coils and thermostatic controls.  
  Ensures uniform frying temperature, eliminating cold zones and burnt edges.

- **User-Friendly Controls**  
  Temperature regulation via manual thermostat or gas control knobs.  
  Indicator lights for heating and power status (electric version).  
  Oil level markers, safety cutoff, and overheat protection in select models.

- **Safety First**  
  Splash guards and heat-resistant basket handles.  
  Rubber feet or SS bullet legs for anti-slip stability.  
  Optional cover lid for oil protection during idle hours.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Specification |
|-----------------------|---------------|
| Model Type            | Match Fryer (Single/Double Tank) |
| Body Material         | SS 304 (Inner & Outer) |
| Fuel Type             | Gas (LPG/PNG) or Electric (230V/415V) |
| Tank Capacity         | 10L / 15L / 20L / Custom sizes |
| Heating Control       | Manual / Thermostatic |
| Power (Electric)      | 3kW to 6kW (customizable) |
| Burner Type (Gas)     | ISI Brass Burner with Pilot Option |
| Oil Drain             | Manual Ball Valve |
| Basket                | SS Mesh Basket with Handle |
| Mounting              | Tabletop / Floor Stand (optional cabinet base) |
| Finish                | Matt finish or Mirror polished (on request) |

### 🍟 Applications
- Fast Food Restaurants & Cafés  
- Hotels & Banquet Kitchens  
- Cloud Kitchens & Takeaway Joints  
- Street Food Vendors & Kiosks  
- Industrial & School Canteens  
- Catering Companies & Central Kitchens  
- Snack Processing Units (Semi-Commercial)

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Single or double tank configurations  
- Optional temperature display meter  
- Built-in oil filtration system (for heavy-duty users)  
- Cabinet-style models with storage space  
- Customized height and tank dimensions  
- Electric or gas variant depending on kitchen layout  
- Integrated fryer stations with counters, dump stations, or under-shelves

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Match Fryer?**
✔ Built in Mumbai by experts with 15+ years of experience  
✔ Precision frying with reduced oil wastage  
✔ Strong, sanitary SS construction for Indian kitchen conditions  
✔ Suitable for light, medium, and heavy-duty usage  
✔ Engineered with safety and ease of use in mind  
✔ Excellent ROI through energy-efficient performance  
✔ Ready for bulk orders and project kitchens  
✔ PAN India shipping & export-ready packaging

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance available on request  
- Warranty on burners, heaters & structural integrity  
- Spare parts support with fast dispatch  
- Dedicated team for maintenance and customer care  

We don’t just deliver a product — we build long-term partnerships with our clients.
`,

    {
      id: 209,
      name: 'Griddle',
      slug: 'griddle',
      image: '/Griddle Plate.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial griddle (flat top griller) engineered for uniform heat, durability, and ease of use in professional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Commercial Griddle, also known as a Flat Top Griller, from SAG Engineering Products is designed for fast-paced, high-volume cooking environments. Whether you’re grilling sandwiches, frying eggs, searing meats, or toasting parathas — it delivers consistent performance with minimal supervision.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, and trusted by chefs across India, our griddles combine robust construction, precision temperature control, and hygienic design for lasting performance in restaurants, cafés, cloud kitchens, food trucks, and institutional kitchens.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Uniform Heat Distribution**: Embedded heating elements (electric) or precision-calibrated burners (gas) ensure even cooking across the entire plate.
- **Heavy-Duty Cooking Plate**: 10–16 mm polished mild steel or SS 304 plate resists warping, delivers excellent caramelization, and supports continuous use.
- **Durable Stainless Steel Body**: SS 304-grade housing with rounded edges, corrosion resistance, and easy-to-clean surfaces.
- **Electric & Gas Variants**: Thermostat-controlled electric or manually regulated gas models with optional pilot burner.
- **Operator-Friendly Design**: Ergonomic controls, optional splash guards, and a removable grease tray for hassle-free maintenance.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Specification |
|-----------------------|---------------|
| Body Material         | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Cooking Plate         | Polished Mild Steel or SS 304 |
| Plate Thickness       | 10–16 mm |
| Heating Type          | Gas-fired / Electric |
| Power Supply (Electric) | 230V / 415V – Single/Three Phase |
| Burners (Gas)         | High-pressure cast iron / ISI-marked |
| Temperature Control   | Thermostat (Electric) / Manual Regulator (Gas) |
| Plate Sizes           | 18”, 24”, 36”, 48” or Custom |
| Mounting              | Tabletop / With Stand / Undershelf Cabinet |
| Optional Features     | Splash Guards, Storage Base, Drain Tray |

### 🍳 Applications
- Burgers & Sandwiches  
- Kebabs & Tikkis  
- Eggs, Omelets, Pancakes  
- Parathas, Dosas, Chapatis  
- Paneer Tikka, Chicken Grill  
- Stir-fried Vegetables  

### 🏭 Industries We Serve
- Hotels & Restaurants  
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)  
- Cloud Kitchens & Tiffin Services  
- Canteens (Corporate, School, Hospital)  
- Caterers & Outdoor Units  
- Food Courts & Snack Shops  
- Food Trucks & Portable Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom plate sizes & thicknesses  
- Electric or gas heating system  
- Multi-zone heating  
- Storage stands, undershelves, mobility wheels  
- Integrated equipment combos (Griddle + Fryer, etc.)  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Griddle?
✔ 15+ years manufacturing expertise  
✔ Food-grade stainless steel construction  
✔ Rugged for daily commercial use  
✔ Clean, smoke-free electric variant  
✔ High-output, flame-efficient gas variant  
✔ PAN India & global shipping  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating components  
- Spare parts & accessories available  
- Maintenance and repair support  
- Installation guidance (onsite/remote)  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Export-grade packaging for safe transit  
- Fast nationwide & overseas delivery  
- Bulk orders welcome`,

    {
      id: 210,
      name: 'Crepe Maker',
      slug: 'crepe-maker',
      image: '/Crepe Maker.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade crepe maker designed for cafés, dessert shops, hotels, and live counters, delivering perfect golden-brown crepes with speed, precision, and style.',
      longDescription: `Craft Perfect Crepes with Precision and Style – Powered by SAG Engineering

Create light, golden-brown crepes and delicious flatbreads with unmatched consistency using the Crepe Maker by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai’s trusted name in commercial kitchen equipment for over 15 years. Designed for professional foodservice establishments, this crepe griddle is ideal for cafés, dessert shops, hotels, quick-service restaurants (QSRs), and street food counters where speed, precision, and quality presentation matter.

Built with food-grade stainless steel and equipped with a heavy-duty non-stick cooking surface, our crepe makers ensure even heating, ease of use, and excellent durability — all in a compact, counter-friendly design.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Perfect Heat Distribution**: Even heating via high-performance electric element or gas burner ensures uniform texture and color.
- **Heavy-Duty Cooking Plate**: Cast iron or polished mild steel, optional non-stick, with large 350–450 mm diameter.
- **Stainless Steel Body**: SS 304 hygienic, corrosion-resistant, easy-to-clean construction.
- **User-Friendly Controls**: Thermostat (electric) or flame knob (gas) with quick heat-up and indicator lights.
- **Compact & Portable**: Tabletop design ideal for counters, kiosks, and mobile setups.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification |
|----------------------|---------------|
| Body Material        | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Cooking Plate        | Cast Iron or Polished MS (Non-stick optional) |
| Plate Diameter       | 14" (350 mm), 16" (400 mm), 18" (450 mm) |
| Heating Type         | Electric Element or LPG/PNG Burner |
| Power Rating         | 2.5 kW – 3.5 kW |
| Temperature Range    | 50°C to 300°C |
| Control Type         | Thermostat or Flame Knob |
| Mounting             | Tabletop |
| Finish               | Matte stainless steel, fully welded |
| Optional Accessories | T-shaped spreader, spatula, batter tray, under-shelf stand |

### 🍽️ Applications
- Sweet & Savory Crepes
- Dosas & South Indian Flatbreads
- Wraps, Tortillas & Rotis
- Pancakes & Waffles (with interchangeable plates)
- Street Food Kiosks & Live Cooking Counters

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Plate diameter & thickness
- Electric or gas heating
- Non-stick or seasoned cast iron
- Double-plate models for higher output
- Mobile integration with cabinets or shelves

**Why SAG Engineering’s Crepe Maker?**
✔ Made in Mumbai with global-grade quality  
✔ Designed for Indian & international kitchens  
✔ Excellent heat control for consistent results  
✔ Durable SS body with professional finish  
✔ Trusted by café chains, street vendors, hotels  
✔ PAN India delivery & export packaging  
✔ 15+ years of engineering expertise

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance & usage demo (on request)
- 1-year warranty on heating elements & structure
- Spare parts & accessories readily available
- Prompt service & support

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam & box packaging for safe shipping
- Ready for domestic & export dispatch
- Bulk orders for restaurant chains supported`,

    {
      id: 211,
      name: 'Milk Shaker',
      slug: 'milk-shaker',
      image: '/Milk Shaker.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade milk shaker for cafés, juice bars, and QSRs — delivering smooth, frothy beverages with speed, style, and durability.',
      longDescription: `Perfectly Blended. Smoothly Served. Built for Commercial Speed.

Add smoothness, style, and speed to your beverage service with the Milk Shaker Machine from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Engineered for performance and designed for durability, our milk shaker is an essential addition to cafés, juice bars, fast-food outlets, ice cream parlors, and commercial kitchens where quality and consistency matter.

Whether you're whipping up thick shakes, cold coffees, flavored milk, or protein beverages, this compact machine delivers creamy, frothy, and evenly blended results — every single time. Built with stainless steel construction and precision motor components, it's designed to perform under the demands of a busy counter.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Powerful Motorized Performance**: High-speed commercial-grade motor ensures quick blending with consistent results. Operates with low vibration and minimal noise, even in high-volume settings. Optional variable speed control for different thickness levels and beverage types.
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction**: Entire outer body and shaker cup made from food-grade SS 304, ensuring hygiene, rust resistance, and ease of cleaning. Heavy base for stable operation even at full speed. Sleek, compact design makes it ideal for countertop installation.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Easy one-touch operation for quick service during peak hours. Ergonomic positioning of motor head and blending cup for safe and efficient handling. Cup-lock mechanism or hands-free operation (in premium models).
- **Ideal Texture Every Time**: Efficient mixing blade design that creates fine froth and smooth consistency.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature           | Specification |
|-------------------|--------------|
| Body Material     | SS 304 (Food Grade) |
| Motor Type        | Copper-wound, Air-cooled |
| Motor Speed       | 10,000 – 15,000 RPM (variable options) |
| Power Supply      | 220V, Single Phase |
| Cup Material      | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Cup Capacity      | 750 ml to 1 liter |
| Operation         | Push-button / Auto-lock switch |
| Dimensions        | Compact footprint (customizable) |
| Mounting          | Tabletop |

### 🥤 Applications
- Juice & Milkshake Counters
- Fast Food Chains & QSRs
- Cafés, Ice Cream Parlors & Dessert Bars
- College Canteens & School Tuck Shops
- Hotels & Catering Setups
- Gym Cafeterias for Protein Shakes
- Food Trucks & Beverage Stalls

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Single or Double Cup Models
- Optional branding stickers or logo engraving
- Digital control panel (for premium models)
- Multiple cup sizes or interchangeable holders
- Choice of blade types for various beverage viscosities

**Why SAG Engineering’s Milk Shaker Machine?**
✔ Food-Safe Stainless Steel Build  
✔ High-Speed Motor for Fast Output  
✔ Smooth, Silent, and Consistent Operation  
✔ Designed for Commercial Durability  
✔ Compact & Elegant Countertop Design  
✔ Backed by 15+ Years of Manufacturing Experience  
✔ Made in Mumbai, Trusted Nationwide

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance & usage training
- One-year warranty on motor and parts
- Readily available spares & servicing
- PAN India delivery and on-call support

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Compact packaging with shock protection
- Bulk order discounts for café chains, franchises, and commercial rollouts
- Export-compliant packaging for international orders`,

    {
      id: 212,
      name: 'Waffle Maker',
      slug: 'waffle-maker',
      image: '',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty commercial waffle maker delivering crispy outside, fluffy inside results — perfect for cafés, hotels, bakeries, and fast-food joints. Built for high-demand foodservice environments.',
      longDescription: `Crispy Outside. Fluffy Inside. Engineered for Perfection.

Serve up golden, restaurant-quality waffles in minutes with the Commercial Waffle Maker from SAG Engineering Products — a powerful, durable, and user-friendly solution for cafés, bakeries, hotels, and fast-food joints. Designed for consistent performance, our waffle machines deliver perfectly cooked waffles every time — whether it’s Belgian, American, or customized varieties.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with a focus on quality, safety, and durability, our waffle makers are built to perform under high-demand conditions and add gourmet appeal to your breakfast or dessert offerings.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Build for Commercial Use**: SS 304 stainless steel outer body ensures long service life, corrosion resistance, and hygiene. Built for continuous usage in busy kitchens. Smooth surfaces make cleaning effortless.
- **Non-Stick Cooking Plates**: Cast aluminum heating plates with Teflon® coating for easy waffle release. Classic molded grid pattern for perfect texture. Easy wipe-down with minimal residue.
- **Uniform Heating System**: Embedded electric coils in both plates for even heat distribution. Fast heat-up and quick recovery for consistent output. Preheat indicator lights and thermostatic control for precision cooking.
- **User-Friendly Controls**: Manual thermostat for 50°C–250°C temperature control. Dual indicator lights (Power On & Ready to Cook). Optional timer with buzzer for accuracy.
- **Compact & Space-Efficient**: Tabletop model with heat-insulated handle and anti-skid feet for operator safety and stability.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature           | Specification |
|-------------------|--------------|
| Body Material     | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Plate Material    | Non-stick coated cast aluminum |
| Power Supply      | 230V, Single Phase (50Hz) |
| Power Consumption | 1.5 kW – 2.2 kW |
| Temperature Range | 50°C – 250°C |
| Control Type      | Manual Thermostat (Optional Timer) |
| Plate Design      | Belgian-style square / heart / round |
| Dimensions        | Approx. 12” x 12” footprint |
| Mounting          | Tabletop / Portable |
| Weight            | 8 – 10 kg |

### 🍽️ Applications
- Cafés & Coffee Shops
- Hotels & Breakfast Buffets
- Food Courts & Dessert Kiosks
- Catering Companies & Event Planners
- Bakeries & Cloud Kitchens

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom plate shapes (round, heart, square, branded grid)
- Single or double-plate models
- Digital timer or touchscreen control
- Voltage compatibility for export
- Custom branding plate

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Waffle Maker?**
✔ Food-safe, non-stick cooking surface  
✔ High-usage commercial build  
✔ Quick heat-up & uniform browning  
✔ Easy cleaning & maintenance  
✔ Available in single or double plate  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of engineering expertise  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating elements & electricals
- PAN India service support from Mumbai factory
- Spare parts & servicing on demand
- Operational demo & usage training

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-proof packaging with thermocol or wooden crate for bulk
- Quick dispatch across India
- Export-compliant packaging for overseas orders`,

      images: [
        '/Commercial Waffle Maker.jpeg',
        'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1528735602780-2552fd46c7af?w=800&h=600&fit=crop&auto=format',
        'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559050505-1f04d02b274a?w=800&h=600&fit=crop&auto=format'
      ],
      features: [
        'SS 304 stainless steel outer body',

    {
      id: 213,
      name: 'Popcorn Machine',
      slug: 'popcorn-machine',
      image: '/Popcorn Machine.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial popcorn makers designed for cinemas, events, malls, and food kiosks — built for durability, speed, and high output.',
      longDescription: `Popcorn is more than just a snack — it’s a profitable, crowd-pleasing product for cinemas, events, malls, amusement parks, and food kiosks. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we manufacture high-quality popcorn machines that combine modern aesthetics with robust engineering to ensure high output, consistency, and easy operation.

Built with premium-grade stainless steel and food-safe components, our popcorn machines are designed for heavy-duty commercial usage and long operational hours. Whether you’re a cinema owner, a mall-based snack outlet, or a catering business, this machine is engineered to boost your popcorn production and maximize ROI.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High Production Capacity**: Powerful heating elements and stainless-steel kettle for rapid popping. Options from 4 oz to 16 oz capacity. Fast popping cycle for busy snack counters.
- **Sturdy, Long-Lasting Construction**: SS 304-grade stainless steel frame, toughened glass/acrylic panels, heavy-duty kettle with non-stick coating, and corrosion-resistant finish.
- **User-Friendly Controls**: Push-button operation with heater, stirrer, and warming deck controls. Internal lighting for display. Easy-to-read indicators.
- **Compact Footprint & Mobility**: Countertop or cart-mounted designs. Fits compact counters, stalls, and mobile setups. Optional custom branding.
- **Safety & Hygiene Compliant**: Food-safe interiors, heat-insulated handles, electrical protection systems, and removable trays for easy cleaning.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature           | Specification |
|-------------------|--------------|
| Model Type        | Countertop / Floor-mounted / Cart |
| Kettle Capacity   | 4 oz, 6 oz, 8 oz, 12 oz, 16 oz |
| Body Material     | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Side Panels       | Toughened Glass or Acrylic |
| Heating Element   | Electric Coil with Stirrer Motor |
| Power Supply      | 220V, Single Phase |
| Power Consumption | 1 kW – 2.5 kW (model dependent) |
| Controls          | Heater, Stirrer, Warm Deck, Lighting |
| Output Rate       | Approx. 80–150 servings/hr |
| Waste Drawer      | Removable crumb tray |
| Mobility          | Optional wheels or stainless steel stand |
| Branding          | Custom sticker/logo printing available |

### 🎯 Applications
- Multiplex Cinemas & Movie Theatres
- Amusement Parks & Gaming Zones
- Shopping Mall Snack Counters
- Cafeterias & Canteens
- Event Caterers & Wedding Planners
- Street Food Vendors & Kiosk Operators
- Food Courts & Franchise Chains

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom branding decals or wraparound printing
- Color-coordinated body finishes
- Integrated storage bins or counters
- Dual kettle systems for high-output
- Combo carts with nacho or soda stations

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Popcorn Machines?**
✔ Made in India – Engineered in Mumbai  
✔ Commercial-grade durability  
✔ Eye-catching display for customers  
✔ Low maintenance & easy cleaning  
✔ Compact, space-saving design  
✔ Reliable spare part availability  
✔ Indoor & outdoor operation  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of expertise

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating elements & motor
- Operation & maintenance manual included
- Spare parts on-demand
- Phone & WhatsApp troubleshooting
- Installation guidance (on request)

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-resistant protective packaging
- Export-grade wooden crates for overseas orders
- PAN India delivery
- Ready stock for standard models`,

    {
      id: 214,
      name: 'Candy Floss Machine',
      slug: 'candy-floss-machine',
      image: '/Candy Floss Machine.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade candy floss machine for events, kiosks, and food stalls — compact, portable, hygienic, and designed to attract crowds while boosting profits.',
      longDescription: `Attract Crowds. Boost Profits. Serve Sweet Joy.

Bring smiles and sweetness to your events, kiosks, and food stalls with the Candy Floss Machine from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Engineered for performance, hygiene, and visual appeal, this machine makes fluffy, colorful cotton candy in minutes — perfect for amusement parks, carnivals, malls, school fairs, cinemas, and outdoor events.

Compact, portable, and built with commercial-grade components, our Candy Floss Machine is easy to operate, clean, and maintain. Whether you’re a professional caterer, vendor, or business owner looking to add a high-margin product to your menu, this machine is a valuable investment.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Speed Candy Floss Production**: Spins 2–3 cones per minute with even heating and high RPM for fluffy, consistent results.
- **Robust & Hygienic Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel body, durable heating coil, and premium-grade aluminum bowl. Rustproof, food-safe, and easy to clean.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Simple on/off and heat regulation knobs, large open-top bowl for easy shaping, and compact footprint for portability.
- **Visually Appealing Operation**: Optional transparent or LED-lit dome cover to draw attention, plus vibrant colors and aroma for instant customer appeal.
- **Safe & Stable**: Thermal cut-off, overheat protection, shock-proof body, and anti-skid feet or trolley wheels.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature           | Specification |
|-------------------|--------------|
| Body Material     | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Bowl Material     | Aluminum / Stainless Steel |
| Bowl Diameter     | 19" to 22" |
| Power Supply      | 220V / 50Hz / Single Phase |
| Power Consumption | 0.9 kW to 1.5 kW |
| Production Rate   | Approx. 2–3 cones/min |
| Weight            | 12–18 kg |
| Control Type      | Manual with adjustable heat knob |
| Mounting          | Table-top or SS trolley (optional) |
| Finish            | Mirror polish / matt finish |

### 🍭 Applications
- Food Stalls & Kiosks
- Funfairs, School Events & Carnivals
- Amusement & Water Parks
- Movie Theaters & Mall Counters
- Party Planners & Wedding Caterers
- Food Trucks & Pop-Up Stores
- Theme Restaurants & Dessert Parlors

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Add-on trolley with storage & branding
- LED lighting under bowl or in base
- Transparent dome cover
- Custom bowl sizes for high-volume use
- Powder coating or vinyl wrap in brand colors

**Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Candy Floss Machine?**
✔ Built with commercial-grade components  
✔ Fast heating & high output  
✔ Easy to use & clean  
✔ Compact & travel-friendly  
✔ Eye-catching design for customer attraction  
✔ Trusted by event organizers & caterers nationwide  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on heating element & controls
- PAN India service from Mumbai facility
- Spare parts & repair support available
- Usage training & operational demo provided

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Thermocol-packed & boxed for safe transit
- Export-quality packing for bulk orders
- Quick dispatch PAN India & for exports`,

    {
      id: 215,
      name: 'Tornado Cutter and Chipper',
      slug: 'tornado-cutter-and-chipper',
      image: '/Tornado Cutter & Chipper.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-speed vegetable processing machine for commercial kitchens — slices, dices, shreds, and chips with precision, speed, and hygiene.',
      longDescription: `High-Speed Vegetable Processing. Maximum Output, Minimum Effort.

The Tornado Cutter and Chipper by SAG Engineering Products is a robust, high-speed food preparation machine designed to handle heavy-duty chopping, slicing, shredding, and dicing operations in commercial kitchens. Engineered for precision and productivity, this all-in-one unit is a must-have for hotels, restaurants, canteens, and cloud kitchens that deal with large volumes of vegetables and fruits.

Whether you're prepping for lunch service in a busy restaurant or handling bulk food production for industrial catering, our Tornado Cutter and Chipper delivers uniform cuts, minimal waste, and fast turnaround — all while reducing manual labor and ensuring hygiene.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Speed Motorized Operation**: Powered by a high-torque industrial-grade motor, the machine can process large quantities of vegetables in minutes. Suitable for continuous operation during peak hours without performance drops or overheating.
- **Multi-Functional Blade System**: Comes with interchangeable cutting discs and blades for slicing, dicing, shredding, julienning, and chipping. Offers uniform output size, which is critical for portion control and aesthetic presentation.
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated with SS 304 food-grade stainless steel, ensuring durability, hygiene, and rust resistance. Strong, stable base with anti-slip legs or skid-proof rubber mounts.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Ergonomic top feeding chamber for safe vegetable input. Easy-to-use operation panel with on/off controls and emergency stop. Simple dismantling system for fast cleaning and blade replacement.
- **Compact & Efficient**: Space-saving vertical design suitable for small and medium kitchen layouts. Low energy consumption with high throughput — ideal for modern, eco-conscious kitchens.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|--------------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Motor Power | 0.5 HP to 2 HP (as per model) |
| Voltage | 220V / 50Hz (Single Phase) or 415V (Three Phase) |
| Blades/Discs | Slicer, Dicer, Shredder, Julienne, Chip Cutter |
| Cutting Speed | 200–500 kg/hour (depending on food type & blade) |
| Feed Inlet Size | Customizable |
| Safety Features | Emergency Stop, Safety Lock |
| Mounting | Table-top / Stand-mounted |
| Finish | Matt Finish Stainless Steel |
| Cleaning | Tool-less blade removal, wash-friendly body design |

### 🍽️ Applications
- Hotels & Restaurants
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery Setups
- School, College & Hospital Kitchens
- Catering Businesses
- Vegetable Processing Units
- Centralized Food Prep Facilities
- Large-Scale Mess Kitchens

From onions and carrots to potatoes, cucumbers, beetroot, and more — this machine processes them all with speed, safety, and uniformity.

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Selection of cutting discs based on most-used vegetables
- Variable motor power for small, mid-size, and large operations
- Custom feed chute sizes for safety and productivity
- Optional wheeled base, dust cover, or waste collection tray

### **Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Tornado Cutter & Chipper?**
✔ 15+ Years of Commercial Kitchen Equipment Manufacturing  
✔ Heavy-Duty, Industrial-Grade Construction  
✔ Reliable Performance in High-Volume Environments  
✔ Food-Safe, Easy to Clean, and Long-Lasting  
✔ Fast Processing with Minimal Labor  
✔ Designed & Made in Mumbai with Export-Ready Quality  
✔ Nationwide Delivery & Service Support  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation and demo available upon request
- 1-year warranty on motor and structural components
- Spare blades and discs available throughout India
- Technical assistance and servicing provided by our dedicated support team

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-packed and crated for damage-free delivery
- PAN India dispatch and export-ready documentation
- Bulk order support for kitchen consultants and turnkey project developers`,

      id: 216,
      name: 'Choclate Fountain and Donut Maker',
      slug: 'choclate-fountain-and-donut-maker',
      image: '/Chocolate Fountain & Donut Maker 1.jpg',

      shortDescription: 'Elegant, high-performance chocolate fountain machine for hotels, buffets, bakeries, and event catering — food-grade stainless steel, silent operation, and eye-catching dessert presentation.',
      longDescription: `🍫 **Chocolate Fountain Machine**  
Turn Every Dessert Station into a Showstopper.

The Chocolate Fountain Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is designed to add indulgence and elegance to your dessert display. Perfect for hotels, buffet setups, bakeries, caterers, and event planners, it’s easy to use, hygienic, and built for continuous performance during long service hours.

Made from SS 304 food-grade stainless steel, this unit creates a smooth, cascading chocolate effect that attracts attention and satisfies cravings — a favorite at weddings, corporate events, and high-end restaurants.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Multiple-Tier Fountain Design**: Smooth chocolate flow over 3–5 tiers, depending on model.
- **High-Capacity Bowl**: 2–5 kg chocolate holding capacity options.
- **Durable Construction**: Entire body made from SS 304 for hygiene and corrosion resistance.
- **Precision Heating Element**: Maintains optimal chocolate viscosity without burning.
- **Whisper-Quiet Motor**: Ideal for live buffet counters and front-of-house setups.
- **Easy Assembly & Cleaning**: Detachable parts and smooth finishes for quick cleaning.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature             | Specification |
|---------------------|--------------|
| Material            | SS 304 Food-Grade Stainless Steel |
| Tiers Available     | 3, 4, 5 (based on model) |
| Capacity            | 2 to 5 kg Chocolate |
| Temperature Control | Thermostat with Digital/Manual Adjustment |
| Motor Type          | Silent Continuous Motor |
| Power Supply        | 220V Single Phase |
| Finish              | Mirror Polished / Matt Finish |
| Mounting            | Tabletop Design |
| Application         | Commercial Dessert Stations, Caterers, Hotels, Events |

### 🎯 Applications
- 5-Star Hotels & Resorts
- Dessert Buffets & Banquet Halls
- Event Catering Companies
- Premium Bakeries & Chocolate Boutiques
- Cafés, Ice Cream Parlors & Candy Stores
- Mall Kiosks & Food Courts

**Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ Built with over 15 years of stainless steel expertise  
✔ Customizable designs for space and power needs  
✔ Food-safe materials and precision heating systems  
✔ Compact, mobile designs for live counters and events  
✔ Export-quality manufacturing with PAN India delivery  
✔ Comprehensive after-sales support & spare parts`,

    {
      id: 217,
      name: 'Induction and Food Warmer',
      slug: 'induction-and-food-warmer',
      image: '/Induction & Food Warmer.jpg',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Smart heating, elegant display, and efficient performance — keep food warm, fresh, and ready to serve in hotels, restaurants, banquet halls, and catering setups with induction and electric warmer units.',
      longDescription: `Keep food fresh, warm, and ready to serve — effortlessly and hygienically — with Induction and Food Warmer Units from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai’s trusted manufacturer of stainless steel commercial kitchen equipment.

Engineered for performance, energy-efficiency, and ease of use, these units are designed to maintain food at optimal serving temperatures in restaurants, hotels, banquet halls, cafeterias, and cloud kitchens. Whether it’s for buffet service, à la carte plating, or self-service counters, our warmers ensure that your food remains deliciously warm without compromising taste or texture.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits

**🔹 Induction Food Warmers (Countertop & Drop-In Models)**
- Flameless, instant heating using electromagnetic technology
- Touch controls or rotary dials for precise temperature adjustments
- Suitable for GN pans, chafing dishes, or flat-bottom vessels
- Easy-to-clean glass ceramic top with sleek SS frame
- Energy-saving operation with low heat loss and rapid responsiveness

**🔹 Electric Food Warmers / Bain Marie Units**
- Traditional electric warmer with heating element and water pan
- Stainless steel body with insulated heating chamber for uniform warmth
- Compatible with GN 1/1, 1/2, or 1/3 pans
- Ideal for Indian gravies, rice, vegetables, sauces, and curries

**🔹 Dry Food Warmers (Infrared or Coil Type)**
- Designed for dry heating applications — no water required
- Used in live counters or as pass-through warming zones
- Mounted with infrared heating elements or tubular rods
- Maintains consistent surface temperature without overheating food

**🔹 Overhead Heat Lamps (Optional Add-On)**
- Used with carving stations or plating counters
- Infrared bulbs or quartz tubes for gentle top heat
- Adjustable height and angle for precise heat distribution

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter          | Specification |
|--------------------|--------------|
| Body Material      | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Heating Type       | Induction / Electric Coil / Infrared |
| Power Supply       | 230V Single Phase |
| Temperature Range  | 40°C to 120°C (adjustable) |
| Control Type       | Touch / Rotary Knob / Thermostat |
| Top Surface        | Toughened glass (Induction) / SS Bain Marie Wells |
| Pan Compatibility  | GN 1/1, 1/2, 1/3 inserts |
| Mounting Options   | Countertop / Drop-in / Floor-mounted |
| Finish             | Brushed / Mirror SS |

### 🍲 Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- Buffet Service Counters & Banquet Halls
- Self-Service Lines in Hotels & Canteens
- Live Counter Stations in Restaurants & Resorts
- Catering Events & Wedding Kitchens
- Cloud Kitchens & Central Commissary Units
- Airline Lounges, Cruise Ships & Corporate Cafeterias

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Size variations: single to multiple pan configurations
- Drop-in or freestanding models
- Digital or manual controls
- Open or covered warmers (with lids, roll-top covers, sneeze guards)
- Integrated lighting & branding

**Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?**
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise  
✔ Built to global hygiene & performance standards  
✔ Energy-efficient operation  
✔ Customized to client needs  
✔ PAN India & export-ready delivery  
✔ Responsive after-sales support`,

    {
      id: 218,
      name: 'Food Warming Showcase',
      slug: 'food-warming-showcase',
      image: '/Food Warming Showcase.webp',
      category: 'fast-food-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Elegant stainless steel and tempered glass showcase that keeps food warm (60–80°C) while enhancing presentation — perfect for bakeries, cafés, QSRs, hotels, and catering counters.',
      longDescription: `🍛 **Food Warming Showcase**  
Display with Elegance. Serve with Warmth. Preserve with Confidence.

Present your ready-to-serve food items in style while maintaining the perfect serving temperature with the Food Warming Showcase from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Crafted to meet the daily demands of bakeries, cafés, restaurants, hotels, and catering counters, our warming showcases combine premium aesthetics, uniform heat distribution, and robust build quality to help you keep food fresh, hot, and customer-ready.

Engineered using high-grade stainless steel and tempered glass, this unit is ideal for displaying and warming snacks, bakery items, cooked meals, and desserts while enhancing the visual appeal of your service counter.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual Function – Display + Heating**  
  Keeps food warm at safe serving temperatures (60–80°C) for extended durations.  
  Showcases your food attractively while minimizing drying and heat loss.  

- **High-Quality Construction**  
  SS 304 food-grade stainless steel body with tempered glass on all sides for visibility and safety.  
  Rust-resistant, corrosion-proof, and suitable for dry or humid environments.  

- **Efficient Heating System**  
  Infrared heaters, tubular elements, or heating rods (depending on model).  
  Adjustable thermostat ensures consistent temperature.  
  Optional humidity control pans prevent food from drying.  

- **User-Friendly Design**  
  Sliding rear glass doors for easy serving and refilling.  
  Adjustable stainless steel shelves or GN tray compatibility.  

- **Elegant Presentation**  
  Warm white LED lighting to highlight your food.  
  Perfect for bakery items, snacks, hot meals, and desserts.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification |
|----------------------|--------------|
| Body Material        | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Glass Type           | Tempered Toughened Glass |
| Heating Method       | Infrared / Tubular Electric Heaters |
| Temperature Range    | 60°C to 80°C |
| Control Type         | Manual Thermostat |
| Lighting             | Internal Warm White LED |
| Shelves              | 1–3 Tier Adjustable / GN Tray Compatible |
| Doors                | Sliding Rear Glass Doors |
| Power Supply         | 230V / 50Hz |
| Size Options         | 2ft, 3ft, 4ft, or Custom |
| Mounting             | Countertop or Stand-Mounted |
| Optional Add-ons     | Humidity Tray, Digital Thermostat, Castor Wheels |

### 🎯 Applications
- Bakeries & Patisseries
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)
- Café Chains & Snack Bars
- Catering Outlets & Food Trucks
- Hotel Buffets & Banquet Counters
- Supermarket Ready-to-Eat Sections
- Railway, Airport & College Canteens

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Food Warming Showcase?
✔ Food-safe materials and robust build quality  
✔ Elegant design that enhances display appeal  
✔ Trusted heating technology for consistent warmth  
✔ Easy to clean and maintain  
✔ Customizable to your menu and space  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of expertise  
✔ PAN India delivery and export packaging`,

    {
      id: 301,
      name: 'Galley Equipments',
      slug: 'galley-equipments',
      image: '/Galley Equipment 1.jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Marine-grade stainless steel galley equipment engineered for ships, offshore platforms, and naval kitchens — compact, corrosion-resistant, and built for offshore performance.',
      longDescription: `⚓ **Galley Equipment – Marine-Grade Kitchen Solutions Built for Offshore Performance**

At SAG Engineering Products, we specialize in manufacturing durable, space-efficient, and corrosion-resistant galley equipment for ships, offshore platforms, naval kitchens, cruise liners, merchant vessels, and floating kitchens. Based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, we serve both domestic and export markets with customized stainless steel solutions designed to meet the unique challenges of marine environments.

Our galley equipment is engineered with over 15 years of fabrication and design experience, combining food-grade materials, marine-compliant engineering, and compact functionality — ensuring efficient operations even in the most confined and high-vibration settings.

### ✅ Our Galley Equipment Product Range Includes:
- Compact Cooking Ranges (Electric/Gas)
- Marine-Grade Ovens & Griddles
- Marine Refrigerators & Freezers
- SS Work Tables with Splash Guards & Marine Edging
- Sink Units with Foot/Elbow Operated Faucets
- Overhead Storage & Wall Shelves
- Bulkhead-Mounted Cabinets
- Hot Bain Maries & Cold Bain Maries
- Deep Fryers with Safety Locks & Insulation
- Hood Systems with Spark Arrestors
- Tandoors & Food Warmers (marine compatible)
- Food Service Trolleys & Insulated Transport Units
- Marine Dishwash Stations & Racks

Each unit is purpose-built to withstand marine conditions — including moisture, motion, limited space, and electrical/gas constraints — without compromising performance, safety, or hygiene.

### 🔧 Technical & Construction Parameters
#### Material & Construction
- SS 316 or SS 304 stainless steel for superior corrosion resistance
- Reinforced frames for vibration resistance
- Fully welded joints, sealed corners, smooth finish for hygiene

#### Compact & Modular Design
- Modular dimensions and space-saving layouts
- Foldable shelves, corner units, under-counter storage
- Ergonomic workflow alignment

#### Safety & Stability Features
- Anti-tilt frames, lockable casters, non-slip feet
- Rounded corners, recessed handles
- Flame arrestors, spark protection, overheat control
- Marine-compliant electrical components

#### Hygiene & Maintenance
- International marine food hygiene standards
- Smooth surfaces, drain outlets, removable trays
- Marine-edge tops to prevent spillage

### ⚓ Applications
- Merchant Navy & Offshore Vessels
- Cargo Ships & Tankers
- Oil Rigs & Drilling Platforms
- Passenger Ships & Cruise Liners
- Patrol Boats & Naval Kitchens
- Floating Restaurants & Barges

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Built to vessel deck layout and specifications
- Electric or gas variants with marine-safe components
- Under-counter, wall-mounted, bulkhead-fit, or free-standing options
- IMO, SOLAS, and defense procurement compliance

### 🌍 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Galley Equipment?
✔ Mumbai-based with proximity to major ports  
✔ 15+ years of marine stainless steel expertise  
✔ Fully custom-built offshore kitchen solutions  
✔ Export-grade packaging & marine hardware  
✔ Proven track record with defense, merchant, and offshore clients  

### 📦 Logistics, Packaging & Export
- Foam wrap + wooden crate + anti-corrosion coating
- Knock-down shipping option for tight vessel access
- Marine-compliant documentation & labeling

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Remote or on-site installation guidance
- Spare parts and repair services available
- AMC packages for fleet kitchens

**Plan Your Galley With Experts**  
📩 Share your deck layout or specs  
📐 Get a FREE galley planning consultation  
🛠️ OEM & defense procurement support available`,

        '/Galley Equipment.jpeg',
        'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556912172-45b7abe8b7e1?w=800&h=600&fit=crop&auto=format',
        'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909212-d46053a1e834?w=800&h=600&fit=crop&auto=format'
      ],

    {
      id: 302,
      name: 'Induction Hot Plate',
      slug: 'induction-hot-plate',
      image: '/Induction Hot Plate.webp',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Smart, safe, and energy-efficient commercial induction hot plate with precision temperature control, built for high-performance, flameless cooking in professional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `**Induction Hot Plate – Smart. Safe. Energy-Efficient. Precision Cooking for Modern Kitchens.**

Upgrade to next-generation cooking with the Induction Hot Plate from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — your trusted partner in advanced commercial kitchen solutions. Designed for fast, flameless, and controlled cooking, our induction hot plates are ideal for restaurants, cloud kitchens, hotel buffet lines, institutional setups, and all-electric kitchen environments.

Built with commercial-grade components and intelligent controls, this appliance ensures energy efficiency, clean operation, and precision heating — while keeping your kitchen cooler, safer, and easier to manage.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits

**Advanced Induction Technology**  
- Rapid heat generation using electromagnetic coils.  
- Instant temperature response and precise control settings.  
- 90% heat transfer efficiency, reducing energy loss compared to gas or electric plates.  

**Heavy-Duty Construction**  
- SS 304-grade stainless steel outer body.  
- Smooth ceramic glass top resistant to scratches, heat, and heavy cookware.  
- Built for 24/7 commercial operation, unlike domestic units.  

**Digital Temperature & Timer Controls**  
- Easy-to-use touch panel or knob-based interface.  
- Multiple power levels and auto shut-off timer.  
- LED display for temperature, wattage, and time monitoring.  

**Safe & Hygienic Operation**  
- No open flame or exposed heating elements.  
- Activates only when compatible cookware is detected.  
- Cool-to-touch surface and overheat protection.  

**Energy & Space Efficient**  
- Ideal for kitchens with no-gas policies.  
- Compact tabletop design fits into tight counters or buffet lines.  
- Helps maintain cooler kitchen environments.  

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature            | Specification |
|--------------------|--------------|
| Body Material      | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Top Surface        | Tempered Ceramic Glass (Black) |
| Power Ratings      | 2 kW, 3 kW, 5 kW, 8 kW (customizable) |
| Power Control      | 10-step or digital variable control |
| Temperature Range  | 60°C to 280°C |
| Controls           | Touch or Manual Dial |
| Timer Function     | 0–180 minutes or Continuous Mode |
| Power Source       | 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase |
| Mounting           | Tabletop / Built-in Countertop |
| Safety Features    | Auto Shut-Off, Overheat Cutoff, Cookware Detection |
| Certifications     | CE / BIS / ISO Compliant |

### 🍳 Applications
- Hotels & Restaurants – Controlled cooking & safe buffet heating  
- Cafés & Cloud Kitchens – Compact plug-and-play solution  
- Hospital & Corporate Canteens – Fire-safe preparation  
- Live Cooking Stations – Silent, smoke-free display cooking  
- Food Courts & Malls – No-gas compliance  
- Marine, Aviation & Rail Kitchens – Shockproof, flame-free  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Single or double coil zones  
- Integrated timer & auto-cook programs  
- Built-in under-shelves, drawers, or mobile trolleys  
- Voltage customization for export markets  
- OEM branding for hotels, franchises, exporters  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Induction Hot Plate?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Commercial-grade build, not domestic retrofits  
✔ SS 304 Food-grade Construction  
✔ CE-Compliant Precision Controls  
✔ Fire-safe & Eco-friendly  
✔ PAN India & Export-ready Support  

### 📦 After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty on electrical components  
- Installation guidance & setup support  
- Spare parts availability  
- Troubleshooting assistance  
- PAN India service network`,

      images: [

    {
      id: 303,
      name: 'Induction Deep Fryer',
      slug: 'induction-deep-fryer',
      image: '/Induction  Deep Fryer.jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Fast, safe, and energy-efficient commercial frying powered by induction technology — ideal for compact, flame-free, and high-output kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Upgrade your commercial kitchen with the modern, eco-efficient, and high-performance Induction Deep Fryer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, Maharashtra. Designed for safety, speed, and precise temperature control, this fryer eliminates the need for gas lines and open flames — making it ideal for indoor kitchens, malls, cloud kitchens, food trucks, and fire-restricted environments.

Our electric induction fryer combines smart technology with stainless steel construction and heavy-duty performance, ensuring faster recovery times, cleaner operation, and consistent frying output — all while reducing your energy footprint.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Induction Heating Technology** – Instant heat transfer through electromagnetic induction. Faster oil heating and temperature recovery compared to conventional fryers, with minimal energy loss and up to 30% more efficiency.
- **Precision Temperature Control** – Digital or analog thermostatic control for precise oil regulation (60°C to 200°C). Auto shut-off prevents overheating.
- **Compact & Hygienic Stainless Steel Design** – Full SS 304-grade body, fry tank, and lid with removable parts for easy cleaning.
- **Safe Operation** – No open flame, overheat protection, safety cut-off, indicator lights, and cool-to-touch exterior.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification                                      |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| Body Material        | Stainless Steel SS 304                             |
| Heating Type         | Electromagnetic Induction                          |
| Fryer Capacity       | 6L, 8L, 12L or Custom                              |
| Power Supply         | 230V / 50Hz – Single Phase                         |
| Power Rating         | 3 kW to 5 kW (model-based)                         |
| Temperature Range    | 60°C to 200°C                                      |
| Control Panel        | Digital Thermostat / Manual Dial                   |
| Oil Tank Type        | Removable, with cold zone                          |
| Safety Features      | Overheat Cut-off, Anti-Slip Feet, Cool Handle      |
| Mounting Type        | Countertop or Built-in                             |
| Optional Add-ons     | Twin basket, oil drain valve, splash guard         |

### 🍟 Ideal For
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery Kitchens
- Malls, Food Courts & Airport Kitchens
- Food Trucks & Outdoor Catering
- QSR Chains & Takeaway Counters
- Electric-only Restaurant & Hotel Kitchens
- Hospitals, Corporate Canteens & Educational Institutions

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Tank size based on daily volume
- Single or dual basket configuration
- Built-in oil filtration system (optional)
- Digital touch screen or analog dial
- Customized wattage for electrical conditions

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Induction Deep Fryer?
✔ Safe, Gas-Free Operation  
✔ Fast Recovery Time for Continuous Frying  
✔ Energy-Efficient Heating – Lower Operating Costs  
✔ Stainless Steel, Food-Grade Construction  
✔ Low Maintenance Design  
✔ Ideal for Compact & Flame-Free Kitchens  
✔ Backed by 15+ Years of Engineering Expertise  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance & wiring recommendations
- Warranty on control panel & heating coil
- Quick access to spare parts
- PAN India service support

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-lined protective packaging
- Export-compliant packing for overseas shipping
- Quick dispatch from Mumbai, Maharashtra`,
