    {
      id: 304,
      name: 'Galley Hot Plate',
      slug: 'galley-hot-plate',
      image: '/Galley Hot Plate.jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Compact, safe, and energy-efficient electric cooking for marine, modular, and mobile kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Galley Hot Plate from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a specialized flat-top cooking appliance designed for space-constrained, high-demand environments such as ship galleys, offshore kitchens, defense catering units, and modular food prep areas. Built to withstand marine conditions and heavy-duty use, this unit provides reliable and energy-efficient surface cooking without the need for open flames or bulky gas connections.

With over 15 years of engineering expertise, SAG Engineering offers precision-built, rugged galley equipment that meets the highest standards of safety, hygiene, and performance — proudly manufactured in India.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Marine-Grade Construction** – Fabricated from SS 304 or SS 316 stainless steel, resistant to salt, humidity, and corrosion. Heavy-gauge structure with welded edges and reinforced frame ensures long-lasting durability even in moving vessels.
- **Electric Hot Plate Technology** – Cast iron heating plates or solid MS griddle surface for uniform heating. Single, double, or four-plate configurations. Thermostatic control 50°C–300°C.
- **Space-Saving Galley Design** – Compact, low-profile tabletop or integrated counter units. Optional splash guards and storage below.
- **Safe, Clean, Flame-Free Operation** – Fully electric, no open flame. Heat-insulated handles, non-slip feet, and indicator lights ensure safe operation.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature              | Specification                                      |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| Body Material        | SS 304 / SS 316 Stainless Steel                    |
| Heating Surface      | Cast Iron or MS Solid Plate                         |
| Number of Hot Plates | 1 / 2 / 4 (as required)                            |
| Mounting             | Tabletop / Fixed Galley Counter                     |
| Power Supply         | 230V / 415V AC, Single / Three Phase               |
| Temperature Control  | Manual or Thermostatic                              |
| Heating Range        | 50°C to 300°C                                      |
| Protection           | Overheat Cut-off / Safety Fuse                      |
| Certifications       | CE / Marine Grade (On Request)                      |
| Optional Accessories | Splash Guard, Oven Base, Storage Cabinet, Anti-Spill Rims |

### 🛳️ Applications
- Marine Ship Kitchens & Cargo Vessel Galleys
- Offshore Oil & Gas Rigs
- Naval & Coast Guard Kitchens
- Defense Modular Kitchens & Mobile Catering Units
- Container-Based or Tent-Based Field Kitchens
- Research Vessel Kitchens & Expedition Setups
- Emergency Response & Relief Kitchen Units

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Hot plate size, number, and plate type  
- Enclosure compatibility with modular counters  
- 316 stainless steel for salt-heavy marine environments  
- Lockable or non-skid feet for vessel movement  
- Integration with marine power systems and voltage tolerances  
- Shock absorbers and anti-vibration reinforcements  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Galley Hot Plate?
✔ Marine & modular kitchen-specialized design  
✔ Space-efficient & energy-saving operation  
✔ Fully electric — no flame, no fumes, no risk  
✔ Durable, low-maintenance, and easy-to-clean  
✔ Trusted by maritime, defense & commercial fleets  
✔ Export-ready infrastructure  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation, integration, and layout planning assistance  
- 1-year warranty on heating components and electricals  
- Spare parts and technical support PAN India  
- Export documentation and marine packaging available  

### 📦 Delivery & Packaging
- Marine-grade sealed packaging with foam & plywood crate  
- Optional IP-rated enclosures or shock-proof shipping crates  
- Fast delivery across India and selected export destinations  

📞 Contact Us for a Custom Quote  
Custom configurations for marine and defense orders available. Email your galley layout for design assistance. International buyers welcome.`,

      shortDescription: 'Rapid heating, hygienic storage, and hassle-free operation for commercial kitchens and hospitality setups.',
      longDescription: `Ensure uninterrupted hot water supply in your commercial kitchen, hospitality setup, or food service operation with the high-performance Water Boiler from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for heavy-duty use and built from premium food-grade stainless steel, our water boilers deliver consistent temperature control, energy efficiency, and long service life — making them ideal for hotels, canteens, caterers, tea stalls, and industrial kitchens.

Whether you're preparing large volumes of tea or need instant hot water for cooking or cleaning, SAG Engineering’s water boilers are engineered to serve your needs reliably, day after day.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Fast & Efficient Heating** – High-performance immersion heating elements for rapid boiling. Optional dual-element design for energy control in low- and high-load conditions.
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304-grade body, inner tank, and lid for hygiene, rust-resistance, and durability. Fully welded joints with mirror or satin finish for easy cleaning.
- **Safe & User-Friendly Design** – Thermostat control with auto cut-off, cool-touch handles, non-drip tap, indicator lights, and built-in pressure release for safety.
- **Energy Efficient & Low Maintenance** – Thermal insulation for energy conservation, fast heat recovery, and easy access to components for maintenance.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Specification                                      |
|-----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| Body Material          | SS 304 Stainless Steel                             |
| Capacity Options       | 10L, 20L, 30L, 40L, 60L, 100L or Custom          |
| Heating Element        | Immersion-type, Copper/SS (ISI marked)            |
| Power Supply           | 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase             |
| Temperature Range      | 30°C to 100°C                                     |
| Control Type           | Thermostat with Auto Cut-Off                        |
| Dispensing Mechanism   | Manual Tap or Push Lever Tap                        |
| Mounting Type          | Countertop / Floor-Standing                         |
| Insulation             | PUF / Glass wool (Optional)                         |
| Finish                 | Matt / Mirror SS finish                             |

### 💼 Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Banquets  
- Canteens & Mess Kitchens  
- Cafés & Tea Stalls  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Kitchens  
- Industrial Kitchens  
- Corporate Pantries  
- Catering Units & Events  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom tank capacities based on consumption  
- Electric or LPG models (optional hybrid)  
- Double jacketed insulation for energy conservation  
- Sight glass indicator for water level monitoring  
- Drip tray stand or base cabinet mounting  
- Multi-tap versions for high-traffic beverage counters  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Water Boiler?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai by trusted industry experts  
✔ Food-grade SS construction ensures hygiene & durability  
✔ Rapid boiling and efficient heating  
✔ Low energy consumption & high output

      shortDescription: 'Smart storage solution for commercial kitchens and labs, optimized for space, hygiene, and durability.',
      longDescription: `The Wall Mounted Cabinet by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is the perfect storage solution for commercial kitchens, laboratories, medical facilities, and food service establishments where space, cleanliness, and durability are top priorities. Designed for wall installation to save valuable floor space, these stainless steel cabinets offer secure, hygienic, and easily accessible storage for utensils, ingredients, equipment, cleaning supplies, or medical instruments.

Crafted using premium SS 304 stainless steel, our wall-mounted cabinets combine strength, safety, and style. With a range of sizes and customization options available, SAG Engineering delivers solutions that integrate seamlessly into your workspace.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Space-Saving Design** – Mounted on walls to free floor space, ideal for compact and high-traffic areas. Hinged or sliding doors for accessibility.
- **High-Quality Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304 grade, corrosion-resistant, easy to clean, with polished or matt finish.
- **Safe & Secure Storage** – Strong shelves for heavy items, optional lockable doors, reinforced hinges and handles.
- **Hygienic & Easy Maintenance** – Rounded edges, smooth surfaces, and stainless steel resist bacterial growth.
- **Customizable Options** – Multiple lengths, depths, doors, adjustable shelves, acrylic/glass inserts on request.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature             | Specification                                       |
|---------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| Material            | SS 304 Stainless Steel (Food Grade)               |
| Finish              | Matt or Mirror Polish                               |
| Mounting Type       | Wall Mounted with Heavy-Duty Brackets              |
| Door Options        | Hinged / Sliding / Lockable / Open                |
| No. of Shelves      | 1, 2 or 3 (adjustable or fixed)                  |
| Available Lengths   | 2 ft to 6 ft (custom sizes on request)           |
| Depth Options       | 12", 15", 18" or customized                       |
| Glass Door Option   | Transparent Acrylic / Tempered Glass (Optional)  |
| Load Capacity       | 30–50 kg per shelf (based on bracket & wall type)|

### 🏭 Applications & Use Cases
- Commercial Kitchens – Utensils, ingredients, cleaning supplies  
- Restaurants & Hotels – Prep areas, service zones, dishwashing sections  
- Cafeterias & Canteens – Organized food handling  
- Medical Labs & Clinics – Sterile instrument and sample storage  
- Pharmaceutical Facilities – Clean, secure equipment storage  
- Bakery & Dairy Units – Dry storage of ingredients or trays  
- Industrial Workstations – Tool and component storage above workbenches  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom length, height, and depth  
- Sliding or swing doors  
- Lockable doors or open shelves  
- Reinforced brackets for high-weight storage  
- Logos or labels for bulk institutional orders  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Wall Mounted Cabinet?
✔ Fabricated in Mumbai with premium SS 304  
✔ Precision welding and polished finish  
✔ Compact, durable, and hygienic  
✔ Built to last in demanding environments  
✔ PAN India delivery & export-ready packaging  
✔ 15+ years of industry expertise

- Suitable for bulk institutional and export orders  
- Prompt dispatch from Mumbai to India & abroad

      longDescription: `Optimize your commercial kitchen space with the Work Preparation Table with Cabinet from SAG Engineering Products — a versatile and essential addition for any food preparation area. Built from high-quality stainless steel, this unit serves a dual purpose: providing a robust surface for prep work and secure, enclosed storage underneath.

Perfectly suited for restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, food courts, canteens, and bakery setups, this work table helps keep your kitchen organized, efficient, and hygienic — all while standing up to the daily demands of a busy foodservice environment.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304-grade, rust-proof, stain-resistant, hygienic, and durable.
- **Spacious Worktop Surface** – Smooth, food-grade flat worktop for cutting, mixing, assembling, and plating. Optional backsplash available.
- **Enclosed Cabinet Storage** – Built-in cabinet with swing doors, sliding doors, or drawers to protect utensils, ingredients, and tools.
- **Adjustable Feet or Caster Wheels** – Ensures stability on uneven floors; optional wheels for mobility.
- **Customizable Workflow** – Choose size, height, worktop thickness, door type, and cabinet layout. Shelves, integrated sinks, GN pan slots, or dustbin slots available on request.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| Material            | SS 304 (Optional: SS 202 for budget models)        |

| Finish              | Satin / Matt                                        |
| Welding             | Argon welded with smooth, easy-to-clean joints      |

### 🏭 Ideal For
- Commercial Kitchens (Hotels, Restaurants, Canteens)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ 15+ Years of Experience in Stainless Steel Kitchen Fabrication

      longDescription: `Streamline your cooking operations and enhance ingredient handling with the Masala Trolley from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a practical and durable storage solution engineered for the fast-paced needs of commercial kitchens. Whether you operate a hotel, restaurant, canteen, or catering unit, this trolley helps you store, transport, and access multiple spices and dry ingredients with ease, hygiene, and efficiency.

Crafted entirely from food-grade stainless steel, our masala trolley is designed to withstand daily kitchen wear and tear while maintaining high standards of cleanliness, mobility, and accessibility.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Hygienic SS Construction** – Made with SS 304-grade stainless steel, rust-proof, non-corrosive, and food-contact safe.
- **Multi-Compartment Design** – Multiple stainless steel containers or GN pans (6 to 12) with lids for aroma retention and hygiene.
- **Smooth Mobility** – Heavy-duty caster wheels, two with brakes, for easy and stable movement.
- **Efficient Organization** – Smart layout for easy visibility and access; optional labeling for fast identification.
- **Space-Saving and Customizable** – Compact footprint; customizable compartments, shelves, and size.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Material                | SS 304 Stainless Steel                                 |

| Number of Containers    | 6, 8, 10, 12 or as required                           |
| Container Type          | SS bowls, GN pans, or custom spice jars               |
| Wheels                  | 4 Caster Wheels (2 with locks)                        |
| Optional Features       | Handlebar, Label Slots, Bottom Shelf                  |
| Finish                  | Matt or Mirror Finish                                  |
| Mounting                | Mobile, with Anti-Vibration Locking                   |
| Warranty                | 1 Year Standard, Extended Options Available           |

### 🍛 Ideal For
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Restaurants  
- Catering Kitchens & Banquet Halls  
- Cloud Kitchens & Food Delivery Units  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Hospital, College & School Kitchens

### 🛠️ Customization Options

- Optional top shelf or handlebar  
- Custom layouts and bulk institutional orders  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Masala Trolley?

    {
      id: 309,
      name: 'Dough Mixer',
      slug: 'dough-mixer',
      image: '/Dough Mixer.webp',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty commercial dough mixer for hotels, bakeries, cloud kitchens, and food processing units, designed for hygiene, efficiency, and consistent output.',
      longDescription: `Simplify your kitchen operations and increase productivity with the high-performance Dough Mixer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for heavy-duty mixing applications, our dough mixer is ideal for hotels, restaurants, industrial canteens, bakeries, cloud kitchens, and food processing units that require uniform, large-batch dough preparation for chapatis, bread, pizza, puris, and other Indian or continental preparations.

Engineered with a powerful motor, food-grade materials, and robust construction, our dough mixer guarantees faster kneading, better consistency, and hygiene — all while minimizing manual labor and ensuring safe operation.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Motorized Mixing** – Industrial motor (0.5 HP to 3 HP) for continuous, high-torque operation; handles soft and stiff doughs with reduced mixing time.
- **Food-Grade Bowl & Arm** – SS 304 construction; bowl capacities 5 kg to 50 kg; tilting or fixed bowl design.
- **Efficient, Uniform Mixing** – Planetary or spiral motion ensures consistent dough texture and proper gluten formation.
- **Easy to Use & Maintain** – Simple control panel, On/Off switch, safety interlock, removable bowl, optional caster wheels.
- **Safe & Hygienic** – Overload protection, thermal cut-off, splash guard/lid; conforms to food safety standards.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Specification                                     |
|-----------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| Model Options         | 5kg / 10kg / 20kg / 30kg / 40kg / 50kg          |
| Material              | SS 304 for Bowl & Contact Parts                   |
| Motor Power           | 0.5 HP to 3 HP (Single/Three Phase)              |
| Bowl Type             | Fixed / Tilting                                   |
| Mixing Arm Motion     | Planetary / Spiral (model dependent)             |
| Drive Type            | Belt / Gear-driven                                |
| Control Panel         | Manual On/Off with Overload Protection           |
| Power Supply          | 230V / 415V AC                                   |
| Mounting              | Floor-Standing with Anti-Vibration Pads          |
| Optional Features     | Castor wheels, Timer, Safety lid, Emergency Stop |

### 🍞 Ideal Applications
- Hotels & Restaurants – Chapati, naan, paratha dough  
- Cloud Kitchens & Tiffin Services – Large-scale continuous operation  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens – Mass meal production  
- Bakeries & Cafés – Bread, pizza, bun, and cookie dough  
- Food Processing Units – Bulk mixing for packaged products  

### 🛠️ Customization Available
- Capacity, voltage, and power supply standards  
- Workflow preferences (tilting vs fixed bowl)  
- Mobility options (wheeled base or static)  
- Add-on features: timer, auto shut-off, SS safety covers  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Dough Mixer?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ years of expertise  
✔ Rugged SS construction for Indian and international kitchens  
✔ Energy-efficient, low-noise, and operator-friendly  
✔ Available in various capacities for all kitchen sizes  
✔ Export-ready with heavy-duty packaging  
✔ Reliable after-sales service, spare parts, and support PAN India  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Warranty on motor and electricals  
- Installation guidance and operational demo  
- Spare parts availability  
- Prompt technical support  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Secure, safe crating for domestic and international shipping  
- Foam and wooden box packaging options  
- Fast PAN India dispatch

    {
      id: 310,
      name: 'Spiral Mixer',
      slug: 'spiral-mixer',
      image: '/Spiral Mixer.jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity commercial spiral mixer for bakeries, pizzerias, hotels, and industrial kitchens, delivering consistent, elastic dough with minimal effort.',
      longDescription: `The Spiral Mixer from SAG Engineering Products is an advanced, high-capacity dough mixing solution engineered for speed, consistency, and durability. Designed to handle a wide range of soft-to-medium doughs, this mixer is ideal for bakeries, pizzerias, restaurants, hotels, and institutional kitchens looking to optimize dough preparation in both quality and quantity.

Manufactured at our Mumbai facility, the SAG Spiral Mixer is built to industrial standards, offering rugged performance, quiet operation, and minimal maintenance, making it ideal for commercial food production environments.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Spiral Mixing Technology** – Spiral-shaped agitator rotates dough against the bowl’s circular motion, producing softer, smoother, and more elastic dough.
- **High-Performance Motor** – Powerful, energy-efficient motor with two-speed settings for gentle blending or intense kneading.
- **Heavy-Duty Construction** – SS 304 bowl, spiral arm, and dough breaker bar; powder-coated or SS body for durability and hygiene.
- **User-Friendly Control Panel** – Digital or manual interface with timers, speed controls, emergency stop, and overload protection.
- **Low Noise & Vibration** – Insulated housing and anti-vibration feet ensure quiet and stable operation.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification         | Detail                                          |
|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------|
| Capacity              | 20, 30, 50, 80, 100 kg dough                  |
| Bowl Volume           | 22L – 120L (model dependent)                  |
| Body Material         | SS / Powder-Coated Steel                        |
| Bowl, Arm & Shaft     | SS 304 Food-Grade                               |
| Motor Power           | 1.5 HP – 5 HP (model dependent)                |
| Speed                 | Two-speed or variable                            |
| Voltage               | 230V / 415V – Single/Three Phase               |
| Control Type          | Manual / Digital with Timer                     |
| Timer Function        | Yes – Programmable                              |
| Noise Level           | < 65 dB                                        |
| Safety Features       | Bowl Guard, Emergency Stop, Overload Cutoff    |
| Mounting              | Floor-standing with anti-slip feet             |

### 🧁 Applications & Industries
- Commercial Bakeries – Bread, bun, pav production  
- Pizza Chains & QSRs – Pizza base dough  
- Restaurants & Hotels – Daily fresh dough for naan, kulcha, rolls  
- Industrial Kitchens & Mess Halls – Bulk dough prep  
- Institutional & Catering Kitchens – High-volume, hygienic operation  
- Cloud Kitchens – Compact, energy-efficient daily prep  

### 🛠️ Customization Options

- Digital timer or touch panel interface  
- Optional bowl-lift or tilting bowl  
- Fully SS body option for hygiene-critical environments  
- Optional caster wheels for mobility  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Spiral Mixer?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Expertise

✔ Trusted by bakeries, QSR brands, and hotels

    {
      id: 311,
      name: 'Garbage Disploser Unit (GDU)',
      slug: 'garbage-disploser-unit-gdu',
      image: '/Garbage Disploser Unit (GDU).jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade Garbage Disposer Unit (GDU) for hygienic, efficient food waste disposal in hotels, restaurants, hospitals, and industrial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Garbage Disposer Unit (GDU) from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is designed to eliminate food waste quickly, safely, and cleanly — right at the source. Ideal for busy hotels, restaurants, canteens, hospitals, and food processing units, our heavy-duty GDUs ensure clog-free drainage, improved sanitation, and reduced manual labor.

### ✅ Key Features & Advantages
- **Efficient Food Waste Management** – Grinds vegetable peels, small bones, fruit rinds, leftovers, and other organic waste into fine slurry. Prevents drain blockages, reduces bin overflows, and limits odors.
- **Heavy-Duty Motor & Grinding System** – Induction motor for continuous commercial use. Multi-stage stainless steel blades and impellers. Overload protection and safety cut-off.
- **Durable, Hygienic Construction** – SS 304-grade stainless steel body, rust-proof and food-grade. Enclosed design prevents splashback. Vibration-damped system for quiet operation.
- **Easy to Operate & Maintain** – Push-button or foot-operated switch. Removable grinding chamber lid or inlet screen. Self-cleaning with water flow during use.
- **Environmentally Responsible** – Converts biodegradable scraps into slurry suitable for drainage or composting. Supports compliance with hygiene and waste disposal norms.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter               | Specification                                    |
|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Body Material           | SS 304 Stainless Steel                          |
| Motor Power             | 0.5 HP / 1 HP / 2 HP / 3 HP (model dependent) |
| Voltage Supply          | 230V / 415V AC – Single/Three Phase            |
| Grinder Chamber         | Stainless Steel with multi-stage blades        |
| Feed Type               | Manual feed (top inlet)                         |
| Operation Mode          | Push button / Foot switch / Sensor-based       |
| Mounting Type           | Under-sink / Floor-mounted                      |
| Water Inlet Connection  | ½" to ¾" BSP thread                             |
| Drain Outlet            | 2" to 3" diameter (custom fit)                 |
| Noise Level             | < 60–70 dB (with enclosure)                    |
| Optional Features       | Sound insulation, timer switch, auto-reverse motor |

### 🏭 Applications
- Hotels & Resorts  
- Restaurants & Cloud Kitchens  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Kitchens  
- Industrial, Educational, and Corporate Canteens  
- Food Courts & QSR Chains  
- Marine & Offshore Galleys  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Motor capacity as per daily waste volume  
- Integrated water spray for chamber flushing  
- Sound-insulated covers for open kitchens  
- Automatic start-stop sensors  
- SS food scrap collector tray  
- HACCP/ISO/Green certification compliant designs  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s GDU?
✔ Built in Mumbai with 15+ years of engineering excellence  
✔ Heavy-duty commercial kitchen design  
✔ Stainless steel, hygienic, corrosion-resistant  
✔ Custom-built sizes and configurations  
✔ Quiet, reliable, energy-efficient operation  
✔ PAN India delivery & export-ready

      longDescription: `The Food Warmer (Bain Marie) from SAG Engineering Products keeps your food hot, fresh, and ready for service. Perfect for buffets, cafeterias, canteens, hotels, and catering setups, our Bain Marie units are built for durability, efficiency, and flawless temperature maintenance.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Consistent Temperature Control** – Indirect heating ensures gentle warming without overcooking. Thermostatic control (electric) or manual valve (gas) available.
- **High-Grade Stainless Steel Build** – SS 304 body for hygiene, corrosion resistance, and food safety. Fully welded joints with smooth, rounded corners.
- **GN Pan Compatibility** – Supports standard Gastronorm pans (1/1, 1/2, 1/3, etc.) with configurable layout for multiple dishes.
- **Heating Source Options** – Electric (immersion-type elements) or Gas (concealed burners). Optional dry or wet heating.
- **Design Variants** – Countertop or floor-standing models, hot + cold combination counters on request.
- **User-Friendly Design** – Heat-insulated knobs, water inlet/drain valves, optional sneeze guards, tray slides, and overhead lighting.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

| Material                | SS 304 body & inner lining                       |

| Mounting Options        | Tabletop / Floor standing                        |
| Additional Options      | Under-shelves, tray slides, sneeze guard, wheels|
| Finish                  | Matt / Mirror polish                             |

### 🍛 Ideal For
- Hotels & Restaurant Buffets  
- Corporate & Industrial Canteens  
- QSR Chains & Self-Service Counters

      shortDescription: 'Marine-grade electric griddle plate for naval galleys, designed for durability, hygiene, and reliable cooking at sea.',
      longDescription: `The Griddle Plate for Navy by SAG Engineering Products is a specially designed marine-grade flat-top cooking solution built for naval kitchens and offshore environments. Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, it meets strict safety, corrosion-resistance, and operational standards required onboard vessels.

### ✅ Key Features & Advantages
- **Marine-Grade Construction** – SS 316L stainless steel resists saltwater corrosion; welded and sealed joints withstand movement and vibration.
- **Heavy-Duty Cooking Surface** – 10–16 mm polished MS or optional SS griddle plate for even heat distribution and high durability.
- **Electric Heating for Marine Safety** – Embedded electric elements with thermostatic control; minimizes open flame risks onboard.
- **Compact & Space-Efficient Design** – Custom-built for galley layouts; optional undercounter storage or wall-mount configuration.
- **Easy to Clean & Hygienic** – Smooth surface with integrated grease collection tray; food-grade SS resists stains and bacteria.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature            | Specification                                   |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Body Material      | SS 316L (Marine Grade Stainless Steel)         |
| Griddle Plate      | Polished Mild Steel / Optional SS 304          |
| Plate Thickness    | 10–16 mm                                        |
| Heating Source     | Embedded Electric Heating Elements              |
| Power Supply       | 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase          |
| Temperature Range  | 50°C – 300°C                                    |
| Control System     | Manual Thermostat with Safety Cut-off          |
| Mounting Options   | Tabletop, Wall-Mount, Floor Standing           |
| Finish             | Matt Finish with Rounded Corners               |
| Grease Trap        | Yes, Removable Collection Tray                 |
| Compliance         | IP-rated Electricals, Marine-grade cabling    |

### ⚓ Ideal Applications
- Naval Ship Galleys  
- Coast Guard Vessels  
- Marine Catering Units  
- Oil & Gas Offshore Platforms  
- Submarine Kitchens  
- Merchant Navy & Cargo Ships  

### 🛠️ Customization Capabilities
- Power configuration (single/three phase, voltage range)  
- Size and mounting orientation  
- Splash guard for rolling sea conditions  
- Fire safety enhancements  
- Integration with galley systems  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ 15+ Years Experience in commercial and marine kitchen fabrication  
✔ Located in Mumbai, Maharashtra – convenient for shipyard access  
✔ Specialized in marine-grade SS products  
✔ Fully customizable based on vessel layout and specifications  
✔ IP-rated, shockproof & corrosion-resistant electricals

### 🛎️ Support & Service

      shortDescription: 'Precision dough ball making machine for commercial kitchens, delivering uniform size, hygiene, and high-speed output.',
      longDescription: `Take your roti, chapati, and paratha production to the next level with the Dough Ball Making Machine from SAG Engineering Products, a trusted Mumbai-based manufacturer. Engineered for uniform dough balls, high output speed, and minimal manual labor, it ensures consistent food quality in bulk production.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Uniform Size & Weight** – Produces perfectly round dough balls; adjustable size from 20g to 60g.
- **High-Speed Output** – Capable of 1,500 – 3,000 dough balls per hour, supporting uninterrupted bulk production.
- **Hygienic SS Construction** – Made from food-grade SS 304; removable trays and covers for easy cleaning.
- **User-Friendly Operation** – Simple touch-button or manual switch operation; safety cover and clear hopper.
- **Compact & Space-Saving** – Tabletop or optional trolley base; ideal for compact kitchens.
- **Low Maintenance & Durable** – Robust mechanical design; minimal moving parts for long-term performance.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter              | Specification                               |
|------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| Construction Material   | SS 304 (Food Grade)                         |
| Output Capacity         | 1,500 – 3,000 dough balls/hour              |
| Dough Ball Weight Range | 20g to 60g (Adjustable)                     |
| Power Supply            | 230V AC / 50 Hz, Single Phase               |
| Motor Rating            | 0.5 HP to 1 HP                              |
| Operation Mode          | Semi-automatic / Fully automatic            |
| Hopper Capacity         | 5 kg – 10 kg                                |
| Machine Dimensions      | Customizable as per requirement             |
| Finish                  | Matt finish stainless steel                 |
| Mounting                | Tabletop or Stand-mounted                   |
| Optional Accessories    | Dough kneading unit, trolley stand, PLC touchscreen (advanced model) |

### 🍽️ Applications & Suitable For
- Hotels & Commercial Kitchens  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Mid-Day Meal Schemes & Hostels  
- Cloud Kitchens & Tiffin Centers  
- Chapati Lines & Food Processing Units

- Defense Mess & Government Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Adjustable ball sizes via selector knob or touch panel  
- Dough consistency optimization based on flour quality  
- Custom machine dimensions based on kitchen space  
- Integration with automatic chapati machines or conveyors

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ 15+ Years of Experience in Commercial Kitchen Equipment

      id: 315,
      name: 'Ship Galley Chapati Making Machine',
      slug: 'ship-galley-chapati-making-machine',
      image: '/Ship Galley Chapati Making Machine.jpg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Compact, rugged, marine-ready chapati making machine designed for seamless roti production at sea with high hygiene and efficiency.',
      longDescription: `SAG Engineering Products — based in Mumbai, Maharashtra — presents the Ship Galley Chapati Making Machine, engineered for marine kitchens, offshore galleys, and shipboard food facilities. Designed to handle the demanding conditions at sea, it delivers consistent, high-speed chapati (roti) production with minimal manual effort and maximum hygiene.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Compact Design for Galley Integration** – Space-saving, lightweight, and mountable on counters or work tables with anti-vibration feet.
- **Marine-Grade Stainless Steel Construction** – Built from SS 304/316, corrosion-resistant, rounded edges, welded joints, and water-resistant electrical components.
- **Automatic & Semi-Automatic Options** – Semi-automatic (pressing + baking) and fully automatic (dough ball to chapati); produces 500–1000 chapatis/hour.
- **Energy Efficient Operation** – Low power consumption electric or optional gas (LPG/PNG) models with thermostatic heat control.
- **User-Friendly Controls** – Control panel with temperature, conveyor speed, and safety indicators; minimal operator training required.
- **Hygienic & Safe** – Food-grade surfaces, PTFE-coated plates (premium models), emergency stop button, safety covers, optional auto shut-off.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter              | Specification                               |
|------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| Material               | SS 304/316 Marine Grade                     |
| Production Capacity    | 500 – 1000 Chapatis/hour                     |
| Chapati Size           | 4" to 8" Diameter (Adjustable)             |
| Thickness Range        | 1.5 mm to 3 mm                               |
| Power Supply           | 230V / 415V AC (Single/Three Phase)        |
| Energy Consumption     | 3 to 6 kW                                   |
| Operation Type         | Semi-Automatic / Fully Automatic            |
| Mounting Type          | Table-top / Galley-integrated               |
| Dimensions             | Custom based on available space             |
| Weight                 | Lightweight marine model < 150 kg           |
| Baking Method          | Electric or Gas (LPG/PNG)                   |
| Optional Features      | Digital counters, auto shut-off, conveyor cooling fans |

### 🛥️ Built Specifically for Marine Use
- Salt air and moisture-resistant design  
- Shock-proof, vibration-resistant base  
- Rounded edges for safety during ship movement  
- Compact footprint for galley and vessel kitchens  
- Reliable operation even with low-voltage ship power systems  

### 🎯 Ideal Applications
- Merchant Ships & Cargo Vessels  
- Cruise Liners & Passenger Ships  
- Navy Vessels & Coast Guard Ships  
- Offshore Oil Rigs & Supply Boats  
- Marine Canteens & Floating Restaurants  
- Offshore Catering Services  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Model sizing based on space and power constraints

- Voltage/frequency compatibility with marine electrical standards  
- Choice between electric or gas heating units  
- Optional dust covers, conveyor guides, and exhausts  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ 15+ years of stainless steel and food machinery manufacturing  
✔ Specialized in galley and shipboard equipment  
✔ Heavy-duty, compact, and salt-resistant design  
✔ Energy-efficient, easy to operate, and hygienic  
✔ Built for Indian & global marine requirements

      longDescription: `Enhance your food preparation process with the Vegetable Cutting Machine from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for heavy-duty commercial use, it simplifies and accelerates cutting, slicing, chopping, shredding, and dicing vegetables — ensuring uniformity, hygiene, and reduced manual labor.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Multi-Cutting Capability** – Slices, cubes, julienne, chips, shredding, and dicing with interchangeable stainless steel blades/discs.
- **High Output with Consistent Quality** – Processes 100–500 kg/hr depending on model; ensures uniform cutting for even cooking and presentation.
- **Food-Grade & Durable Construction** – Made of SS 304-grade stainless steel, corrosion-resistant, easy to clean, with rugged, stable base.
- **Operator-Friendly Design** – Push-feed system with protective covers, low-noise motor, overload protector, and safety switch.
- **Compact & Space-Saving** – Table-top or floor-standing models, optional trolley base with wheels for mobility.

    {
      id: 317,
      name: 'Pulveriser',
      slug: 'pulveriser',
      image: '/Pulveriser.jpeg',
      category: 'galley-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance pulveriser for commercial kitchens, spice units, and food processing, built with durable stainless steel for consistent grinding of dry and semi-wet ingredients.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we manufacture high-performance Pulverisers designed for commercial kitchens, spice units, food processing businesses, and industrial setups. Built using durable stainless steel and powered by heavy-duty motors, our pulverisers grind a wide range of ingredients with consistent output and minimal maintenance.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Grinding Power** – High-torque motors (1 HP to 10 HP) for fast, uniform pulverizing of spices, grains, lentils, sugar, turmeric, chili, herbs, cereals, besan, and more.
- **Stainless Steel Body** – SS 304/316 construction ensures hygiene, food safety, corrosion resistance, and easy maintenance.
- **User-Friendly Operation** – Simple on/off controls with safety locks, hopper-fed feeding, and optional fine mesh sieves for customized output.
- **Low Noise & Vibration** – Well-balanced rotor and insulated base reduce noise and vibration.
- **Energy Efficient & Safe** – Maximum output with minimal energy consumption, thermal overload protection, dust-proof motor housing, and sealed bearings.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter              | Specification                         |
|------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| Body Material           | SS 304 / SS 316                        |
| Motor Capacity          | 1 HP to 10 HP                           |
| Grinding Capacity       | 10 kg/hr to 100 kg/hr (model-dependent)|
| Power Source            | Electric – 230V / 415V AC              |
| Feed System             | Hopper-fed gravity or tray-fed          |
| Blade Type              | High-carbon steel or SS blades          |
| Output Particle Size    | Adjustable (50 mesh to 300 mesh)       |
| Cooling System          | Air-cooled / Optional water-cooled     |
| Mounting Type           | Table-top / Floor-mounted with castors |
| Finish                  | Matt / Mirror finish SS                 |

### 🏭 Applications & Industry Use
- Spice Grinding Units (masalas, chili, turmeric, coriander, etc.)
- Food Processing Plants (besan, atta, herbal powders)
- Commercial Kitchens & Canteens
- Ayurvedic & Herbal Medicine Units
- Sweet Shops, Bakeries & Cloud Kitchens
- Pharmaceutical Production (non-metallic ingredients)
- Chemical & Agro Industries (non-toxic compounds)

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom motor capacity based on daily production load

      shortDescription: 'Efficient, hygienic masala wet grinder for commercial kitchens, hotels, and food processing units, built with SS 304 stainless steel and industrial-grade motors.',
      longDescription: `SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, brings you the Masala Wet Grinder – an essential appliance for restaurants, commercial kitchens, and food processing units. Designed for grinding spices, wet masalas, chutneys, ginger-garlic paste, coconut, and soaked ingredients, our grinders offer consistent results, high productivity, and easy maintenance.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Robust Construction** – Stainless steel body (SS 304-grade) with heavy-duty stainless steel or granite stone grinding drums and MS/SS frame structure.
- **High-Efficiency Grinding** – Industrial-grade motors with copper windings, suitable for dry and wet grinding, minimizing heat generation.
- **User-Friendly Design** – Tilting models for easy unloading, removable drums and blades, transparent lids for safety and visibility.
- **Safe & Hygienic Operation** – Food-grade contact parts, anti-vibration pads, overload protection, cooling fans, smooth corners for hygiene and safety.
- **Low Maintenance & Long Life** – Sealed bearings, minimal service requirements, readily available spare parts and post-sale support.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

| Body Material       | SS 304 Stainless Steel                              |
| Drum Capacity       | 5L, 10L, 15L, 20L, 30L & Custom Sizes             |

| Voltage             | 230V / 415V – Single or Three Phase               |
| Grinding Method     | Stone-on-stone or Blade-based (as per model)       |
| Tilting Option      | Available (Manual or Lever-Operated)               |
| Weight              | 60 kg to 200 kg                                    |
| Mounting            | Floor Standing with Anti-Vibration Base            |
| Finish              | Matt / Glossy (Client Choice)                      |

### 🏭 Applications & Use Cases
- Restaurants & Cloud Kitchens  
- Hotels & Banquets  
- Food Processing Units  
- Catering Units & Central Kitchens  
- Ayurvedic & Herbal Product Manufacturing  
- Dosa & Idli Batter Preparation

- Stone-based or blade-based grinding mechanism

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Masala Wet Grinder?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai by ISO-compliant setup  
✔ 15+ years of experience in commercial kitchen engineering

      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty commercial tilting wet grinder for South Indian restaurants, catering units, and industrial kitchens, built with SS 304 stainless steel and granite stones.',
      longDescription: `For kitchens that demand consistency, hygiene, and high-volume output, the Tilting Wet Grinder from SAG Engineering Products is a powerful and reliable solution. Specially engineered for commercial food operations such as hotels, industrial canteens, catering units, and South Indian restaurants, this grinder ensures smooth, fast, and uniform grinding of rice, urad dal, soaked grains, chutneys, masalas, and batter preparations.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with over 15 years of industrial expertise, SAG Engineering’s grinders are built using food-grade materials and precision-engineered mechanisms for long-lasting performance, easy maintenance, and operator convenience.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Robust Tilting Design** – Tilt-locking system with ergonomic handle for easy unloading, reduced spillage, and minimal operator fatigue.
- **High-Capacity Grinding** – 5L to 100L capacities; heavy-duty granite roller stones; powerful motors with overload protection.
- **Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304 drum and outer body; polished internal surfaces; anti-vibration rubber feet.
- **Efficient & Uniform Performance** – Smooth grinding without overheating; low noise and vibration; optional drainage outlet.
- **Safe & Easy to Operate** – Safety cut-off, thermal overload protection, push-button/rotary controls, shockproof wiring.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

|-----------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Drum Material          | SS 304 Stainless Steel                        |
| Stone Type             | Natural Black Granite Roller Stones           |
| Tilting Mechanism      | Manual with Lock                              |

| Motor Power            | 0.5 HP to 3.0 HP                              |
| Power Supply           | 230V / 415V AC – Single or Three Phase       |
| Controls               | Push Button / Rotary Switch                   |
| Frame                  | MS Powder Coated or SS Tubular                |
| Wheels                 | Heavy-duty lockable castors (optional)       |
| Drain Valve            | Yes (optional)                                |
| Finish                 | Mirror / Satin Finish SS                       |

### 🍲 Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- South Indian Restaurants – Idli, Dosa, Vada batter preparation  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens – Bulk batter grinding  
- Caterers – Large meal preparation for events  
- Temple & Community Kitchens – Prasad and festive meals  
- Hospitals, Colleges, Hostels – Consistent, hygienic grinding  
- Food Processing Units – Spice pastes and base gravies  

### 🛠️ Customization & Add-On Options

- Semi-automatic or fully automatic tilting  
- Drain outlet, safety locks, splash guards  
- Wheeled base for mobility or fixed stand frame

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Tilting Wet Grinder?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra with expert craftsmanship  
✔ Certified food-grade materials  
✔ Multiple capacities to suit all kitchen sizes  
✔ Quick, silent, and uniform grinding

      shortDescription: 'Fast, hygienic, and dual-purpose peeler machine for garlic and potatoes, built from SS 304 stainless steel for commercial kitchens and food processing units.',
      longDescription: `Peeling large quantities of garlic cloves or potatoes manually can be time-consuming, labor-intensive, and unhygienic — but not anymore. Introducing the Garlic and Potato Peeler Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a robust, fully stainless-steel unit engineered to deliver fast, uniform, and hygienic peeling with minimal effort.

Designed for commercial food operations such as restaurants, catering services, industrial canteens, cloud kitchens, and food processing units, this machine offers unmatched speed, safety, and consistency.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual-Purpose Design** – Peel garlic and potatoes with the same machine; reduces labor costs and ensures uniform quality.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304 body, drum, and peeling chamber; hygienic, durable, rust-resistant, and easy to clean.
- **Efficient Peeling Mechanism** – Friction-based tumbling for garlic; abrasive drum lining for potatoes.
- **Fast Processing Time** – Peel up to 20–30 kg per batch in a few minutes.
- **Low Noise & Safe Operation** – Vibration-free motor, sealed bearings, anti-slip legs, safety interlock, and overload protection.
- **Easy to Use & Maintain** – Simple ON/OFF operation, removable waste tray, viewing lid for quick inspection.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature               | Details                                         |
|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Product Name          | Garlic and Potato Peeler                         |
| Body Material         | SS 304 (Food-Grade Stainless Steel)             |
| Peeling Capacity      | 10 kg, 20 kg, 30 kg per batch                  |
| Operation Time        | 2 to 4 minutes per batch                        |
| Motor Power           | 0.5 HP to 2 HP                                  |
| Power Supply          | 220V / 415V – Single or Three Phase            |
| Peeling Type          | Abrasive drum (Potato), Friction roller (Garlic) |
| Output Efficiency     | 85% to 95% depending on produce quality        |
| Waste Collection      | Bottom chamber with removable tray              |
| Water Inlet           | Yes (for potato peeling and cleaning)           |
| Drainage              | Provided                                        |
| Mounting              | Floor Standing with anti-vibration legs        |
| Finish                | Matt / Semi-polished SS finish                  |

### 🏭 Applications & Use Cases
- Restaurants & Hotels – Daily bulk prep of gravies and side dishes  
- Catering Units & Mess Kitchens – Speed up operations during peak orders  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSRs – Labor-saving for small commercial setups  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens – Schools, colleges, hospitals, and factories  
- Food Processing Units – Pre-processing vegetables at scale  
- Community Kitchens & Temples – Large batch preparation for events  

### 🛠️ Customization Available

- Motor configurations: single/three-phase  
- Custom drum coatings based on produce texture  
- Mobile stand with wheels for easy movement (optional)  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Garlic and Potato Peeler?
✔ Dual-function for garlic and potato peeling  
✔ Fast processing time with minimal waste  
✔ Food-safe, rust-resistant stainless steel body  
✔ Easy maintenance and hygiene

    {
      id: 401,
      name: 'Bakery Equipments',
      slug: 'bakery-equipments',
      image: '/Bakery Equipments.jpeg',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Precision-crafted commercial bakery equipment for consistent, hygienic, and high-volume baking operations.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, we understand that in the bakery business, consistency, quality, and hygiene are non-negotiable. That’s why we offer a complete line of commercial bakery equipment, built to perform flawlessly day after day in high-demand bakery environments.

Whether you’re a small-scale pastry shop, a full-service bakery, a hotel kitchen, or an industrial bakery unit, our equipment is engineered to support every stage of the baking process — from mixing and proofing to baking, cooling, and display.

Located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, and backed by over 15 years of stainless steel manufacturing expertise, SAG Engineering delivers customizable, durable, and energy-efficient bakery equipment across India and abroad.

### ✅ Comprehensive Bakery Equipment Range
- **Planetary Mixers** – Heavy-duty SS mixers (10L–80L), interchangeable whisks, beaters, and dough hooks.  
- **Dough Kneaders (Spiral & Atta)** – High-capacity kneading with SS bowl and arms, silent and energy-efficient.  
- **Bread Slicers** – Adjustable thickness, high-speed, tabletop or floor-mounted.  
- **Deck Ovens (Electric & Gas)** – Single/double/triple-deck, perfect heat distribution, optional stone base.  
- **Rotary Rack Ovens** – Even baking, steam injection, digital controls, rotary trolleys for high-volume output.  
- **Proofing Cabinets / Dough Provers** – Controlled humidity/temperature, SS body, glass door, adjustable racks.  
- **Display Counters (Hot & Cold)** – Tempered glass, LED lighting, SS shelves, temperature control.  
- **SS Work Tables & Sinks** – Custom SS prep areas with granite tops, under-shelves, and integrated washing stations.  

### 🔧 Technical & Customization Parameters
| Parameter        | Details                                                |
|-----------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Material         | Food-grade SS 304 / SS 202 (as per budget)           |
| Power Source     | Electric / Gas (LPG/PNG) depending on oven type       |
| Capacity Options | 10L mixers to 72-tray rotary ovens                   |
| Controls         | Manual / Digital temperature and timer control        |
| Mounting         | Tabletop, floor-mounted, or trolley-based            |
| Finish Options   | Matt, mirror, or powder-coated (for counters)        |
| Design           | Customized dimensions and configurations             |
| Packaging        | Export-standard crates or corrugated packing         |

Our in-house design team tailors each machine or unit to your workflow, kitchen space, and production volume.

### 🏭 Applications & Industries Served
- Standalone Bakeries & Pastry Shops  
- Hotels & Restaurants  
- Catering Units & Commissaries  
- Cloud Kitchens & Café Chains  
- Food Production Units & Industrial Bakeries  
- Educational Institutes & Culinary Schools  
- Retail Outlets & Supermarkets  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Bakery Equipment?

    {
      id: 402,
      name: 'Bread Slicer',
      slug: 'bread-slicer',

      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance Bread Slicer Machine for clean, uniform, and efficient slicing in bakeries and commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, we offer a high-performance Bread Slicer Machine designed to deliver clean, uniform slices in a fraction of the time — ideal for modern bakeries, hotel kitchens, commercial food outlets, and industrial baking units. Engineered with durable construction and precision blade technology, our slicers increase output, reduce manual labor, and ensure consistent product presentation.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, our bread slicers are trusted across India and abroad for their reliability, performance, and long-lasting quality.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Clean, Uniform Slicing** – High-carbon steel or stainless steel blades for consistent, even slices without tearing or crushing.
- **High-Speed, High-Capacity Output** – Efficient mechanism suitable for small bakeries, large commercial facilities, and institutional kitchens.
- **Heavy-Duty Construction** – Stainless steel or MS powder-coated frame for durability and hygiene; vibration-free operation.
- **User-Friendly Operation** – Push-in loaf holder or gravity-feed, single-touch operation, crumb collection tray for cleanliness.
- **Custom Slice Thickness** – Adjustable 10–16 mm slices, custom widths on request.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification         | Details                                                |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Machine Type          | Manual Push / Semi-Automatic                            |
| Material              | SS 304 / MS Powder Coated                               |
| Blade Type            | High-Carbon Steel or SS Blades                           |
| Slice Thickness       | 10 mm – 16 mm (Customizable)                             |
| Power Supply          | 220V Single Phase / 415V Three Phase                     |
| Motor Power           | 0.25 HP – 1 HP (Depending on model)                      |
| Loaf Size Compatibility| Up to 400 mm x 150 mm x 150 mm                           |
| Output Capacity       | 300–500 loaves/hour (Varies by model)                   |
| Mounting              | Tabletop or Stand-Alone                                   |
| Safety Features       | Blade Guard, Emergency Stop, Thermal Protection         |
| Optional Accessories  | Loaf Pusher, Tray Stand, Crumb Bin                        |

### 🏭 Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- Retail Bakeries & Cake Shops  
- Industrial Bakeries  
- Hotels & Institutional Kitchens  
- Catering Units & Commissary Kitchens  
- Supermarkets & In-Store Bakeries  
- QSR Chains & Café Kitchens  
- Food Packaging Companies  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Slice size adjustment  
- Custom loaf holding dimensions  
- Crumb-free design with side/rear ejection  
- Optional automation for high-volume production  
- Custom branding or OEM labeling  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Bread Slicer?
✔ Precision slicing without crushing or fraying  
✔ Industrial-grade materials and finish  
✔ Built for 24x7 operation in commercial environments  
✔ Compact design for space efficiency  
✔ Easy maintenance with accessible parts  
✔ Trusted by bakeries and kitchens across India  
✔ Proudly manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of engineering experience

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Secure wooden crate or box packaging

- Export-ready documentation for overseas clients

      shortDescription: 'High-performance Food Cake Mixer for uniform, efficient mixing in bakeries, hotels, and commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Experience unmatched efficiency in food preparation with the Food Cake Mixer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for high-performance mixing of cake batter, whipped cream, dough, and other food ingredients, this versatile machine is ideal for bakeries, commercial kitchens, hotels, and food processing units.

Built with precision engineering and robust materials, our mixers ensure consistency, hygiene, and operator comfort. Whether for fast-paced bakeries or large-scale kitchens, this equipment delivers uniform mixing with minimal effort and maximum output.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Capacity Mixing Bowl** – Available in 5L, 10L, 20L, 30L, 40L, or larger; SS 304 stainless steel for hygiene, removable for easy cleaning.
- **Heavy-Duty Motor** – Industrial-grade, energy-efficient motor capable of continuous operation and high torque for thick dough and batter.
- **Multi-Speed Control** – 3-speed or variable-speed gearbox for mixing, whipping, and kneading; prevents over-mixing.
- **Interchangeable Mixing Tools** – Flat Beater, Dough Hook, Wire Whisk; food-grade stainless steel or cast aluminum.
- **Safe & Silent Operation** – Bowl guard, overload protection, anti-slip base, fully enclosed design with air ventilation.

### 🏭 Applications & Industries Served

- Hotels & Resorts

Ideal for mixing batter, creams, sauces, fillings, mashed foods, or dough with consistency and speed.

    {
      id: 404,
      name: 'Gas Baking Oven ',
      slug: 'gas-baking-oven',
      image: '/Gas Baking Oven.webp',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance Gas Baking Oven for consistent, efficient, and safe baking in commercial kitchens and bakeries.',
      longDescription: `The Gas Baking Oven from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is designed for commercial kitchens, bakeries, restaurants, and food processing units. Engineered with precision and fabricated using high-grade materials, this oven ensures uniform heat distribution, gas efficiency, and durable construction, making it ideal for professionals seeking consistent baking results.

Whether baking bread, cakes, biscuits, pizzas, or roasting meats, our gas oven delivers controlled heating, user-friendly operation, and long service life.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Uniform Baking Performance** – Even heat distribution with integrated gas burners; single, double, or multi-deck configurations; adjustable temperature control.
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304 outer body with MS powder-coated inner chamber (optional SS); double-walled insulation for energy efficiency.
- **User-Friendly Operation** – Manual or pilot ignition; glass viewing window; ergonomic door handle and sturdy locking.
- **Temperature Control & Safety** – Thermostatically controlled 100°C–300°C; uniform airflow; safety valves and flame protection; digital display on premium models.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature                     | Specification                                         |
|------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| Fuel Type                    | LPG / PNG (customizable)                             |
| Chamber Size                 | Single / Double / Multi-deck                         |
| Material (Outer Body)        | SS 304 Stainless Steel                                |
| Material (Inner Chamber)     | MS with heat-resistant coating / Optional SS        |
| Temperature Range            | 100°C – 300°C                                       |
| Heating Type                 | Gas-fired bottom burner with air circulation         |
| Ignition                     | Manual / Pilot Burner / Optional Auto Ignition      |
| Glass Viewing Window         | Yes (heat-resistant)                                 |
| Deck Configuration           | 1, 2, or 3 decks (tray options customizable)        |
| Thermostat Control           | Analog or Digital (on request)                       |
| Power Supply (for light/fan) | 230V AC                                             |

### 🍞 Applications & Suitable Products
- Bakery Products: Bread loaves, buns, cookies, muffins, cakes, sponge, khari, puffs, biscuits  
- Café & Restaurant Use: Pizza, lasagna, pasta bakes, grilled vegetables  
- Institutional Kitchens: Schools, hospitals, canteens  
- Catering Services: Roasting, reheating for events  
- Food Processing Units: Pre-packaged baked goods, semi-prepared meals  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom deck sizes & tray capacities  
- Fuel type selection (LPG or PNG)  
- Outer and inner body material choices (SS/MS)  
- Digital or analog control interface  
- Tray type: wire racks or solid trays  
- Built-in timer, alarm, or auto shut-off (premium models)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Gas Baking Oven?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra by trusted experts  
✔ 15+ years of engineering excellence  
✔ Robust & efficient design for Indian kitchens  
✔ Low gas consumption & excellent insulation  
✔ Consistent baking tray after tray

✔ Ideal for startups, bakeries, and institutional kitchens

      longDescription: `The Electric Oven from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, Maharashtra, is designed for commercial kitchens, bakeries, cafés, restaurants, and institutional food units. Ideal for cloud kitchens, pastry shops, and food processing facilities, this electric oven ensures efficiency, hygiene, and long-term durability.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Electric Heating for Clean & Consistent Cooking** – Eliminates gas use, ensures even heat distribution, quick preheating, and thermostatic temperature control.
- **Premium Stainless Steel Construction** – SS 304 outer body and SS/aluminized steel inner chamber, polished for hygiene, corrosion resistance, and durability.
- **Multiple Tray Capacity** – Single, double, or multi-deck with pull-out rails for GN pans or standard trays.
- **Precision Temperature Control** – Analog or digital thermostat, top and bottom heating control, optional timer/alarm.
- **Safety & Energy Efficiency** – Insulated chamber, auto cutoff thermostat, safety fuses, low electricity consumption.

      slug: 'prover-and-bun-divider',
      image: '/Prover & Bun Divider.jpeg',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance Prover and Bun Divider for precise dough fermentation and uniform bun division in commercial bakeries.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, we offer high-performance Provers and Bun Dividers, engineered for commercial bakeries, cafés, hotels, and industrial baking facilities. These machines ensure uniform dough fermentation, precise portioning, optimal hygiene, and improved production efficiency.

### ✅ Product 1: Dough Prover (Fermentation Cabinet)
Controlled proofing for light, fluffy, and evenly risen dough.

**Key Features**
- Stainless Steel Construction (SS 304 inside & outside)
- Digital temperature & humidity control
- Built-in steam and heating system for uniform proofing
- Tempered glass doors with airtight seal
- Trolley-style or tray-sliding models
- Adjustable humidity (60–95%) and temperature (30–45°C)

**Technical Specifications**
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 (Interior & Exterior) |
| Capacity | 10, 16, 20, 32 trays or as requested |
| Temperature Range | 30°C to 45°C |
| Humidity Control | 60% to 95% |
| Power Supply | 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase |
| Heating System | Electric element with thermostat |
| Doors | Single / Double Glass |
| Mounting | Floor-standing |

**Applications**
- Bread dough proofing
- Buns, rolls, croissants
- Pizza base and artisan loaves
- Fermented bakery products in mass production

### ✅ Product 2: Bun Divider (Manual / Semi-Automatic)
Quick & accurate dough division for uniform buns and rolls.

**Key Features**
- Heavy-duty cast iron and stainless steel construction
- Uniform dough division (36 pcs standard)
- Food-safe non-stick coated bowls and blades
- Low maintenance and ergonomic operation
- Optional press & divide combination for higher speed
- Easy-to-clean rounded edges with crumb tray

| Division Capacity | 36 pcs standard; customizable |
| Dough Weight Range | 30g to 180g per piece |
| Operation | Manual / Semi-Automatic / Hydraulic |
| Material | MS/CI base with SS housing |
| Power Supply (semi-auto) | 230V AC / 50Hz |
| Control Panel | Timer + Pressure knob (semi-auto) |
| Accessories | Divider plates, press plate (optional) |

**Applications**
- Pav / Bun production
- Dinner rolls, burger buns
- Stuffed bread items
- Ladi pav, pav bhaji buns, bakery-style rolls

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Prover & Bun Divider?
✔ Heavy-duty commercial design  
✔ Stainless steel hygiene standards  
✔ Precise temperature and weight control  
✔ Easy to operate and maintain

- Installation assistance and product training

- Export-compliant documentation and packaging

      shortDescription: 'Elegant and efficient Hot Display Counter for restaurants, bakeries, sweet shops, and catering setups with consistent heating and hygienic storage.',
      longDescription: `Give your ready-to-serve food the visibility it deserves while keeping it fresh and warm with the Hot Display Counter by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Specially designed for restaurants, bakeries, sweet shops, food courts, and catering setups, our display counters offer the perfect blend of visual appeal, hygienic storage, and temperature control.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**Consistent Heating**
- Infrared heaters, tubular heating elements, or heat lamps maintain optimal serving temperature.
- Keeps food warm without overcooking or drying.
- Adjustable thermostat control ensures precise temperature regulation.

**Modern & Professional Aesthetics**
- Clear toughened glass panels for maximum visibility.
- Sleek SS 304 stainless steel construction.
- Optional LED lighting enhances display appeal.

**Sturdy & Hygienic Construction**
- SS 304-grade body and shelves for food safety.
- Fully welded joints for strength and spill resistance.
- Non-toxic, heat-resistant materials for hygienic use.

**Functional & Versatile Design**
- Straight, curved, or angle front glass styles.
- One, two, or three display levels.
- Sliding or open-back doors for easy refilling and service.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|---------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Glass Type | Toughened / Tempered Clear Glass |
| Heating System | Infrared / Tubular / Heat Lamp |
| Temperature Range | 30°C – 80°C (adjustable) |
| Control Type | Thermostatic or Digital Controller |
| Lighting | LED Strip (Optional) |
| Shelves | 1 to 3 (Heated / Ambient) |
| Power Supply | 230V, Single Phase |
| Mounting | Floor standing with lockable castors or fixed legs |
| Drainage Tray | Yes (Optional) |
| Available Lengths | 3 ft, 4 ft, 5 ft, 6 ft, or custom size |

### 🍽️ Applications
- Restaurants & Hotels – Buffet or counter service
- Bakeries & Pastry Shops – Warm and display baked items
- Sweet Shops & Mithai Stores – Maintain warmth for sweets
- Catering Services – Portable hot counters for events
- Food Courts & Mall Kiosks – Compact heated display
- Institutional Cafeterias & Corporate Pantries

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Length, depth, and height modifications
- Branding panel space for logo or digital display
- Optional storage cabinet, tray slider, sneeze guard, or cash counter
- Mobile versions with lockable wheels

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Hot Display Counter?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Experience  
✔ Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction  
✔ Premium Glass & Heating Elements  
✔ Elegant Design for Front-of-House Service  
✔ Energy-Efficient & Easy to Maintain  
✔ Custom Sizes & Styles Available  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with PAN India Delivery  
✔ Export-Ready Packaging & Quality Compliance  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support & Service

- Warranty on Heating Components and Structure  
- On-demand spare parts and technical assistance  
- AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract) available  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Protective packaging using foam, stretch wrap, and wooden crates  
- Quick dispatch across Mumbai, Maharashtra, and India  
- Export-compliant packaging for international orders  

📞 Let’s Create a Counter That Works for You  
Share your layout or size requirement, request bulk orders, or talk to our design expert.

      longDescription: `Create a lasting first impression with the Normal Display Counter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — ideal for sweets, bakery items, dry snacks, packaged foods, and ready-to-serve meals. Designed for visual appeal, hygiene, and functionality, these counters combine robust stainless steel construction with clear visibility and smooth customer interaction.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**Sleek, Functional Design**
- Open or glass-enclosed front for visibility and customer engagement.
- Tiered shelving (1, 2, or 3 levels) for organized product display.
- Wide counter space for bulk presentation.
- Optional LED lighting to enhance product visibility.

**Premium Material Quality**
- SS 304 grade stainless steel body for durability and corrosion resistance.
- Shelves made of toughened glass or SS.
- Optional wooden laminate or powder-coated panels.

**Customizable Layout**
- Standard sizes (3 ft, 4 ft, 5 ft, 6 ft) or fully customized dimensions.
- Straight or curved front designs.
- Optional drawer units, sliding doors, cash counters, or under-storage cabinets.

**Hygienic & Easy to Clean**
- Food-grade, washable surfaces.
- Removable crumb trays, glass panels, and shelves.
- Enclosed units prevent dust and contamination.
- Seamless joints reduce dirt accumulation.

**Built for Commercial Usage**
- Suitable for high footfall outlets.
- Ideal for dry food items.
- Can integrate with POS or self-service setups.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications

| Sizes Available | 3 ft / 4 ft / 5 ft / 6 ft / Custom Size |
| Top Shelf | Glass / Stainless Steel / Marble / Granite |
| Storage Options | Optional – Under Counter Drawers / Cabinets |
| Customization | Available (Logo branding, colors, signage, etc.) |

### 🍰 Ideal For
- Indian Sweets (Mithai) & Namkeen
- Bakery Items: cakes, pastries, puffs, bread
- Dry Snacks: samosas, rolls, khari, chakli
- Packaged or Pre-packed Foods
- Beverages, cutlery, disposable items

### 🛠️ Customization Options

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Display Counter (Normal)?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with High-Grade Materials  
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise in Commercial Equipment  
✔ Robust Build with Elegant Finish

      id: 409,
      name: 'Rotary Rack Oven ',
      slug: 'rotary-rack-oven',
      image: '/Rotary rack Oven.jpeg',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance rotary rack oven for uniform baking, built for bakeries, confectioneries, and industrial food production units.',
      longDescription: `Deliver consistent, high-volume baking results with the Rotary Rack Oven from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed to meet the demanding needs of bakeries, food production units, and confectionery kitchens, it offers even baking, energy efficiency, and operator convenience.

Whether you're baking bread, buns, cakes, cookies, or pizzas, this oven ensures uniform browning and texture with advanced hot air circulation and precise temperature control.

### ✅ Key Features & Advantages
**Uniform & Consistent Baking**
- Rotating rack system ensures 360° hot air circulation.
- Indirect heating with built-in heat exchanger and steam injection.
- Optional dual fans or cross-air systems for large-capacity models.

**Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**
- SS 304 interior chamber and durable SS exterior.
- Industrial-grade insulation for energy efficiency.
- Hygienic, corrosion-resistant, and long-lasting.

**User-Friendly Control Panel**
- Microprocessor-based or manual digital control for time, temperature, and steam.
- Programmable settings for repetitive batches.
- Built-in safety alerts and overheat protection.

**Energy Options**
- Diesel, Gas (LPG/PNG), Electric, or Wood-fired variants.
- Heat exchangers for fuel models; tubular heaters for electric models.

**High-Capacity Design**
- Compatible with rotary trolleys holding 36, 42, 48, or 60 trays.
- Available in single or double rack configurations.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Description |
|---------------|------------|
| Body Material | SS 304 interior, SS 202/304 exterior |
| Heating Type | Diesel / Electric / Gas / Wood-fired |
| Tray Capacity | 36, 42, 48, 60 trays (400x600mm / 18"x30") |
| Temperature Range | 50°C to 300°C |
| Steam System | Built-in steam generator (manual or auto injection) |
| Control Panel | Digital / Manual with programmable options |
| Power Supply | 3-Phase 415V (Electric Models) |
| Fuel Efficiency | Optimized for low fuel consumption |
| Trolley Rotation | Automatic via geared motor |
| Insulation | High-density ceramic or mineral wool |
| Chimney Outlet | Yes – for exhaust and humidity control |

### 🍞 Ideal Applications
- Commercial Bakeries
- Cake & Pastry Shops
- Rusk & Bread Manufacturers
- Confectionery Units
- Supermarkets & Large Food Chains
- Industrial Food Processing Plants
- Hotel & Institutional Bakery Kitchens

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom tray sizes and rack configurations
- Front & rear door access for pass-through operations
- Additional steam settings for crust-heavy baking
- Oven base with ramps or castor-mounted design
- Branding options on control panels and exterior
- Integration into turnkey bakery setups (proofer, sheeter, dough kneader)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products – Mumbai?
✔ 15+ Years of Engineering Experience  
✔ Built for Indian & Export Markets  
✔ All Fuel Options Available  
✔ Low Maintenance & Long-Life Equipment  
✔ Nationwide Service & Support  
✔ Export-Grade Finishing & Packaging  
✔ PAN India Delivery

- One-year warranty on major components

- Annual maintenance contracts (AMCs)  
- Remote and on-site service across India

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery

- Crane & forklift-compatible base design
- Nationwide delivery and international shipping available

      id: 410,
      name: 'Spiral Mixer',
      slug: 'spiral-mixer',
      image: '/Spiral Mixer.jpg',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance spiral mixer for commercial bakeries, hotels, restaurants, and food processing units, ensuring consistent and uniform dough mixing.',
      longDescription: `The Spiral Mixer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is engineered for commercial bakeries, hotels, restaurants, and food processing units requiring high-volume, consistent dough mixing. It reduces mixing time, improves dough quality, and withstands continuous heavy-duty use.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**Spiral Mixing Action**
- Dual-action mixing (spiral arm + rotating bowl) for complete, even kneading.
- Keeps dough cool, improving fermentation and texture.
- Suitable for soft, medium, and hard dough types.

**Heavy-Duty Construction**
- SS 304 stainless steel body and bowl for hygiene and durability.
- Spiral hook and bowl with mirror polish.
- Non-slip base and robust chassis for stability.

**High-Efficiency Motor & Drive**
- Powerful, energy-efficient motors with high-torque gearbox.
- Optional two-speed motor (slow for combining, fast for kneading).
- Designed for continuous operation in demanding environments.

**Smart Controls & Safety**
- Electromechanical control panel with push buttons and emergency stop.
- Optional digital timer and automatic stop.
- Safety interlock system; overload protection for motor.

**Quiet & Vibration-Free**
- Heavy-duty design minimizes noise and vibration.
- Balanced construction ensures stable performance at full capacity.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Bowl Capacity | 20L / 40L / 60L / 80L / 100L / 120L / 200L+ |
| Dough Capacity | 8–100 kg (depending on model) |
| Motor Power | 1.5 HP – 7.5 HP (single/two-speed) |
| Power Supply | 230V or 415V, Single or Three Phase |
| Mixing Hook | SS Spiral Arm |
| Bowl Drive | Belt or Gear Driven |
| Speed | Single / Dual Speed (optional) |
| Control Panel | Push Button / Timer / Emergency Stop |
| Mounting | Floor Mounted |
| Safety Features | Interlock Guard, Overload Protector |

### 🥖 Applications
- Bakeries – Bread, buns, pizza dough, puff pastry, rolls
- Hotels & Restaurants – Paratha, naan, kulcha, bakery prep
- Cloud Kitchens – Fast-paced dough preparation
- Catering Units – Centralized large-batch dough prep
- Food Processing Units – Semi-automatic mixing lines
- Industrial Canteens & Mess Kitchens – Bulk production

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Multiple bowl capacities (10–150 kg dough per batch)
- Optional digital control panel with programmable settings
- Removable or fixed bowl configuration
- SS splash guards or top covers with safety mesh
- Integration with conveyor or automatic dividing units
- Full dough preparation line setup on request

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Fully Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction  
✔ High-Torque Gearbox for Industrial Mixing  
✔ Energy-Efficient & Low Maintenance

✔ PAN India Delivery & Export-Ready

- Prompt service and spare parts availability

- PAN India and export-ready delivery with installation support

        'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562967916-eb82221dfb36?w=800&h=600&fit=crop&auto=format'
      ],
      features: [
