    {
      id: 411,
      name: 'Planetary Mixer ',
      slug: 'planetary-mixer',
      image: '/Planetary Mixer.webp',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty planetary mixer for commercial kitchens, bakeries, and food processing units, delivering consistent mixing, blending, whipping, and kneading.',
      longDescription: `The Planetary Mixer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is engineered for commercial kitchens, bakeries, cloud kitchens, and food processing units requiring consistent mixing, blending, whipping, and kneading. Designed for heavy-duty applications, it delivers optimal performance, hygiene, and reliability in high-volume food preparation environments.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**Heavy-Duty Construction**
- Robust cast iron body with SS 304 mixing bowl.
- Engineered for continuous commercial use.
- Stable and vibration-free operation.

**Multiple Speed Settings**
- 3-speed gear drive: Low for kneading, Medium for blending, High for whipping.
- Suitable for dough, batters, creams, sauces, and more.

**Interchangeable Attachments**
- Dough Hook: Kneading hard dough (bread, pizza, roti)
- Flat Beater: Medium consistency mixes (icing, batter)
- Wire Whisk/Whip: Light mixing and whipping (cream, egg white)
- All attachments are food-grade, easy to attach/remove, and designed for uniform mixing.

**Safety First**
- Safety interlock prevents operation when guard is lifted.
- Thermal overload protection for motor safety.
- Non-slip base ensures stable operation.

**Low Maintenance & Easy to Clean**
- Smooth coated body resists dust, oil, and food spatter.
- Stainless steel bowl and attachments are dishwasher-safe.
- Minimal moving parts reduce wear and maintenance.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|--------|
| Model Type | Planetary Gear Driven |
| Body Material | Cast Iron with Coated Finish |
| Mixing Bowl Material | SS 304 (Food Grade) |
| Bowl Capacities | 5L, 10L, 20L, 30L, 40L, 60L |
| Motor Power | 0.5 HP – 2.5 HP (depending on capacity) |
| Speed Control | 3-Speed Gear Control |
| Voltage | 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase |
| Standard Attachments | Dough Hook, Beater, Whisk |
| Safety Features | Bowl Guard Interlock, Thermal Cutoff |
| Finish | Epoxy Powder Coated / SS Optional |
| Optional Add-ons | Timer, Digital Panel, Variable Speed Drive |

### 🏭 Applications
- Commercial Bakeries – Dough, batter, and whipped toppings
- Restaurants & Hotels – Sauces, icing, dough preparation
- Cloud & Commissary Kitchens – Bulk food prep
- Industrial Canteens & Institutional Kitchens – Large-batch mixing
- Food Processing Units – Pre-processing in packaged food lines

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Choice of bowl capacity
- Castor wheels for mobility
- Digital or manual control panels
- Variable-speed drive (VFD)
- Heavy-duty base with anti-vibration mounts
- Custom integration with production lines on request

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products
✔ Made in Mumbai with Export-Ready Quality  
✔ Over 15 Years of Engineering Experience  
✔ Designed for Continuous, Commercial Use  
✔ Quiet Operation, Smooth Controls  
✔ Trusted by Professional Kitchens Across India  
✔ Reliable After-Sales Support & Spare Parts  
✔ Competitive Pricing Without Compromise  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- 1-year standard warranty on motor and electrical parts  
- Prompt repair, servicing, and accessory support  
- Spare parts available nationwide  
- Remote guidance and video installation walkthroughs  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-protected packing for domestic dispatch  
- Crated export packaging for international shipping  
- PAN India delivery with dispatch tracking  

📞 Contact SAG Engineering Products to improve your kitchen’s mixing efficiency.

      id: 411,
      name: 'Dough Sheeter',
      slug: 'dough-sheeter',
      image: '/Dough Sheeter.jpg',
      category: 'bakery-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity dough sheeter for bakeries, restaurants, and commercial kitchens, delivering uniform dough sheets with precision and speed.',
      longDescription: `The Dough Sheeter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, streamlines commercial bakery and kitchen operations by rolling large volumes of dough into uniform sheets in seconds. Suitable for pizzas, parathas, puff pastries, chapatis, or croissants, it ensures consistency, efficiency, and hygiene.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
**High-Capacity Dough Rolling**
- Rolls dough from 0.5 mm to 30 mm thickness.
- Handles medium to high production volumes.
- Reduces manual effort and improves productivity.

**Sturdy & Hygienic Construction**
- Frame and body built with SS 304-grade stainless steel.
- Food-safe side guards and rollers.
- Available in tabletop or floor-mounted versions.

**Adjustable Roller Settings**
- Precision-adjustable rollers for thickness control.
- User-friendly dial for quick changes.
- Smooth rolling action prevents tearing or sticking.

**Belt Conveyor Operation**
- Dual conveyor belts feed and retrieve dough automatically.
- Food-grade, washable, scratch-resistant belts.
- Safety sensors and emergency stop for operator protection.

**Space-Saving & Foldable Design**
- Fold-up arms for tabletop models.
- Floor-standing models include heavy-duty wheels for mobility.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|---------------|
| Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Roller Material | Chrome-plated / Non-stick |
| Max. Dough Width | 400 mm – 650 mm |
| Thickness Range | 0.5 mm – 30 mm |
| Belt Length | 800 mm – 2000 mm |
| Motor Power | 0.75 HP – 1.5 HP |
| Power Supply | 230V / 415V AC – Single/Three Phase |
| Drive System | Gear-driven motor with belt support |
| Control Panel | Manual / Optional digital timer |
| Safety Features | Emergency stop, belt guard, interlock switch |
| Output | Up to 500–1200 sheets/hour |

### 🍞 Applications & Industry Usage
- Bakeries & Patisseries – puff pastry, fondant, cookie dough, pie crusts  
- Pizza Shops & Cloud Kitchens – consistent pizza base sizing  
- Indian Restaurants & Catering Units – paratha, naan, chapati preparation  
- Frozen Food Manufacturers – dumplings, samosas, empanadas  
- Hotels & Institutional Kitchens – bulk flatbread and bakery production

### 🛠️ Customization & Integration
- Custom conveyor length and roller width  
- Manual or auto dough retraction  
- Variable speed settings  
- Integration with production lines  
- Optional stainless steel flour catcher or dough tray  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Dough Sheeter
✔ Made in Mumbai with 15+ years of experience  
✔ Precision-engineered for commercial kitchens  
✔ Food-safe and easy-to-clean surfaces  
✔ Compact, space-saving options  
✔ Energy-efficient with low maintenance  
✔ Nationwide delivery and reliable after-sales support  
✔ Customization available to match production needs  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Service & Support
- Installation guidance and operator training  
- One-year warranty on motors and components  
- Spare parts readily available  
- Prompt maintenance and troubleshooting  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Export-grade protective packaging  
- Safe transport via road, rail, or cargo  
- PAN India delivery & export-ready

    {
      id: 501,
      name: 'Commercial Washing Equipments ',
      slug: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      image: '/Commercial Washing Equipments 1.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Complete range of commercial washing equipment for hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, and industrial canteens, designed for hygiene, efficiency, and durability.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we design and manufacture Commercial Washing Equipment tailored to meet high-demand professional kitchen needs. From dishwashing and pot washing to vegetable cleaning and utensil sanitization, our systems deliver hygiene, speed, and water efficiency in durable SS construction.

### ✅ Washing Equipment Range
- **Three Sink / Two Sink Units** – Standard wash-rinse-sanitize process with optional drainboards and undershelves.  
- **Pot & Pan Washing Sinks** – Extra-deep basins with splash guards and drain valves.  
- **Single Sink Units** – For small-scale or auxiliary washing stations.  
- **Vegetable Washing Sinks** – Sloped or perforated models with optional spray taps.  
- **Work Tables with Sink** – Combined prep and washing stations.  
- **Manual/Automatic Pre-Rinse Units** – High-pressure spray for residue removal.  
- **Soiled Dish Landing Tables** – With garbage chutes, undershelves, or scrapping bins.  
- **Clean Dish Tables / Dish Drying Racks** – SS slatted or perforated trays, standalone or paired with dishwashers.  
- **Custom-Built Dish Landing Counters** – Integrated with drop-in dishwashers, waste bins, and sinks.

### 🔧 Technical Features & Specifications
| Component | Specification |
|-----------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 (Food-grade) / SS 316 optional |
| Sink Bowl Sizes | 18"x18"x12", 24"x24"x12", or custom |
| Table Height | Standard 850 mm; customizable |
| Finish | Matt / Hairline / Mirror optional |
| Drains | 38 mm or 50 mm with SS ball valve |
| Splash Guards | Optional rear and side guards |
| Accessories | Drainboards, undershelves, taps, pedal valves, pre-rinse guns |

### 💼 Designed to Meet Buyer Priorities
- **Durability & Strength** – Thick-gauge SS sheets, fully welded joints, heavy-duty legs.  
- **Hygiene & Food Safety** – Rounded corners, sloped drainage, optional strainers and hands-free taps.  
- **Water Efficiency** – Low-flow spray nozzles, sensor taps.  
- **Space Optimization** – Compact footprint, modular layouts.  
- **Customization** – Sink count, faucet type, accessories, integrated dish wash zones.

### 🏢 Industries Served
- Hotels & Fine Dining Restaurants  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Central & Cloud Kitchens  
- Catering Hubs & Banquet Kitchens  
- Schools, Colleges & Hostels  
- Food Processing Units & Bakeries  
- Marine & Offshore Galley Kitchens  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise in Commercial Kitchen Equipment  
✔ Pan India Manufacturing & Delivery  
✔ Custom Fabrication for Any Layout  
✔ Certified Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
✔ Corrosion & Heat Resistant  
✔ Hygienic, Easy to Clean, Low Maintenance

- PAN India and international delivery

      id: 502,
      name: 'Commercial Dishwasher',
      slug: 'commercial-dishwasher',
      image: '/Commercial Dishwasher.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Industrial-grade commercial dishwashers designed for hotels, restaurants, hospitals, and cloud kitchens — fast, hygienic, and water-efficient.',
      longDescription: `At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we manufacture Commercial Dishwashers engineered for consistent performance, long service life, and water-saving efficiency. Ideal for hotels, restaurants, hospitals, industrial canteens, and cloud kitchens, our dishwashers help reduce labor, save time, and meet the highest hygiene standards.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Efficient High-Speed Cleaning**: Washes dishes, cutlery, trays, and utensils quickly with sanitized results.
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade steel for rust resistance and long-term hygiene; noise-reducing insulation.
- **Energy & Water Saving**: Low water usage per cycle, high-efficiency spray arms, and energy-optimized cycles.
- **High-Temperature Sanitization**: Final rinse up to 85°C for thermal disinfection; optional detergent & rinse aid dispensers.
- **User-Friendly Operation**: Simple control panel, ergonomic loading, pre-set wash cycles, self-cleaning in advanced models.

### 🔧 Available Models & Types
| Model Type | Ideal For | Features |
|------------|-----------|---------|
| Undercounter Dishwasher | Small cafés, cloud kitchens, bars | Compact, 30–40 racks/hr |
| Hood-Type / Pass-Through Dishwasher | Hotels, restaurants, QSRs | 60–80 racks/hr, ergonomic hood lift |
| Rack Conveyor Dishwasher | Industrial kitchens, hostels, mess halls | Continuous washing with pre-wash, wash, rinse zones |
| Utensil Washer (Pot Washer) | Canteens, catering units | Heavy-duty for large pots, pans, trays |

### 🔍 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|--------|
| Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel (Food Grade) |
| Capacity | 30–150 racks/hour |
| Water Usage | 2–3 liters per cycle |
| Temperature Range | 50°C – 85°C |
| Control Panel | Touch/Digital or Manual |
| Power Supply | 230V / 415V AC, 50 Hz |
| Cycle Time | 1–3 minutes per wash |
| Noise Level | ≤ 60 dB |
| Mounting | Floor standing / Built-in |
| Safety Features | Thermal overload, low water cutoff, door switch |

### 🏭 Applications Across Industries
- Hotels & Resorts  
- Restaurants & Fine-Dine Kitchens  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Canteens  
- Industrial & Corporate Canteens  
- Catering Units & Banquet Halls  
- Hostels, Schools & Colleges  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Size & Capacity (racks/hr, chamber dimensions)  
- Power Options (single/three phase)  
- Integrated Drain Pumps & Soft Water Connectors  
- Rinse Aid & Detergent Injection Systems  
- Sound Insulation & Heat Recovery (advanced models)  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Dishwashers
✔ Made in Mumbai with superior engineering  
✔ Long-lasting SS 304 construction  
✔ Energy- and water-efficient  
✔ Range of models for all kitchen sizes  
✔ Easy to operate, maintain, and service  
✔ 15+ years of expertise  
✔ Trusted by food service brands across India & overseas  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- On-site installation & user training (on request)  
- Standard warranty on motor, pump & electronics  
- AMC options available  
- Spare parts readily available  
- Service support across India  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Secure packing with corrugated & wooden crates  
- Export-quality sealing with protective foam  
- PAN India delivery & export shipping

      id: 503,
      name: 'Stainless Steel Sink ',
      slug: 'stainless-steel-sink',
      image: '/Stainless Steel Sink.webp',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Premium stainless steel sinks for commercial kitchens, hotels, hospitals, and food processing units — hygienic, durable, and customizable.',
      longDescription: `Efficient cleaning and sanitation begin with a well-designed, high-performance sink. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we manufacture premium Stainless Steel Sinks tailored for commercial kitchens, hotels, hospitals, canteens, and food processing units.

Engineered for durability, hygiene, and user comfort, our sinks are built from food-grade SS 304 or SS 316 stainless steel, precision-fabricated to withstand heavy usage in high-traffic workspaces. Ideal for utensil cleaning, vegetable washing, or hand washing, our sinks ensure a clean, safe, and compliant kitchen environment.

### ✅ Key Features & Advantages
- **Superior Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 standard; SS 316 for hospital/food-grade applications; smooth satin/matt finish.
- **Heavy-Duty Design**: Strong SS framework, robust sink bowls, leak-proof welding, optional splashbacks, sound-dampening undercoating.
- **Ergonomic & Safe**: Optimal working height, rounded edges, sloped base for efficient drainage.
- **Easy to Maintain & Clean**: Fully welded joints, removable drain baskets, rust- and stain-resistant surfaces.

### 🧼 Sink Configurations
| Model Type | Application |
|------------|------------|
| Single Bowl Sink | Compact spaces, hand wash stations |
| Double Bowl Sink | General utensil cleaning & prep |
| Triple Bowl Sink | Separate zones for wash, rinse, sanitize |
| Sink with Work Table | Prep and wash combined station |
| Sink with Overhead Shelf | Extra storage & space optimization |
| Vegetable Washing Sink | Perforated trays with drain system |
| Hospital/Pharma Sink | SS 316 construction with drainboard |

Optional features include drainboards, garbage chutes, undershelves, splash guards, tap holes, and adjustable SS legs.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 / SS 316 |
| Bowl Thickness | 1.0 mm – 1.6 mm (customizable) |
| Top Plate Thickness | 1.2 mm / 1.5 mm |
| Size Options | Custom sizes available |
| Mounting Type | Floor-standing / Wall-mounted |
| Finish | Matt / Satin / Mirror (on request) |
| Optional Add-ons | Drain board, undershelf, splash guard, garbage chute, tap holes, adjustable SS legs |

### 🏭 Applications & Industries
- Hotels, Restaurants & Cafés  
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens  
- Hospitals & Laboratories  
- Food Processing Units  
- Cloud Kitchens & Mess Facilities  
- Schools, Colleges & Office Canteens  
- Marine Galleys & Offshore Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization & Fabrication
Custom-built sinks designed for:
- L-shaped, wall-mounted, corner sinks  
- Plumbing and drainage integration  
- Foot-operated or sensor taps for hands-free use  
- Seamless integration with work tables and dish counters  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ Mumbai-based, PAN India supply & exports  
✔ 15+ years of manufacturing experience  
✔ ISO & FSSAI hygiene-compliant fabrication  
✔ Food-grade SS 304 / SS 316 construction  
✔ Rustproof, sturdy, and long-lasting  
✔ Custom configurations & bulk orders supported  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation assistance & plumbing guidance  
- 1-year manufacturing warranty  
- Spare parts availability  
- Long-term servicing & fabrication support  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Export-grade, damage-free packing  
- Bubble-wrap or wooden crate packaging on request  
- PAN India & international logistics handled

      longDescription: `Engineered for heavy-duty cleaning, SAG Engineering’s Pot Sink is a premium stainless steel washing station built for hotels, restaurants, industrial canteens, and cloud kitchens. Fabricated from food-grade SS 304 (optional SS 316), it ensures hygiene, reliability, and ergonomic comfort for professional kitchen operations.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Construction**: Thick gauge SS 304/316 with fully welded joints for strength and hygiene.
- **Large Washing Capacity**: Deep sink bowls (18–22 inches) to accommodate large pots, pans, and stock vessels.
- **Ergonomic Design**: Standard working height (850–900 mm) with sloped base and splash guards.
- **Integrated Accessories**: Optional drainboards, undershelves, faucets, and SS waste couplings with mesh filters.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Specification | Details |
|---------------|---------|
| Material | SS 304 / SS 316 (optional) |
| Bowl Size | 24” x 24” x 18” (customizable) |
| Sink Type | Single, Double, or Triple Pot Sink |
| Mounting | Free-standing with SS legs and adjustable bullet feet |
| Finish | Matt / Brushed stainless |
| Optional Add-ons | Drainboard, Faucet, Splash Guards, Under-Shelf |
| Drain Outlet | 2”–3” diameter with waste coupling & mesh filter |
| Welding Type | Argon welded for smooth finish and no leaks |

### 🏭 Applications
- Hotels & Fine Dining Restaurants  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Catering Units  
- Hospitals, Schools & College Kitchens  
- Food Courts & Commercial Cooking Facilities  
- Marine & Offshore Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Sink bowl size & depth  
- Number of sink units (single/double/triple)  
- Faucet type and placement  
- Drainboard placement (left/right/both)  
- Undershelves inclusion/exclusion  
- Wall-mounted or free-standing  
- Stainless steel grade selection (SS 316 for saline/hard water)

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Pot Sink
✔ Certified food-grade stainless steel  
✔ Rust-resistant & hygienic  
✔ Heavy-duty for high-volume washing  
✔ Fully customizable for workflow & space  
✔ Ready-to-install with all fittings & accessories  
✔ 15+ years of engineering expertise  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai – supplied PAN India & abroad  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation assistance & setup consultation  
- Maintenance guidance for drains & sinks  
- Spare parts available on request  
- Fast customer service for bulk/project orders  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Robust packing for safe transport  
- PAN India and export logistics

      shortDescription: 'Compact, durable, and hygienic hand wash sinks designed for commercial kitchens, hospitals, food courts, and hygiene-sensitive environments.',
      longDescription: `Hygienic, durable, and space-efficient, SAG Engineering’s Hand Wash Sink is designed for commercial kitchens, hospitals, food courts, and industrial canteens. Made from food-grade stainless steel (SS 304 or optional SS 316), it ensures compliance, durability, and easy maintenance while promoting hand hygiene.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Premium Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade stainless steel with smooth satin finish; optional SS 316 for medical/pharmaceutical applications.
- **Compact & User-Friendly Design**: Ergonomic bowls with anti-splash edges, optional knee or foot pedal operation.
- **Water Efficient & Sanitary**: Low-flow faucets; compatible with sensor or elbow-operated taps; optional soap dispenser, paper towel holder, or hand dryer integration.
- **Wall-Mounted or Free-Standing**: Adjustable heights and custom fabrication available for specific site conditions.
- **Easy Maintenance**: Integrated drain, removable trap, corrosion-resistant, quick cleaning.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 (Optional SS 316) |
| Mounting Type | Wall-Mounted / Floor-Standing |
| Sink Bowl Size | 14" x 12", 16" x 14", 18" x 16" or Custom |
| Faucet Type | Manual Tap / Foot Pedal / Knee Operated / Sensor-Based |
| Accessories | Soap Dispenser, Towel Rack, Drain Trap |
| Finish | Matt / Satin |
| Installation | With or without splash back |
| Drainage | 1½" or 2" outlet with SS trap |
| Legs (if applicable) | SS tubular with adjustable bullet feet |

### 🏥 Ideal Applications
- Commercial Kitchens & Hotels  
- Restaurants & Cafeterias  
- Hospitals, Clinics & Operation Theatres  
- Food Processing Units & Dairy Plants  
- Institutional Kitchens (Schools, Colleges, Hostels)  
- Pharmaceutical Labs & Research Facilities  
- QSRs, Food Trucks & Cloud Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Available
- Site-specific dimensions & space constraints  
- Faucet type selection (manual/automatic)  
- Optional hygiene features (backsplash, soap dispenser, dryer slot)  
- Plumbing connection layout (left/right/bottom)  
- Material grade selection for corrosive or saline areas  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ Mumbai-based, serving PAN India & exports  
✔ 15+ years of stainless steel fabrication expertise  
✔ Precision laser-cut & argon welded construction  
✔ Compliant with FSSAI, ISO & hygiene norms  
✔ Competitive pricing, long-lasting, customized solutions  
✔ Trusted by top commercial kitchens, hospitals & OEMs  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support & Warranty
- Installation guidance & plumbing schematic  
- One-year warranty on product body & components  
- Spare parts support  
- Technical consultation for kitchen/washroom layouts  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery

- PAN India shipping & export-ready documentation

      longDescription: `The Scrub Sink by SAG Engineering Products is a stainless steel washing station designed for healthcare, pharmaceutical, laboratory, and food processing environments where hand hygiene and infection control are critical. Engineered for easy cleaning, seamless water flow, and touch-free use, our scrub sinks meet the highest levels of sanitation.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated from SS 304 / SS 316 with smooth edges and seamless welds to prevent germ buildup.
- **Hands-Free Operation (Optional)**: Compatible with sensor-based, foot pedal, knee valve, or elbow-operated taps to reduce cross-contamination.
- **Efficient Water Flow & Drainage**: Deep bowls with sloped bottoms, anti-splash features, and integrated strainers.
- **Hygiene-Driven Design**: Rounded corners, optional laminar flow faucets, thermostatic mixers, satin or mirror finish.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 / SS 316, 16–18 gauge |
| Mounting Type | Wall-mounted / Floor-mounted with legs |
| Sink Type | Single, Double, Triple Station |
| Bowl Dimensions | 400–600mm width per user station |
| Operation | Sensor / Foot Pedal / Knee Valve / Manual |
| Water Inlet | ½” BSP Thread (customizable) |
| Drainage | Sloped drain with SS strainer |
| Finish | Satin / Mirror / Matt |
| Add-ons | Soap dispensers, hand dryers, paper towel holders, splash guard panels |

### 🏥 Applications & Use Cases
- Hospitals & Surgical Theaters  
- ICUs & NICUs  
- Diagnostic Labs & Blood Banks  
- Pharmaceutical & Biotech Facilities  
- Food Processing & Packaging Units  
- Cleanrooms & R&D Centers  
- Veterinary Clinics & Animal Labs  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Single, double, or triple user stations  
- Tap operation choice (sensor, knee, foot, manual)  
- Custom dimensions and wall/floor mounting  
- Optional accessories: soap dispensers, sanitizer holders, mirrors, LED lights  
- Under-sink storage or SS splash guards  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Scrub Sink?
✔ Medical-grade stainless steel  
✔ Compliant with hospital hygiene protocols  
✔ Zero splash and easy sterilization  
✔ Single, double, & triple sink models  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with nationwide delivery  
✔ 15+ years of stainless steel fabrication expertise  
✔ Easy to install, operate, and maintain  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support & Service

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery

      shortDescription: 'Self-contained, mobile hand wash station built from SS 304 stainless steel for hygienic handwashing anywhere, without plumbing.',
      longDescription: `Maintain hygiene anywhere, anytime with the Portable Hand Wash Station from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Specially designed for high-footfall commercial and outdoor environments, this compact, self-contained stainless steel unit enables handwashing without permanent plumbing. Ideal for food service operations, event venues, healthcare setups, schools, and temporary worksites, it promotes safety, cleanliness, and compliance.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Self-Contained System – No Plumbing Required**: Independent fresh and waste water tanks with manual, foot-operated, or optional sensor faucet.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 ensures rust resistance, hygiene, and easy maintenance.
- **Portable & Compact Design**: Lightweight, mounted on castor wheels for easy relocation. Fits narrow service areas and mobile kitchens.
- **Touchless Hygiene Options**: Optional sensor faucet and soap dispenser for hands-free operation. Foot pump or elbow tap available.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel (Body, Sink & Frame) |
| Water Supply | Manual Pump / Foot Pedal / Sensor Faucet |
| Fresh Water Tank | 15 to 50 Litres (Customizable) |
| Waste Water Tank | Equal or Separate Capacity (HDPE or SS) |
| Sink Size | 12” x 12” or 15” x 15” standard |
| Soap Dispenser | Manual / Sensor-based (Optional) |
| Power Supply | 220V or Battery Operated (for Sensor Models) |
| Mobility | Heavy-duty Castor Wheels with Lock |
| Mounting | Floor-standing with internal plumbing setup |
| Add-ons | Paper Towel Holder, Mirror, Shelf, Foot Pedal |

### 🏥 Applications & Use Cases
- Catering Units & Outdoor Food Stalls  
- Cloud Kitchens & Pop-Up Kitchens  
- Festivals, Exhibitions & Event Venues  
- Construction Sites & Temporary Offices  
- Schools, Colleges & Coaching Institutes  
- Hospitals, Clinics & Vaccination Booths  
- Factories, Warehouses & Assembly Lines  
- Maritime, Industrial, and Remote Locations  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Tank capacity selection based on daily usage  
- Choice of manual, pedal, or sensor operation  
- Single or double sink station options  
- Add-ons: mirror, splash guards, holders  
- Branding or logo printing for organizations or events  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Expertise  
✔ Rugged SS 304 Construction for Indoor & Outdoor Use  
✔ Plug-and-Use Design – No Plumbing Required  
✔ Fully Mobile – Easy to Transport & Position

✔ PAN India Delivery & Export-Ready Packaging  
✔ Trusted by Hospitals, Caterers, Institutions & Corporates  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Service & Support
- Standard warranty on structural integrity and components  
- Readily available spares (faucets, tanks, dispensers)  
- Responsive service assistance across India

- Fast dispatch from Mumbai-based manufacturing unit

      id: 508,
      name: 'Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Two Unit',
      slug: 'stainless-steel-kitchen-sink-two-unit',
      image: '/Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Two Unit.webp',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Double-bowl stainless steel kitchen sink designed for high-volume, hygienic, and efficient commercial kitchen operations.',
      longDescription: `The Stainless Steel Two-Unit Sink from SAG Engineering Products is the go-to solution for professional kitchens that demand speed, hygiene, and efficiency. Ideal for commercial foodservice setups, industrial canteens, restaurants, hotels, cloud kitchens, and hospitals, this double-bowl sink supports seamless dishwashing, vegetable cleaning, and utensil soaking.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Quality Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 food-grade stainless steel ensures rust resistance, durability, and hygiene. Fully welded design with smooth edges and rounded corners.
- **Two Bowl Design for Multi-Stage Washing**: Dual deep bowls allow separate washing for utensils, vegetables, meat, or dishwashing, maintaining hygiene and workflow efficiency.
- **Ergonomic & Operator-Friendly**: Standard working height of 850 mm, optional splash guard, tapered bowl base, and large drain holes for quick water discharge.
- **Robust Structure & Stability**: Mounted on a heavy-duty SS frame with bracing or undershelf. Adjustable bullet feet for leveling. Supports heavy utensils and continuous use.
- **Easy Cleaning & Maintenance**: Fully welded joints, smooth finish, resistant to scaling, scratches, and limescale. Drain basket, outlet, and strainer included.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Material | SS 304 Food Grade |
| Bowl Count | 2 (Twin Compartment) |
| Bowl Size | 18” x 18” x 10” / 20” x 20” x 12” (customizable) |
| Overall Sink Size | 48” x 24” x 34” / Custom |
| Finish | Matt / Satin |
| Drain Assembly | Yes – With plug, strainer, and outlet |
| Mounting | Free-standing on SS frame |
| Optional Add-Ons | Undershelf, splash guard, garbage chute, pre-rinse unit |
| Usage | Dishwashing / Vegetable Cleaning / Equipment Soaking |

### 🏭 Applications & Use Cases
- Restaurants & Hotels – Pre-rinse and dishwashing zones  
- Cloud Kitchens & Takeaways – Compact and efficient  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens – High throughput  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Kitchens – Food-grade hygiene compliance  
- Cafeterias & Corporate Kitchens – Streamlined cleaning  
- Food Trucks & Portable Kitchens – Folding leg version optional  
- Food Processing Units – Raw material washing

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Number of bowls: single, double, triple, quadruple  
- Sink depth based on vessels and workflow  
- Pre-rinse nozzles and tap hole positions  
- Integrated splash guard or drainboard  
- Undershelf, waste chute, or side platforms  
- Wall-mount, under-counter, or trolley-based setup  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Made from AISI 304 Stainless Steel  
✔ Heavy-Duty & High-Volume Washing  
✔ Precision Fabricated in Mumbai  
✔ Custom Sizes, Features, & Finish  
✔ Long Life, Low Maintenance, Rust-Proof  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Excellence  
✔ Export-Ready Standards & Nationwide Supply  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- Installation & drainage guidance  
- One-year warranty on welding and fabrication  
- Maintenance support and spare components  
- Responsive service team across India  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Robust bubble wrap + wooden crate (on request)  
- Quick dispatch from Mumbai facility  
- PAN India shipping & export support

👉 [Get a Quote] | 👉 [Download Product Sheet] | 👉 [Book Free Kitchen Design Consultation]`,

      id: 509,
      name: 'Waste Dish Collection Trolley',

      longDescription: `The Waste Dish Collection Trolley from SAG Engineering Products is a must-have utility for maintaining cleanliness and efficiency in busy food service environments. Ideal for hotels, restaurants, canteens, banquet halls, food courts, and institutional kitchens, this trolley simplifies post-meal cleanup and enhances hygiene, speed, and professionalism.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Rugged Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated with SS 304-grade stainless steel for durability, rust resistance, and food-safe hygiene. Smooth welds and rounded edges for safety and easy cleaning.
- **Dual-Function Design**: Separate compartments for used dishes, cutlery, and wet/dry waste. Optional removable plastic or SS bins, sloped surfaces, and waste chutes available.
- **Mobility & Ease of Use**: High-quality castor wheels (2 with brakes) for smooth movement, ergonomic dual-side handles, and heavy-duty ball-bearing wheels for silent rolling.
- **Customizable Layout**: Single, double, or triple-shelf options, add-ons like tray-sliding rails, bag holders, lid-covered bins, and utensil holders. Dimensions and compartments configurable per workflow.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Frame Type | Welded or bolted structure |
| No. of Shelves | 1 / 2 / 3 levels |
| Top Design | Flat / Sloped with bin opening |
| Container Bins | SS / Plastic removable bins |
| Handle | Dual side ergonomic SS handle |
| Wheel Type | 4" or 5" PU/Nylon Castor Wheels (2 with brake) |
| Finish | Matte / Semi-gloss polish |
| Dimensions | Standard: 900x600x850 mm or customizable |
| Load Capacity | Up to 100–120 kg |
| Optional Add-ons | Bin lids, bag holders, side panels, tray rails |

### 🏨 Ideal Applications
- Hotels & Fine Dining Restaurants  
- Corporate Pantries & Canteens  
- Banquet Halls & Party Lawns  
- College, School & Hospital Kitchens  
- Food Courts & Central Kitchens

- Railway, Airport & Shipboard Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Available

- Tray return shelves or removable dish racks

- Anti-spill side barriers or back guards

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering?

    {
      id: 510,
      name: 'Food Waste Disposer',
      slug: 'food-waste-disposer',
      image: '/Food Waste Disposer.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial-grade food waste disposer for hygienic, eco-friendly, and efficient organic waste management in kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Food Waste Disposer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, provides hygienic, eco-friendly, and space-saving waste management for commercial kitchens. It grinds and disposes of organic food waste instantly, reducing odors, preventing blockages, and ensuring a clean, safe kitchen environment.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Instant Waste Disposal**: Grinds vegetable peels, leftovers, meat scraps, bones, and shells into fine slurry and flushes directly into the drain system.
- **Heavy-Duty Motor**: High-torque induction motor for continuous operation; handles 250–1000+ kg of waste per day depending on model.
- **Corrosion-Resistant Construction**: Made from SS 304/316 stainless steel for long-lasting durability and suitability in wet environments.
- **Safe & User-Friendly Operation**: Safety interlocks, splash guards, overload protection, push-button start/stop, optional foot pedal for hands-free use.
- **Compact Under-Sink Design**: Fits beneath sinks, prep counters, or dishwash stations, saving floor space.
- **Eco-Friendly Waste Management**: Reduces waste volume by over 70%, minimizes odors, fly infestation, and blocked drains.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Parameter | Specification |
|-----------|---------------|
| Body Material | SS 304/316 Stainless Steel |
| Motor Power | 0.75 HP to 5 HP |
| Waste Processing Capacity | 250–1000+ kg/day |
| Power Supply | 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase |
| Grinding Chamber | Stainless steel with alloy grinding elements |
| Mounting | Under-sink or floor-mounted |
| Drain Connection | Standard 2” / 3” BSP |
| Control Panel | IP-rated with push button or foot pedal |
| Noise Level | Low-noise operation with sound insulation |
| Safety Features | Overload protection, anti-splash, auto shutdown |

### 🏭 Applications
- Hotels & Resorts  
- Restaurants & Cloud Kitchens  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Commercial Kitchens in Schools & Colleges  
- Food Courts, Airports & Railway Kitchens  
- Central Kitchens & Catering Units  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Size variations based on under-sink space  
- Motor capacity according to daily waste volume  
- Drain & plumbing compatibility adjustments  
- Foot pedal or automatic sensor activation  
- Optional grease trap integration  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Food Waste Disposer?
✔ Made in India with global quality standards  
✔ Designed for 24/7 commercial kitchen operation  
✔ Corrosion-free stainless steel construction  
✔ High grinding efficiency and low noise  
✔ Simple installation & maintenance  
✔ Custom-built to kitchen size and operational needs  
✔ 15+ years of experience in kitchen equipment manufacturing  

### 🛎️ After-Sales Support
- One-year warranty on motor and components  
- Installation guidance and plumbing support  
- On-call technical assistance and repair services  
- Spare parts availability across India  
- Preventive maintenance options for large kitchens  

### 📦 Packaging & Delivery
- Rugged packaging with foam or wooden casing  
- PAN India shipping with installation support in metros  
- Export-grade packaging available

      id: 511,
      name: 'Clean Dish Rack',
      slug: 'clean-dish-rack',
      image: '/Clean Dish Rack.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty stainless steel dish rack for hygienic, organized, and efficient drying and storage of utensils in commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Keep your kitchen spotless, organized, and efficient with the Clean Dish Rack by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai’s trusted name in stainless steel kitchen solutions. Designed for commercial kitchens that handle high volumes of dishwashing and sanitization, our clean dish racks offer a robust and hygienic solution for drying, stacking, and storing washed utensils, plates, trays, and cutlery.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: Made from SS 304 food-grade stainless steel, corrosion-resistant, rust-proof, and safe for utensils. Welded joints and smooth edges ensure durability and hygiene.
- **Multi-Tier Shelving Design**: 2-tier, 3-tier, or 4-tier configurations; accommodates plates, trays, pans, bowls, and containers. Strong horizontal slats or perforated shelves allow quick drainage and air drying.
- **Optimized for Hygiene & Air Circulation**: Open-frame design minimizes moisture retention and bacterial growth. Optional perforated trays at the bottom for easy cleaning.
- **Space-Saving & Efficient**: Maximizes vertical storage; suitable for wall-mounted, floor-standing, or mobile units with castor wheels.
- **High Load-Bearing Capacity**: Each tier reinforced for dozens of plates or heavy utensils without bending.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel (Food Grade) |
| Structure | Welded Frame, Heavy-Duty Square or Round Tubing |
| Tier Options | 2, 3, or 4 Tiers |
| Dimensions | Standard: 36", 48", 60", 72" Length or Custom |
| Shelf Type | Flat SS Sheet / Perforated / Slotted Shelves |
| Legs | SS 1.5" / 2" Dia with Adjustable Bullet Feet |
| Mobility | Optional Heavy-Duty Nylon or PU Castors |
| Finish | Matt Finish, Polished Edges |
| Drainage Tray | Optional at Base Tier |
| Back & Side Splash | Optional Guards Available |

### 🧼 Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Fine-Dining Restaurants  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Hospital Kitchens & Food Service Units  
- Schools, Colleges & Hostels  
- Catering Facilities & Banquet Halls  
- Centralized Warewashing Units  
- Marine & Offshore Kitchens  

### 🛠️ Customization Options
- Custom width, height, and depth  
- Tier configurations based on plate/tray sizes  
- Splash guards, under-shelves, and hooks  
- Mobile dish racks with locking wheels  
- Wall-mounted designs for compact kitchens  

### 💡 Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Clean Dish Rack?
✔ Premium SS 304 – Long-Lasting & Food-Safe  
✔ Heavy-Duty Structure – Handles High Volume with Ease  
✔ Hygienic, Rustproof, and Easy to Clean  
✔ Custom Built to Fit Your Space & Operation  
✔ Ideal for Wet & Dry Dish Storage  
✔ Designed & Manufactured in Mumbai  
✔ 15+ Years of Engineering Excellence

      id: 512,
      name: 'Pot Rack ',
      slug: 'pot-rack',
      image: '/Pot Rack.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-washing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Durable, hygienic, and space-saving stainless steel pot rack for organized storage of pots, pans, and kitchen vessels in commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Pot Rack from SAG Engineering Products is a heavy-duty, stainless steel storage solution designed to efficiently hold pots, pans, and kitchen vessels in commercial foodservice environments. Ideal for hotels, industrial canteens, cloud kitchens, or restaurants, it ensures smooth kitchen operations and HACCP compliance.

Engineered with precision and crafted from high-grade stainless steel, our pot racks offer strength, hygiene, and long-term performance while saving valuable kitchen space.

### ✅ Key Features & Benefits
- **Robust Stainless Steel Construction**: Made using SS 304 food-grade stainless steel for corrosion, rust, and moisture resistance. Welded structure with high load-bearing capacity.
- **Multi-Tiered Design**: 2, 3, 4, or 5 shelves with generous spacing for varied pot sizes. Shelves reinforced to prevent sagging.
- **Open Frame for Air Circulation**: Promotes airflow, quick drying, and prevents bacterial growth. Easy access from all sides.
- **Space-Saving & Easy to Install**: Wall-mounted, free-standing, and corner models. Maximizes vertical space in compact kitchens.
- **Custom Fabrication Available**: Options for perforated/solid shelves, adjustable height, and castor wheels for mobility.

### 🔧 Technical Specifications
| Feature | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel |
| Shelf Type | Slatted / Solid / Perforated |
| No. of Shelves | 2 to 5 (customizable) |
| Shelf Spacing | 300–450 mm (adjustable) |
| Load Capacity | 50–80 kg per shelf |
| Mounting Options | Free-Standing / Wall-Mounted / Corner |

    {
      id: 601,
      name: 'Commercial Refrigeration',
      slug: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      image: '/commercial refrigeration.jpeg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Reliable cooling and smart storage solutions for commercial kitchens, designed for durability, hygiene, and energy efficiency.',
      longDescription: `Keep your food products fresh, beverages chilled, and ingredients safely preserved with Commercial Refrigeration Solutions from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for durability, hygiene, and energy efficiency, our refrigeration equipment is a perfect fit for restaurants, hotels, bakeries, food courts, cloud kitchens, supermarkets, and institutional kitchens.

Whether you're storing perishable ingredients or displaying ready-to-eat items, our refrigeration systems offer optimal cooling performance, robust construction, and low operating costs — even in the demanding temperature conditions of India.

### Product Range We Offer
- Vertical Reach-in Refrigerators (Single, Double, or Triple Door)
- Undercounter Chillers & Freezers
- Worktop Refrigerators with GN Pan Compatibility
- Display Refrigerators (Glass Door / Curved Glass)
- Bakery Display Counters – Refrigerated & Ambient
- Deep Freezers – Horizontal & Vertical
- Back Bar Chillers & Beverage Coolers
- Salad Counters with Refrigerated Base
- Cold Storage Rooms (Modular Walk-ins)
- Custom-Built SS Refrigeration Units

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Engineered for Performance**: Heavy-duty cooling systems with Embraco, Danfoss, Tecumseh, or equivalent compressors.
- **Temperature Accuracy**: Digital controllers with adjustable temperature ranges and separate evaporator coils.
- **Hygienic & Durable Build**: SS 304/202 bodies, rounded corners, removable shelves, CFC-free PUF insulation.
- **Optimized Storage & Ergonomics**: GN pan-compatible shelves, adjustable racking, soft-closing doors, ergonomic handles.
- **Energy Efficient**: Eco-friendly refrigerants, high-efficiency insulation, low-power LED lighting.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 / SS 202 (Inside & Outside)
- Cooling Type: Static / Ventilated (Fan-cooled)
- Compressor: Embraco / Tecumseh / Danfoss
- Temperature Range: -18°C to +10°C (varies by model)
- Power Supply: 230V / 50Hz – Single Phase
- Insulation: 40–60 mm CFC-free PUF
- Controller: Digital Thermostat with Display
- Door Type: Solid / Glass / Sliding / Hinged
- Defrost Type: Manual / Automatic (based on model)
- Mobility: Fixed legs / Heavy-duty castor wheels
- Warranty: 1 year standard, extended available

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels, Restaurants & Catering Kitchens (HoReCa)
- Cloud Kitchens & Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)
- Bakery & Confectionery Outlets
- Supermarkets & Grocery Stores
- Institutional Kitchens – Schools, Hospitals, Corporates
- Food Processing Units & Cold Storage Warehouses
- Juice Counters, Cafes, Bars & Ice Cream Parlors

### Customization Options
- SS Finish or Powder-Coated Body (Color display models)
- Adjustable shelving layouts
- Glass or solid doors based on usage
- Integrated worktop chillers with sink or GN tray layout
- Freezer & chiller combo units
- Corner-model display fridges
- Cold room panels, doors, and shelving

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ 15+ Years of Refrigeration & Kitchen Equipment Expertise  
✔ In-House Manufacturing in Mumbai  
✔ Customization Flexibility for All Models  
✔ Food-Grade Materials with Corrosion Resistance  
✔ Energy-Efficient, Low-Noise Operation  
✔ Export-Ready Fabrication & Quality Standards  
✔ Full Technical Support & Spare Parts Availability  

### After-Sales Support
- Warranty coverage for compressor and body
- On-site servicing and AMC (Annual Maintenance Contracts)
- PAN India delivery, installation assistance, and spare part support
- Dedicated support team for breakdowns and troubleshooting

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-quality packaging with foam and crate support
- Fast dispatch timelines for standard models
- Custom logistics planning for projects & chain rollouts
- Global shipping support available for overseas buyers

### Request a Quote or Consultation
- Share your layout for a tailored quote
- Need a complete kitchen cooling plan? Let our experts assist
- Connect with us for demos, pricing & project supply
`,

    {
      id: 602,
      name: 'Visi Cooler',
      slug: 'visi-cooler',
      image: '',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Attractive display and maximum cooling with Visi Coolers, built for energy-efficient, reliable performance in retail and commercial environments.',
      longDescription: `Showcase your beverages and perishable items in style with the Visi Cooler from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a premium display refrigeration unit designed for high visibility, consistent cooling, and energy efficiency. Whether you're running a retail store, restaurant, café, supermarket, or convenience counter, our Visi Coolers help you store and present chilled products in the most professional and appealing way.

Equipped with clear glass doors, LED lighting, and advanced refrigeration technology, our units are perfect for storing cold drinks, dairy products, juices, desserts, and packaged foods while enhancing your merchandising value.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Crystal Clear Product Visibility**: Transparent double-glass door with anti-condensation coating. Bright LED lighting ensures optimal display.
- **Efficient Cooling System**: Uniform cooling even in high ambient conditions. Built-in high-efficiency compressor with eco-friendly refrigerant (R-134a / R-290). Maintains 2°C to 8°C for beverages and perishables.
- **Robust Construction**: Powder-coated steel or stainless steel body, food-grade ABS/aluminium interior, self-closing doors with magnetic gasket.
- **Energy-Efficient Operation**: Insulated body, intelligent temperature control, low-power LED lighting, low maintenance.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Adjustable wire shelves, lockable doors, digital temperature display, and thermostat control.

### Technical Specifications
- Type: Single / Double Door Visi Cooler
- Capacity: 200L – 1000L (model dependent)
- Temperature Range: 2°C to 8°C
- Refrigerant: R-134a / R-290 (Eco-friendly)
- Cooling Type: Ventilated / Static with Fan
- Compressor: Hermetically Sealed, Heavy-Duty
- Body Material: Powder-Coated Steel / SS Optional
- Door Type: Glass, Self-Closing, Lockable
- Shelves: Adjustable, Coated Wire
- Lighting: Internal LED
- Thermostat: Digital / Manual (model specific)
- Power Supply: 230V AC, Single Phase
- Wheels: Optional Castor Wheels for Mobility
- Usage: Indoor Only

### Applications & Use Cases
- Retail Stores & Supermarkets
- Cafés, Bakeries & Quick Service Restaurants
- Juice Bars & Dairy Shops
- Ice Cream Parlours & Beverage Counters
- Canteens, Hospitals & Educational Institutions
- Hotels, Airports, Malls & Commercial Complexes

### Customization Options
- Custom branding / sticker printing on panels
- Optional back-lit canopy for promotional display
- Body color customization (white, black, or brand colors)
- Shelf quantity adjustment
- Locking castors for easy movement
- Custom signage and side panels for retail chains

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Visi Coolers?
✔ Manufactured by Experts in Mumbai with 15+ Years’ Experience  
✔ Retail-Ready Refrigeration Units with Premium Display Features  
✔ Designed for Indian Climate – Performs in High Ambient Conditions  
✔ Custom Size, Branding & Electrical Options Available  
✔ Easy to Use, Easy to Maintain  
✔ Reliable Warranty & Service Support Across India  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Export Support Available

### After-Sales Service & Support
- Standard warranty on compressor and components
- Installation & usage guidance (video or onsite on request)
- Prompt after-sales support
- Spare parts and service available across India

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-resistant, foam-padded packaging for transit safety
- Wooden crating (for export orders)
- Timely dispatch with real-time logistics tracking
- PAN India & International Shipping Available

### Request a Quote
- Send us your size or branding requirement
- Assistance in selecting the right model
- Call our expert team for consultation or dealer pricing
`,

      id: 603,
      name: 'Kitchen Refrigerator ',
      slug: 'kitchen-refrigerator',
      image: '/commercial refrigerator 1.jpeg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Reliable commercial kitchen refrigerators offering hygienic storage, efficient cooling, and energy-saving operation for hotels, restaurants, and catering units.',
      longDescription: `Keep your ingredients fresh, your operations efficient, and your kitchen compliant with industry standards using the Kitchen Refrigerator by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Specially engineered for commercial kitchens, hotels, restaurants, and catering units, our refrigerators offer high-capacity storage with optimal temperature control — ensuring freshness, hygiene, and energy efficiency round the clock.

Built using premium-grade stainless steel and powered by high-performance refrigeration components, our kitchen refrigerators are designed for Indian conditions and high-usage environments.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Efficient Cooling System**: Advanced cooling technology delivers uniform temperature distribution. Designed for tropical climates. Available in chiller, freezer, or combo variants.
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction**: Entirely SS 304-grade inside & outside. Corrosion-resistant, hygienic, easy-to-clean with rounded welded interiors.
- **High Storage Capacity**: 1-door, 2-door, 4-door, and 6-door models. Adjustable shelves, GN pan compatibility for chef convenience.
- **Energy-Efficient Operation**: Eco-friendly compressors, thick PUF insulation (40–60mm), automatic defrost, low-noise operation.
- **Digital Temperature Control**: Digital display and thermostat with precise control. Audible alarms and safety cut-offs on premium models.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 (Inside & Outside)
- Insulation: High-Density PUF (40–60 mm)
- Door Options: 1, 2, 4, 6 Stainless Steel Doors
- Temperature Range: -2°C to +8°C (Chiller) / -18°C to -22°C (Freezer)
- Cooling Type: Ventilated / Static Cooling
- Refrigerant Used: R-134a / R-404a (Eco-friendly)
- Compressor: High-efficiency Hermetically Sealed
- Shelving: Adjustable SS Wire / Perforated GN Shelves
- Power Supply: 230V / 50Hz – Single Phase
- Mounting Type: Legs / Castor Wheels (Optional)
- Control Panel: Digital Temp Controller with Display
- Optional Accessories: GN Pan Tray Guides, Lockable Doors, Lighting

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Kitchens
- Restaurants, Bakeries & Cafés
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Outlets
- Catering Kitchens & Commissaries
- Hospitals & Institutional Kitchens
- Airlines, Railways, and Marine Galleys
- Industrial and Corporate Canteens

### Customization Options
- Size customization based on kitchen layout
- Top-mounted or bottom-mounted compressor options
- Interior configurations with GN-compatible racking
- Static or forced-air cooling based on product type
- Option to add glass doors for display refrigerators

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Kitchen Refrigerator?
✔ Built for 24/7 Commercial Operation  
✔ SS 304 for Hygiene and Long-Term Durability  
✔ Tropical Rated Cooling for Indian Conditions  
✔ Energy-Efficient & Environmentally Safe  
✔ Export Quality Standards  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Installation Support  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Excellence in Kitchen Equipment

### After-Sales Support
- One-year standard warranty on compressor and electricals
- Installation guidance and documentation
- Prompt support for service and parts replacement

### Packaging & Delivery

- Suitable for road, rail, or international shipping
- Professional handling and on-time dispatch across India & abroad

### Request a Quote
- Email your layout and requirements
- Customization based on space & usage
- Expert consultation and dealer pricing
`,

      id: 604,
      name: 'Under Counter Refrigerator And Pizza Makeline ',
      slug: 'under-counter-refrigerator-and-pizza-makeline',
      image: '/UC Refrigeration & Pizza Makeline.png',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Dual-function undercounter refrigerator with prep counter and pizza makeline, designed for commercial kitchens, QSRs, and cloud kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Maximize efficiency and streamline operations with the Under Counter Refrigerator & Pizza Makeline from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — an all-in-one cold storage and prep station designed for high-performance kitchens. Built to serve restaurants, pizzerias, QSRs, cloud kitchens, and food courts, this unit combines refrigerated ingredient storage with a stainless steel prep counter, complete with a top makeline for pans or containers.

Crafted from premium-grade stainless steel and powered by efficient refrigeration systems, this equipment is ideal for assembling pizzas, sandwiches, salads, burgers, and wraps in a fast-paced, space-conscious setting.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual Functionality – Prep + Storage**: Refrigerated undercounter cabinet for perishables, stainless steel top counter for prep, top ingredient makeline with GN pan compatibility.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade full body, insulated panels, rounded internal corners, removable trays for hygiene.
- **Powerful & Silent Refrigeration**: High-efficiency eco-friendly compressor, stable temperature maintenance, single/double/triple door models, adjustable shelves.
- **Digital Temperature Control**: Accurate electronic controller, +2°C to +8°C range, auto defrost, fan-assisted cooling.
- **Custom Pizza Makeline Features**: Optional granite or SS top, GN pan top rail, lift-up glass sneeze guard, insulated canopy, UV-stabilized covers.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- Refrigeration Type: Static or Ventilated (Fan-cooled)
- Cooling Range: +2°C to +8°C
- Compressor: Imported / Branded (Emerson, Tecumseh, etc.)
- Power Supply: 230V AC / 50 Hz
- Insulation: CFC-free high-density polyurethane (PUF)
- Pan Compatibility: GN 1/6, 1/4, or customized layouts
- Top Surface: SS or Granite (optional)
- Door Options: Single / Double / Triple
- Castors: Lockable wheels (optional)
- Controls: Digital thermostat with auto cut-off

### Applications & Use Cases
- Pizza Restaurants & Italian Kitchens
- QSR Chains & Cloud Kitchens
- Cafés, Sandwich Bars & Salad Counters
- Burger Joints & Street Food Outlets
- Buffet Lines & Hotel Kitchens
- Institutional Kitchens & Canteens

### Customization Options
- Variable door sizes and cabinet depth
- Custom GN pan layouts (top rail)
- Choice of flat top, granite top, or sneeze-guard counter
- Option to integrate chiller or freezer cabinet
- Side-mounted or bottom-mounted compressor
- Add-on backsplash, overhead shelves, or drawer configurations
- Combo units with dough kneading or baking zones

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Under Counter Refrigerator & Pizza Makeline?
✔ Premium Build with SS 304 Construction  
✔ Dual Purpose: Cooling + Assembly Station  
✔ Space-Saving Design for Compact Kitchens  
✔ Fast & Consistent Cooling with Digital Control  
✔ Fully Customizable to Match Menu and Workflow  
✔ Ideal for Front-of-House & Back-End Kitchens

- Delivery timelines customized per project

    {
      id: 605,
      name: 'Chest Freezer',
      slug: 'chest-freezer',
      image: '/Chest Freezer.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Energy-efficient chest freezer with high-capacity, durable storage for commercial kitchens, supermarkets, and retail cold storage.',
      longDescription: `The Chest Freezer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is designed for commercial users who require large-capacity, low-temperature storage with consistent cooling performance and reliability. Ideal for preserving frozen foods, dairy products, meats, desserts, ice cream, and more, our freezers are built to perform in high-load, high-ambient environments typical of Indian kitchens and retail spaces.

Whether you run a restaurant, supermarket, hotel kitchen, dairy shop, or food distribution business, our chest freezer provides the temperature stability, energy efficiency, and long service life your operation demands.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Robust Cooling Performance**: Advanced compressor and coil system for uniform freezing, fast pull-down temperature, adjustable -18°C to -24°C range.
- **High-Capacity Storage**: Sizes 200L to 800+L, single or double lids, removable storage baskets.
- **Durable, Corrosion-Resistant Body**: Powder-coated steel or optional SS 304 body, aluminum or galvanized inner liner, heavy-duty hinged lids with lockable system.
- **Energy-Efficient Design**: Eco-friendly refrigerants (R134a / R600a / R290), thick PUF insulation (60–80 mm), digital thermostat in premium models.
- **User-Friendly Operation**: Manual temperature knob, drain plug, optional smooth castor wheels, internal LED lighting (select models).

### Technical Specifications
- Capacity Range: 200L to 800L+
- Temperature Range: -18°C to -24°C
- Refrigerant: R134a / R600a / R290
- Outer Body: Powder-Coated Steel / SS 304 (Optional)
- Inner Liner: Aluminum / Pre-Painted Galvanized Steel
- Insulation: High-Density PUF, 60–80mm
- No. of Lids: Single / Double (hinged, lockable)
- Cooling Type: Static Cooling with Inner Coil
- Compressor: Hermetically Sealed, Heavy-Duty
- Power Supply: 230V / 50Hz – Single Phase
- Mobility: Optional Wheels
- Thermostat: Mechanical / Digital (Based on Model)
- Accessories: Storage Baskets, Defrost Plug, Lock

### Applications & Use Cases
- Restaurants & Commercial Kitchens
- Supermarkets & Grocery Stores
- Ice Cream & Dessert Parlors
- Catering & Cloud Kitchens
- Dairy Farms & Cold Storage Units
- Meat, Poultry & Seafood Retailers
- Pharmaceutical Cold Chain Storage
- Institutional Canteens & Food Distribution Centers

### Customization Available
- Custom freezer sizes and internal configurations
- Dual-compartment models with fridge-freezer zones
- Lockable lids with branding options
- Digital temperature display and alarm system
- Solar-compatible options (on request)

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Chest Freezer?
✔ Built for Indian Commercial Conditions  
✔ Premium Quality, Long Service Life  
✔ Wide Range of Capacities  
✔ Energy-Saving and Environmentally Friendly  
✔ After-Sales Support Across India  
✔ Fast Delivery and Installation Support  
✔ Over 15 Years of Engineering Excellence  

### After-Sales Support
- One-year standard warranty on components
- Installation and troubleshooting assistance
- Availability of compressor parts and storage baskets
- AMC and preventive maintenance plans (on request)

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-grade, shock-resistant packaging
- PAN India logistics and door-step delivery
- Bulk orders for retail chains and franchise outlets
- International shipment support with compliance documents

### Request a Quote Today
- Send your capacity requirement
- Request custom-sized units
- Speak to refrigeration experts for guidance
`,

    {
      id: 606,
      name: 'Hard Top Chest Freezer',
      slug: 'hard-top-chest-freezer',
      image: '/Hard Top Chest Freezer.jpeg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Reliable hard-top chest freezer for commercial and industrial use, offering superior cooling performance, energy efficiency, and large storage capacity.',
      longDescription: `The Hard Top Chest Freezer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is your dependable partner in cold storage. Designed for commercial and industrial use, this freezer delivers robust cooling performance, large storage capacity, and superior energy efficiency — ideal for restaurants, hotels, supermarkets, cloud kitchens, bakeries, and pharmaceutical facilities.

Built with a corrosion-resistant body, a high-efficiency compressor, and long-lasting insulation, our chest freezers ensure safe, uniform, and consistent preservation of perishable items. Whether storing frozen foods, meats, dairy, or medical supplies, this unit guarantees dependable performance even in India’s most demanding climates.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Superior Cooling Performance**: Rapid cooling up to -25°C, uniform temperature distribution, and quick pull-down time.
- **Hard Top Lid Design**: Solid insulated lid(s) for minimal heat ingress and consistent internal temperature.
- **Durable & Corrosion-Resistant Body**: Powder-coated GI or optional SS 304 outer body; embossed aluminum or pre-coated steel inner liner.
- **High-Efficiency Compressor & Insulation**: Low-noise compressor, 60–70mm PUF insulation, eco-friendly refrigerant (R134a / R600a).
- **User-Friendly Operation**: Adjustable thermostat, indicator lights, defrost drain, lockable lid(s), optional castor wheels.

### Technical Specifications
- Storage Capacity: 100 to 800 Liters
- Temperature Range: -18°C to -25°C
- Cooling Type: Static Cooling
- Compressor: Hermetically sealed, high-efficiency
- Body Material: Powder-Coated GI / SS 304 (Optional)
- Inner Chamber: Embossed Aluminum / Pre-coated Steel
- Insulation: PUF – 60–70 mm
- Power Supply: 230V / 50Hz, Single Phase
- Lid Type: Solid hard top (single/double)
- Wheels: Heavy-duty castors (optional)
- Locking System: Built-in lock with key
- Accessories: Baskets (optional), LED internal light

### Ideal Applications
- Hotels & Restaurants
- Catering & Cloud Kitchens
- Supermarkets & Grocery Stores
- Pharmaceuticals & Labs
- Dairy Farms & Ice Cream Parlors

### Customization Options
- Custom sizes and multi-compartment options
- Dual-mode functionality (freezer + chiller)
- Choice of inner lining: Aluminum / SS / PCGI
- Custom branding or logo placement
- Voltage stabilizer and energy monitoring (optional)

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Chest Freezer?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, trusted nationwide  
✔ 15+ years of expertise in refrigeration and kitchen equipment  
✔ Energy-efficient & durable design for 24/7 operation  
✔ Full range of capacities from 100 to 800 liters  
✔ Easy maintenance & nationwide support  
✔ Ready for bulk orders and export supply  
✔ Backed by responsive after-sales service  

### After-Sales Service & Support
- Installation assistance and usage training
- Warranty on compressor and electrical components
- Availability of spare parts across India
- Service support within 24–48 hours in major cities

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-resistant, export-quality packaging
- PAN India delivery with professional logistics
- Export-ready documentation for international shipments

### Request a Freezer
- Send capacity requirements
- Custom model design available
- Consultation and pricing assistance
`,

    {
      id: 607,
      name: 'Fried Ice Creme and Ice Maker',
      slug: 'fried-ice-creme-and-ice-maker',
      image: '/Fried Ice Creame & Ice Maker.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Commercial Fried Ice Cream Machine and Ice Maker for cafés, dessert parlors, restaurants, and catering services — energy-efficient, reliable, and easy to maintain.',
      longDescription: `Take your dessert service to the next level with the Fried Ice Cream Machine and Ice Maker from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a smart combination of freezing innovation and commercial-grade reliability. Designed for creative, live, and premium ice-based desserts, our machines are ideal for cafés, food courts, dessert parlors, restaurants, catering services, and event kitchens.

Whether you're crafting hand-rolled fried ice cream on a cold plate or producing crystal-clear ice cubes for beverages, our machines offer flawless performance, energy efficiency, and easy maintenance in a compact, user-friendly design.

### 1. Fried Ice Cream Machine (Cold Plate)
**Live Rolling. Instant Freezing. Endless Possibilities.**

- High-efficiency freezing plate reaching -25°C to -35°C in minutes
- Instant freezing of ice cream mix, fruits, syrups, and other ingredients
- Perfect for live counters and open kitchens
- Food-grade stainless steel plate with corrosion-resistant outer body
- Built-in compressor with fast cooldown and recovery
- Easy to clean surface and low noise operation

**Specifications:**
- Plate Size: 500mm x 500mm (standard) or customizable
- Cooling Temp: -25°C to -35°C
- Power Supply: 220V / 50Hz, Single Phase
- Refrigerant: R404A or Eco-friendly Gas
- Compressor: In-built, heavy-duty (Emerson, Tecumseh, or equivalent)
- Body Material: SS 304 with insulation
- Mounting: Countertop / Trolley-mounted
- Control: Manual or Digital Panel (optional)

**Applications:**
- Roll ice cream (Thai-style)
- Frozen desserts with mix-ins
- Live event counters (weddings, fairs, malls)
- Quick dessert assembly in high-end kitchens

### 2. Commercial Ice Maker
**Clear Cubes. Continuous Supply. Built to Last.**

- Fully automatic ice cube production
- Produces hard, slow-melting, crystal-clear cubes
- Heavy-duty SS construction, corrosion-proof evaporator
- Energy-efficient with auto-cut off when bin is full
- Built-in water filtration for hygiene
- Compact design fits under counters or standalone setups

**Specifications:**
- Ice Type: Cube / Bullet / Nugget
- Production Capacity: 25 kg – 100 kg/day
- Bin Storage: 10 kg – 50 kg
- Body Material: SS 304
- Power Supply: 220V / 50Hz, Single Phase
- Cooling System: Air-cooled or Water-cooled
- Control System: Fully automatic with sensor-based shutoff
- Refrigerant: R134a / R404a (Eco-safe)
- Dimensions: Varies per capacity model

**Applications:**
- Bars, Pubs & Nightclubs
- Hotels & Fine Dine Restaurants
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)
- Cafés & Beverage Lounges
- Food Trucks & Outdoor Catering Units
- Industrial/Institutional Kitchens

### Customization Options
- Custom trolley or stand with branding for live fried ice cream station
- Dual plate machines for high-volume output
- Choice of ice cube size and type
- Integration with refrigerated counters or ice storage bins
- Add-ons like LED lighting, wheels, umbrellas, and branding panels

### Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with export-grade quality  
✔ 15+ years of expertise in stainless steel & foodservice equipment  
✔ Energy-efficient, low-maintenance machines with rapid ROI  
✔ Reliable after-sales support, warranty, and spare parts availability  
✔ Custom-built designs to suit every commercial kitchen or retail setup  
✔ PAN India delivery with export support  

### After-Sales Support
- One-year warranty on machinery and compressors
- Installation and operator training
- Full technical support for setup, repairs & preventive maintenance
- Spare parts available across major cities in India

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-standard wooden crates or shock-proof packaging
- Fast dispatch timelines (7–10 working days)
- Nationwide logistics support
- Installation-ready delivery with plug-and-play setup
`,

    {
      id: 608,
      name: 'Kulfi Counter',
      slug: 'kulfi-counter',
      image: '/Kulfi Counter.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Professional Kulfi Counter for sweet shops, dessert parlours, hotels, and catering services — hygienic, energy-efficient, and customizable for traditional frozen desserts.',
      longDescription: `Add charm, efficiency, and hygiene to your dessert presentation with the Kulfi Counter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed specifically for Indian frozen desserts like kulfi, falooda, ice gola, and matka kulfi, this counter offers a perfect blend of refrigeration, visibility, and hygiene — ideal for sweet shops, dessert parlours, hotels, catering events, and food courts.

Crafted with food-grade stainless steel and integrated with reliable refrigeration, our kulfi counters are engineered for consistent cooling, eye-catching display, and long-lasting durability — a must-have for every traditional dessert business.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Efficient Cooling System**: Static or forced air cooling for uniform temperature, maintaining -10°C to -20°C. High-performance compressor suitable for Indian climates.
- **SS Body with Attractive Display**: Made entirely of SS 304 stainless steel for rust-proof, hygienic, food-safe surfaces. Optional acrylic or curved glass top for visibility and hygiene.
- **Versatile Usage Design**: Standard flat-top or glass-top display models. Customizable compartments for kulfi sticks, matka kulfi, falooda ingredients, or gola stations.
- **Durable & Low-Maintenance**: Energy-efficient insulation, heavy-duty compressor, removable trays, and easy-to-clean design.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Cooling Type**: Static / Glycol Bath / Air-Cooled (Customizable)
- **Compressor**: Hermetically Sealed – Energy Efficient
- **Temperature Range**: -10°C to -20°C
- **Capacity**: 6 to 24 kulfi molds or as per requirement
- **Display Type**: Flat Top / Glass Top (Optional)
- **Insulation**: PUF Insulated
- **Lighting**: Optional LED Illumination
- **Mobility**: Fixed Legs or Castor Wheels (Optional)
- **Finish**: Matt or Glossy SS
- **Power Supply**: 230V AC, Single Phase

### Applications
- Kulfi Shops & Sweet Parlours
- Ice Cream & Dessert Counters
- Catering Services & Outdoor Events
- Buffets in Hotels & Banquets
- Themed Food Courts & Malls
- Street Food Vendors & Gola Counters

### Customization Options
- Removable kulfi molds or matka holders
- Add-on compartments for falooda toppings or syrups
- Custom branding panels with LED backlighting
- Battery backup or inverter-compatible system
- Personalized size, shape, and capacity

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Designed & Manufactured in Mumbai – Trusted 15+ Years  
✔ Built from SS 304 – Hygienic & Corrosion Resistant  
✔ Reliable Cooling System – Preserves Taste & Texture  
✔ Custom Layouts – Matches Your Menu  
✔ Indoor & Outdoor Use  
✔ Attractive Display – Increases Sales Appeal  
✔ Low Power Consumption – Energy Efficient  
✔ Export-Grade Quality & PAN India Supply

### After-Sales Support
- Warranty on refrigeration unit and compressor  
- Spare parts availability & servicing  
- Installation assistance & layout consultation  
- AMC options for bulk buyers

### Packaging & Delivery

- Wooden crate export packing  
- PAN India delivery and export-ready documentation

📩 Send layout or capacity requirements  
📐 Ask for customization and pricing

    {
      id: 609,
      name: 'Cold Display Counter ',
      slug: 'cold-display-counter',
      image: '/Cold Display counter.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Premium Cold Display Counter for bakeries, cafés, hotels, and catering setups — hygienic, energy-efficient, and customizable for chilled food presentation.',
      longDescription: `Display your chilled delicacies in style with the Cold Display Counter by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a perfect combination of aesthetics, functionality, and food preservation. Designed to showcase desserts, salads, beverages, and pre-cooked items in a hygienic and visually appealing manner, this equipment is ideal for bakeries, restaurants, cafés, sweet shops, hotel buffets, and catering counters.

Crafted with premium stainless steel and energy-efficient cooling technology, our cold display counters ensure optimal product visibility while maintaining consistent temperatures — keeping your offerings fresh, safe, and tempting for your customers.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Visually Appealing & Space Optimized Design**: Stylish glass-front design for 360° visibility, LED lighting, straight/curved/square glass options, compact depth for varied spaces.
- **Uniform Cooling Performance**: Forced air circulation, temperature range 2°C to 8°C, digital temperature controller for easy monitoring.
- **Durable Build with Food-Grade Materials**: SS 304 stainless steel body, double-glass panels, tempered toughened glass for safety and longevity.
- **Adjustable Shelving for Display Flexibility**: 2–3-tier adjustable shelves, compatible with trays, plates, pans, or direct product display.
- **Energy Efficient Operation**: Eco-friendly refrigerant (R134a / R290), low power consumption, quiet compressor, built-in automatic defrost.

### Technical Specifications
- **Body Material**: SS 304 Stainless Steel
- **Glass Type**: Tempered Clear / Frosted / Curved / Flat
- **Cooling Type**: Ventilated / Static Cooling
- **Temperature Range**: 2°C to 8°C
- **Refrigeration Unit**: Hermetically Sealed Compressor
- **Refrigerant Used**: R134a / R290 (Eco-Friendly)
- **Lighting**: LED Internal Lighting
- **Shelving**: 2–3 Glass or SS Shelves (Adjustable)
- **Controller**: Digital Thermostat with Display
- **Power Supply**: 230V AC, Single Phase
- **Glass Thickness**: 8–12 mm Toughened Safety Glass
- **Optional Add-ons**: Castor wheels, Branding panels, SS Trays, Lockable sliding doors

### Applications
- Bakeries – pastries, cakes, muffins, sweets
- Cafés & QSR – sandwiches, salads, cold beverages
- Hotels & Buffets – starters & desserts
- Sweet Shops – mithai, kulfi, dairy
- Catering Outlets – events and exhibitions
- Corporate Canteens & Schools – hygienic food storage

### Customization Options
- Custom lengths (3–8 ft or as required)
- Curved, Square, or Flat glass styles
- Branding panels for logos/graphics
- Sliding doors or open-back designs
- Castor wheels for mobility
- Multi-deck configurations (2–4 shelves)
- Front-open design for self-service counters

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Premium SS 304 & Safety Glass  
✔ Modern Designs with LED Lighting  
✔ Uniform Cooling, Low Power Consumption  
✔ Custom-Built to Fit Your Space & Menu  
✔ Trusted by Hotels, Bakers & QSR Chains  
✔ Export-Quality Standards, Made in Mumbai  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise

### After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance & technical assistance  
- One-year warranty on compressor & major parts  
- Spare parts & servicing support  
- PAN India delivery & prompt customer support

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-wrapped wooden crates  
- Shock-proof transport for glass safety
