    {
      id: 610,
      name: 'Water Cooler',
      slug: 'water-cooler',
      image: '/Water Cooler.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Durable and efficient Water Cooler for offices, schools, hospitals, and public spaces — hygienic, energy-efficient, and customizable for heavy-duty commercial use.',
      longDescription: `Stay cool and serve pure, chilled drinking water around the clock with the Water Cooler from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Built for durability and engineered for consistent cooling performance, our water coolers are designed for heavy-duty use in commercial, institutional, and industrial environments.

Constructed from food-grade stainless steel, and available in various tank capacities and cooling rates, these water coolers are ideal for schools, offices, factories, hospitals, canteens, religious institutions, and public spaces.

Whether you need a compact model for 20 people or a high-capacity cooler for 200+, SAG Engineering delivers clean, cold, and safe hydration—day in and day out.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Heavy-Duty Cooling Performance**: Hermetically sealed compressor for reliable fast cooling; high-efficiency coil; optional dual faucets.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 body and tank for hygiene, corrosion resistance; mirror or matt finish options.
- **Energy Efficient Operation**: Low power consumption; PUF insulation maintains temperature longer.
- **Hygienic & User-Friendly Design**: Anti-drip splash-proof taps; smooth surfaces for easy cleaning; optional UV/RO purifier integration.
- **Wide Range of Capacities**:
  - WC-20/20: 20L, 20 LPH, 25–40 persons
  - WC-40/40: 40L, 40 LPH, 40–60 persons
  - WC-60/60: 60L, 60 LPH, 60–100 persons
  - WC-80/80: 80L, 80 LPH, 100–150 persons
  - WC-150/150: 150L, 150 LPH, 150–200+ persons
  (Custom sizes and dual-tap models also available)

### Applications
- Schools, Colleges & Educational Institutes  
- Offices, Corporate Parks & IT Campuses  
- Factories & Industrial Work Floors  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities  
- Commercial Canteens & Mess Kitchens  
- Temples, Mosques & Religious Trusts  
- Public Buildings & Railway Stations  
- Event Venues & Community Halls

### Customization Options
- Single / Double / Triple Tap Units  
- Purifier Integration (RO + UV Compatible)  
- Drain Tray with Anti-Splash Design  
- Lockable Bottom Cabinet for utilities  
- Castor Wheels for portable units  
- Custom Branding with Logo Printing

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai by Engineering Experts  
✔ Food-Grade SS Body & Tank — No Rust, No Contamination  
✔ High-Efficiency Compressor for Fast Cooling  
✔ Energy-Efficient with PUF Insulation  
✔ Long-Term Heavy-Duty Use  
✔ Custom Models Available for Any Scale  
✔ 15+ Years of Experience & Support

### After-Sales Support
- One-Year Warranty on compressor and tank  
- Spare parts readily available  
- On-site service support (where applicable)  
- Technical assistance via phone/email  
- Optional Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-resistant, secure packaging  
- PAN India delivery  
- Export-ready options for international clients

📞 Ready to Keep Your Staff & Visitors Hydrated?  

📐 Need help selecting the right capacity?  
📩 Want to integrate with a purification system?  
🛠️ Custom branding required for NGO or school installation?  

We’ve got you covered.`,

    {
      id: 611,
      name: 'Subway And Salad Refrigerator Counter ',
      slug: 'subway-and-salad-refrigerator-counter',
      image: '/Subway,Salad Refrigeration Counter.jpeg',
      category: 'commercial-refrigeration',
      shortDescription: 'Multi-purpose refrigerated counter for sandwiches, salads, and cold ingredients — hygienic, stainless steel construction with precise cooling and GN pan compatibility.',
      longDescription: `Deliver freshness with style and efficiency using the Subway and Salad Refrigerator Counter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for modern food service outlets such as sandwich chains, salad bars, quick service restaurants (QSRs), and delis, this refrigerated counter ensures your ingredients stay fresh, organized, and within easy reach during peak hours.

With a sleek stainless steel design, precise temperature control, and user-centric layout, our Subway & Salad Counter serves as a refrigerated prep station, storage unit, and attractive display — all rolled into one compact footprint.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Multi-Purpose Design**: Cold storage, ingredient display, and prep surface in a single unit. Ideal for salads, sandwiches, subs, wraps, pizzas, burgers, and more.
- **Efficient Refrigeration**: High-efficiency air-cooled unit with uniform GN pan cooling. Temperature maintained between +2°C to +8°C. Static or ventilated cooling available.
- **Premium Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 inside and out for hygiene and corrosion resistance. Rounded corners and anti-fingerprint finish for easy cleaning.
- **Gastronorm (GN) Pan Compatibility**: Fits standard GN 1/1, 1/2, 1/4 pans. Easy-to-remove pans for restocking and cleaning. Optional night covers or sneeze guards.
- **Built-in Worktop**: Prep or assembly area on stainless steel surface. Optional polymer chopping board add-on.
- **Cold Cabinet or Drawer Storage**: Refrigerated compartments or drawers below for backup stock. Internal LED lighting and adjustable shelves optional.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 (Inside & Outside)  
- Refrigeration Type: Static / Ventilated  
- Cooling Temperature: +2°C to +8°C  
- Top Section: GN-compatible refrigerated display  
- Base Storage: Chiller cabinet or drawer system  
- Compressor Brand: Embraco / Tecumseh / Equivalent  
- Insulation: CFC-free polyurethane  
- Power Supply: 230V / 50Hz – Single Phase  
- Digital Controller: LED display with auto-defrost  
- Lighting: Internal LED (optional)  
- Dimensions: 4 ft, 5 ft, 6 ft, or custom sizes

### Applications
- Subway-style Sandwich Outlets & QSRs  
- Salad Bars & Healthy Cafés  
- Pizzerias & Fast Food Restaurants  
- Hotel Buffets & Cafeterias  
- Delis, Bakeries & Juice Bars  
- Corporate Canteens & Food Courts

### Customization Options
- Custom length, depth, and height  
- Under-counter drawer or cabinet selection  
- Number and size of GN pans as per menu  
- Castor wheels for mobility or adjustable feet for fixed placement  
- Acrylic or glass sneeze guard options  
- Lockable doors for nighttime security

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Built with Premium SS 304 — Rustproof & Hygienic  
✔ Energy-Efficient Refrigeration Technology  
✔ GN Pan Compatibility & Easy Operation  
✔ Sleek Design — Perfect for Frontline Display  
✔ Custom Sizes & Configurations Available  
✔ 15+ Years of Commercial Kitchen Expertise  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai | Export-Quality Standards

### After-Sales Support
- One-year warranty on compressor and cooling components  
- Technical guidance on installation and usage  
- Spare parts availability and maintenance assistance  
- Phone and onsite support across India

### Packaging & Delivery
- Thermocol and wooden crate packaging for safe transit  
- PAN India delivery with quick dispatch  
- Export packaging compliant with international shipping standards

📞 Ready to upgrade your sandwich or salad prep area?  
📩 Share your kitchen layout for tailored recommendations  
📐 Custom GN sizes and layouts available  
📞 Contact us for a competitive quote or site assessment`,

    {
      id: 701,
      name: 'Work And Preparation Table ',
      slug: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      image: '/Work & Preparation Table.jpeg',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Durable, hygienic, stainless steel work and preparation table for commercial kitchens — customizable, sturdy, and easy to clean.',
      longDescription: `Enhance the efficiency and cleanliness of your food preparation space with the Work and Preparation Table from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a trusted name in stainless steel kitchen solutions for over 15 years. Built for strength, hygiene, and ease of use, our tables are designed to streamline workflow in commercial kitchens of all sizes.

Ideal for food prep, sorting, plating, and other kitchen operations, these tables are manufactured using premium SS 304-grade stainless steel, offering unmatched durability, corrosion resistance, and ease of maintenance. Whether you're managing a bustling hotel kitchen, cloud kitchen, bakery, or industrial canteen, our work tables form the backbone of your kitchen's productivity.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Premium SS 304 Construction**: Rust, corrosion, and stain-resistant. Food-grade surfaces with welded joints and smooth finish for hygiene and easy cleaning.
- **Customizable Sizes & Layouts**: Standard or custom dimensions, single or double shelf, optional backsplash (2"–6").
- **Sturdy & Stable Design**: Heavy-duty SS legs with cross-bracing, adjustable bullet feet, high-load bearing capacity.
- **Optional Add-Ons & Accessories**: Drawers, under-counter cabinets, lockable doors, GN pan compatibility, castor wheels, overhead shelves, knife holders, utensil rails, sink attachments.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel (Food Grade)  
- Tabletop Thickness: 1.2 mm to 1.5 mm (as per load)  
- Undershelf: Optional – Slatted / Solid / Cabinet  
- Backsplash: Optional – 2” to 6” height  
- Legs & Frame: SS 1.5" / 2" Square or Round Tubes  
- Finish: Matt / Satin / Polished  
- Feet: SS Bullet Adjustable Feet  
- Mobility: Fixed or with Castor Wheels  
- Standard Sizes: 36", 48", 60", 72", or custom

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Fine-Dining Kitchens  
- Restaurants & QSR Outlets  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Catering Kitchens & Food Courts  
- Bakeries, Sweet Shops & Pastry Labs  
- Cloud Kitchens & Takeaway Outlets  
- Hospitals, Schools & Corporate Kitchens  
- Marine & Offshore Galleys

### Customization Services
- Custom height, width, or length  
- Built-in sink bowls  
- Integrated knife holders, utensil shelves, electrical sockets  
- Splash-proof or anti-skid rubber mats  
- Corner or L-shaped designs  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ 15+ Years of Experience in Stainless Steel Kitchen Solutions  
✔ Built for Daily Commercial Use – Durable & Hygienic  
✔ 100% SS Construction – No MDF or Wood  
✔ Rounded, Food-Grade Surfaces  
✔ Fast Turnaround on Custom Orders  
✔ HACCP-Compliant Kitchen Friendly  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Export-Ready Packaging

### After-Sales Support
- Installation guidance and structural support  
- Replacement parts or accessories  
- Custom retrofitting or layout upgrades  
- Long-term support for renovations and expansions

### Packaging & Delivery

- Wooden crate packing for export and long-distance delivery  
- PAN India delivery and overseas shipping support  
- Bulk order assistance for franchises and institutions

📞 Request a Quote Today  
Send your layout for a custom solution, speak to our team for consultation and pricing, and get quick delivery with tailored fabrication.`,

      name: 'Work Table',
      slug: 'work-table',
      image: '/Work Table.jpg',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Durable, hygienic stainless steel work table for commercial kitchens — customizable, stable, and easy to clean.',
      longDescription: `The Stainless Steel Work Table from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a durable, hygienic, and essential workstation designed for food preparation, storage, plating, and utility in commercial kitchens. Manufactured using high-grade stainless steel and engineered for strength and stability, our work tables are a perfect fit for hotels, restaurants, food courts, industrial canteens, hospitals, cloud kitchens, and catering units.

Our work tables are crafted with attention to ergonomics, cleanliness, and load-bearing performance, making them a foundational element of any professional kitchen setup.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Robust Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 grade for superior resistance to rust, corrosion, and food acids. Tabletop made with 16/18 gauge sheet, strong tubular legs welded for maximum strength.
- **Hygiene-Friendly Design**: Smooth, easy-to-clean surface with rounded corners; 100% food-grade finish.
- **Stable & Heavy-Duty**: Non-slip rubber base or adjustable bullet feet; reinforced undershelves and bracing bars support heavy loads.
- **Versatile Configurations**: Plain, undershelf, cabinet, sliding doors, backsplash, wall-mounted, mobile with castor wheels, or overhead shelf/rack.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 / Optional SS 202  
- Top Sheet Gauge: 16G / 18G  
- Leg Material: SS Tubular – 1.5” or 2” Diameter  
- Undershelf: Optional – 1 / 2 / Custom  
- Finish: Matt / Glossy / Hairline Brushed  
- Available Sizes: 36” x 24”, 48” x 30”, 60” x 30”, 72” x 36” (Custom sizes available)  
- Load Capacity: 150–300 kg (depending on size & gauge)  
- Optional Add-ons: Sink unit, drawer, wheel set, side splash, top rack, GN pan insert  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Food prep zones, bakeries & confectioneries  
- Catering operations, restaurant kitchens  
- Pharmaceutical & hospital kitchens  
- Buffet backstations & commissaries  
- Cloud kitchens & fast-food chains

### Customization Available
- Custom dimensions for your kitchen layout  
- Cut-outs for sink or mixer units  
- GN pan holders  
- Lockable cabinets or drawers  
- Integrated dustbin chutes or trash racks  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s SS Work Tables?
✔ Made in Mumbai – Trusted by hotels, hospitals & kitchens across India  
✔ Food-safe, rustproof, easy-to-clean surfaces  
✔ Heavy-duty design for long-term use  
✔ Full range of sizes & configurations  
✔ Affordable pricing with superior build quality  
✔ 15+ years of engineering experience  
✔ Export-grade fabrication & finishing

### After-Sales Support
- Installation assistance if required  
- Warranty on welding joints and structural components  
- Readily available spares (feet, accessories, fittings)  
- Long-term support for expansion or replacements

### Packaging & Delivery
- Bubble wrap, edge guard, and wooden crating for long-distance  
- Delivery across Mumbai, Maharashtra, PAN India & export-ready  
- Bulk order support for hotel chains, hospitals, franchises, and projects

📞 Get a Quote or Layout Review: Share your floor plan or counter requirements for custom sizes, shelves, and finishes.`,

    {
      id: 703,
      name: 'Work Table with Drawer & Sliding Shutter',
      slug: 'work-table-with-drawer-and-sliding-shutter',
      image: '/Work Table with Drawer & Sliding Shutter.jpg',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Durable stainless steel work table with integrated drawers and sliding shutters — hygienic, functional, and ideal for commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Upgrade your commercial kitchen workspace with the Work Table with Drawer & Sliding Shutter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai – a sturdy food preparation surface with integrated storage. Designed for convenience, hygiene, and durability, this versatile table supports efficient kitchen operations while keeping essential tools, ingredients, and utensils within easy reach.

Constructed using high-grade stainless steel (SS 304), this table is suitable for hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, bakeries, industrial canteens, and pharmaceutical or cleanroom facilities where cleanliness, order, and durability are essential.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Food-Grade Work Surface**: Top made from SS 304 sheet (1.2–1.6 mm), matt or mirror finish. Reinforced underside for strength and stability.
- **Spacious Drawer Unit**: Integrated sliding drawers with smooth ball-bearing runners for storing knives, spoons, ladles, and other tools. Single or multiple drawer options available.
- **Sliding Shutter Cabinet**: SS sliding doors for covered storage of larger utensils or ingredients. Noise-free gliding with anti-rust channels.
- **Robust Framework**: Square or round SS pipe legs (38 mm / 50 mm), welded for vibration-free performance. Adjustable bullet feet for leveling.
- **Hygienic & Easy to Clean**: Smooth surfaces, rounded corners, flush joints, and detachable components for maintenance.
- **Multi-Purpose Utility**: Functions as prep table, packing counter, or utility workstation, keeping workspace organized.

### Technical Specifications
- Top Material: SS 304 (1.2–1.6 mm thick)  
- Legs & Frame: SS 304 Tubes (38 mm / 50 mm)  
- Drawer: SS Drawer with Handle & Ball-Bearing Slides  
- Shutters: SS Sliding Doors on SS Track  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror Polish  
- Feet: Adjustable Nylon or SS Bullet Feet  
- Standard Sizes: 1200 x 600 mm, 1500 x 700 mm, 1800 x 750 mm (custom sizes available)  
- Load Capacity: Up to 200 kg (uniform load)  
- Mounting: Floor Standing  

### Industries & Applications
- Commercial Kitchens & Hotels  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Catering Units & Banquet Halls  
- Pharmaceutical Production & Cleanrooms  
- Food Packaging & Processing Units  
- Laboratories & R&D Kitchens  
- Hospitals & Industrial Canteens  

### Customization Options
- Additional drawers or cabinet partitions  
- Built-in sink basin  
- Lockable shutters or drawers  
- Overhead shelves or under-table racks  
- Caster wheels with locking brakes  
- SS 316 construction for marine or chemical industries  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Work Table?
✔ High-Quality SS 304 – Long Life & Rust-Free  
✔ Compact, Functional & Ergonomic Design  
✔ Trusted by Commercial Kitchens Across India  
✔ Easy to Clean & Maintain  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with PAN India Delivery  
✔ Custom-Built to Match Your Space & Workflow  
✔ Backed by 15+ Years of Industry Experience  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation and usage guidance  
- Warranty on manufacturing defects  
- Ready stock of spare parts & accessories  
- Technical support for custom integration and upgrades  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Secure protective packaging  
- Delivery across Mumbai, Maharashtra, and PAN India  
- Export packing available  

📞 Request Your Quote Today: Send your kitchen layout or sketch for a free consultation. Bulk orders welcome.`,

      longDescription: `The Stainless Steel Work Table with Drawer by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a must-have for any commercial kitchen looking to combine workspace utility with smart storage. Engineered to perform in high-demand food service environments, this table provides a hygienic, durable, and efficient working surface along with a built-in drawer for easy access to essential tools, utensils, or documents.

Constructed with high-quality SS 304 grade stainless steel, this work table is suitable for food preparation, packaging, and multipurpose use across hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, bakeries, hospitals, and catering setups. Whether you need a sturdy prep station or a clutter-free storage solution, this product delivers both.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304, corrosion-resistant, non-reactive, hygienic.
- **Integrated Drawer for Storage**: Smooth-sliding drawers, heavy-duty handles, lockable option.
- **Robust, Stable Design**: SS tubular frame or square pipe structure, adjustable bullet feet, optional undershelf.
- **Smooth Surface & Easy Maintenance**: Satin/mirror finish, rounded edges, welded joints.
- **Custom-Built to Fit Your Layout**: Multiple sizes and configurations; drawer position customizable.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 (Option for SS 316 / SS 202 on request)  
- Top Thickness: 1.2 mm / 16 gauge (customizable)  
- Drawer Type: SS Pull-Out / Ball Bearing Slides / Lockable  
- Standard Height: 850–900 mm  
- Legs: SS 38x38 mm or 50x50 mm square tube  
- Undershelf: Optional – Slatted or Solid  
- Finish: Satin / Mirror Polish  
- Footing: Adjustable Bullet Feet or Castor Wheels (optional)  
- Optional Add-Ons: Backsplash, Side Splash, Equipment Stand, Hooks  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotel & Restaurant Kitchens  
- Cloud & QSR Kitchens  
- Commercial Bakeries & Cafés  
- Hospital & Laboratory Kitchens  
- Industrial Canteens & Institutional Kitchens  
- Marine & Mobile Kitchens  

### Customization Options
- Drawer quantity and size  
- Undershelf or closed cabinet understructure  
- Splashguard on back or sides  
- Caster wheels for mobility  
- Electrical conduit holes for countertop equipment  
- Laser logo marking or branding  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s SS Work Table with Drawer?
✔ 100% Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
✔ Strength, Stability & Long-Term Use  
✔ Workspace + Storage in One Compact Unit  
✔ Fully Welded & Rustproof

      longDescription: `Streamline your kitchen workflow with the robust and reliable SS Side Work Table from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai’s trusted manufacturer of premium stainless steel kitchen solutions. Designed to offer a durable, clean, and organized workspace, this table is ideal for food prep, sorting, plating, or serving.

Manufactured using SS 304 food-grade stainless steel, our side work tables are built to endure heavy loads, resist corrosion, and ensure hygienic operations in fast-paced commercial environments. Whether you're setting up a hotel kitchen, cloud kitchen, catering unit, or food court, this table delivers form and function in one compact structure.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: Made entirely from SS 304, corrosion-resistant, easy to clean, and non-reactive.
- **Heavy-Duty Load Capacity**: Sturdy framework with reinforced bracing to handle appliances, prep items, or bulk containers.
- **Smooth, Easy-to-Clean Surface**: Polished top (matt/mirror), rounded edges, safe welds.
- **Functional Side Design**: Ideal for walls, counters, sinks, or service areas; optional backsplash.
- **Customizable Layout & Accessories**: Undershelves, drawers, GN pan slots, trash holes, casters/wheels, splash guards.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel  
- Table Top Thickness: 1.2 mm / 1.5 mm (customizable)  
- Top Finish: Matt or Mirror Polish  
- Height: Standard 850 mm (custom available)  
- Width/Length Options: 2ft, 3ft, 4ft, 5ft, 6ft or Custom  
- Backsplash Height: 100 mm (optional)  
- Legs: 38 mm / 50 mm SS square or round pipe  
- Feet Type: Adjustable bullet feet or caster wheels  
- Optional Add-ons: Undershelf, drawers, rack, GN pan holders  

### Applications & Industry Use
- Hotel Kitchens & Fine-Dine Restaurants  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Units  
- Bakery & Confectionery Units  
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens  
- Food Processing Units & Packaging Areas  
- Hospital, School, and College Kitchens

### Customization Options
- Size and height adjustments

- Dustbins or trash chute integration  
- Perforated racks or top grid for storage  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s SS Side Work Table?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Experience  
✔ Built from 100% Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
✔ Heavy-Duty Design for Long-Term Use

      id: 706,
      name: 'Work Table and Trolley ',
      slug: 'work-table-and-trolley',
      image: '/Work Table & Trolley 1.jpg',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Custom-built stainless steel work tables and trolleys for commercial kitchens, designed for hygiene, durability, and efficiency.',
      longDescription: `Every efficient commercial kitchen relies on well-designed worktables and trolleys to streamline operations, improve workflow, and maintain food safety. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we manufacture a wide range of Work Tables and Trolleys in premium-grade stainless steel, custom-built to match the space, utility, and movement requirements of commercial, industrial, and institutional kitchens.

Crafted with attention to strength, finish, and long-term use, our SS Work Tables and Trolleys are essential for any high-functioning foodservice setup — whether it's a hotel kitchen, food court, cloud kitchen, or hospital canteen.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade for hygiene, corrosion resistance, and durability.
- **Modular & Customizable Designs**: Multiple sizes, shelves, drawers, and trolley tiers.
- **High Utility & Versatility**: Tables for prep, packing, sorting; trolleys for transport of ingredients, utensils, GN pans, or trays.
- **Ergonomic & Hygienic Design**: Smooth edges, rounded corners, seamless surfaces, optional drain holes.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 / SS 202 (on request)  
- Frame: SS square or round pipe (1.2–1.5 mm thickness)  
- Top Sheet: 1.2 mm thick SS sheet (No. 4 finish)  
- Work Table Sizes: 36”x24”, 48”x30”, 60”x30”, or custom  
- Trolley Sizes: 18”x24”, 24”x36”, 30”x48”, or custom  
- Shelving: 1, 2, 3-tier; solid or perforated  
- Wheels (for trolleys): 4” / 6” PU or nylon castors  
- Load Capacity: 80–150 kg (based on model)  
- Finish: Matt (standard), mirror (optional)  
- Optional Features: Side rails, handles, corner bumpers, lockable wheels, splashbacks  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels, Restaurants & Food Courts  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Institutional Kitchens (Schools, Hospitals, Hostels)  
- Catering Kitchens & Banquet Halls  
- Industrial Canteens & IT Park Cafeterias  
- Laboratories & Pharmaceutical Units  
- Bakeries, Dairies & Food Processing Plants  

### Customization Options
- Adjustable table height  
- Foldable or collapsible designs  
- Lockable wheels or shock absorbers for trolleys  
- Removable bins, tray holders, or crate slots  
- Enclosed trolley body or detachable bins  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Stainless Steel Expertise  
✔ In-House Fabrication & Quality Control  
✔ Heavy-Duty Materials for Commercial & Industrial Use  
✔ Custom-Built for Your Kitchen’s Exact Needs  
✔ Hygienic, Durable & Easy-to-Maintain  
✔ Affordable Pricing & Bulk Order Support  
✔ Export-Ready Packing & PAN India Delivery  

### After-Sales Support & Service
- Installation & usage guidance  
- Spare parts availability for wheels, trays, or accessories  
- Maintenance tips for long product life  
- Fast and responsive support from our Mumbai factory  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Protective packaging with bubble wrap and edge protectors  
- Wooden crate packaging available for export orders  
- PAN India and international delivery  
- Logistic support for bulk institutional supply  

📞 Ready to Order? Share your kitchen layout or equipment list for a tailored solution.`,

      shortDescription: 'Mobile stainless steel spice storage trolley for professional kitchens, designed for hygiene, efficiency, and organized access to masalas.',
      longDescription: `Keep your kitchen organized, efficient, and hygienic with the Masala Trolley from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for busy commercial kitchens, this stainless steel trolley helps chefs and kitchen staff access essential spices and dry ingredients quickly and neatly during peak cooking hours.

Ideal for hotels, restaurants, canteens, catering services, and institutional kitchens, our Masala Trolley provides a mobile storage solution for daily-use masalas, ensuring cleanliness, speed, and convenience in every meal preparation task.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated from SS 304 food-grade stainless steel. Rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, and easy to clean.
- **Multiple Container Compartments**: Comes with 6 to 12 spice containers with lids for freshness. Removable SS or polycarbonate containers for easy cleaning.
- **Compact & Mobile Design**: Lightweight, space-efficient with 360° swivel castor wheels. Two brakes for secure positioning. Ergonomic handle for mobility.
- **Organized & Accessible**: Open-top or covered design. Maintains systematic storage of commonly used masalas. Reduces kitchen clutter and improves workflow.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
- Trolley Type: Open / Covered (hinged or sliding lid)  
- No. of Containers: 6, 8, 10, or 12 (customizable)  
- Container Capacity: 500ml to 2 Litres  
- Castor Wheels: 4 wheels (2 with brakes)  
- Container Material: SS / Polycarbonate (optional)  
- Dimensions: Standard or customized per kitchen layout  
- Finish: Matt / Glossy SS Finish  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotel & Restaurant Kitchens  
- Industrial & Corporate Canteens  
- Catering Kitchens & Banquet Halls  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSRs  
- Religious Kitchens (Langar/Bhandara Units)  
- Hospital & Institutional Kitchens  

### Customization Options
- Number and size of containers  
- Open-top or covered trolley design  
- Custom container material (SS, acrylic, PC)  
- Optional locking system for ingredient security  
- Multiple shelves or dual-layer spice storage  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Masala Trolley?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Experience  
✔ Premium Food-Grade Materials  
✔ Fully Customizable to Kitchen Needs  
✔ Sleek, Durable, Professional Design  
✔ Enhances Hygiene, Speed & Ingredient Management  
✔ Easy to Move and Maintain  
✔ Trusted by Leading Hotels, Caterers & Institutions  

### After-Sales Support & Services
- Warranty on structural integrity  
- Spare containers and accessories available  
- PAN India maintenance and repair support  
- Technical assistance for custom integrations  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Robust protective packaging with foam and film wrap  
- Bulk order support for chains and group kitchens  
- Fast dispatch across India  
- Export packaging for overseas clients  

📞 Get a Quote or Schedule a Consultation: Share kitchen dimensions for a tailored solution and immediate pricing.`,

    {

      name: 'Serving Trolley ',

      image: '/Serving Trolley.jpg',

      shortDescription: 'Premium stainless steel serving trolley for hotels, restaurants, and institutional kitchens, designed for mobility, hygiene, and efficient food service.',
      longDescription: `The Serving Trolley from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a reliable and versatile solution for food service, hospitality, and institutional catering environments. Engineered with durability and elegance in mind, our trolleys offer seamless movement, ample storage, and professional-grade finish — making them the perfect companion for efficient food and beverage service.

Whether you’re operating a hotel, restaurant, hospital, banquet hall, or corporate canteen, our stainless steel serving trolleys streamline the transport of dishes, trays, utensils, and food items while enhancing hygiene and presentation.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction**: Made from SS 304-grade stainless steel for rust resistance, hygiene, and long life. Smooth polished finish for easy cleaning.
- **Multi-Shelf Configuration**: Available in 2, 3, or 4 shelf designs, with edge guards or raised rims. Anti-slip surfaces or rubber mats optional.
- **Smooth Mobility**: Equipped with 4" or 5" swivel castor wheels, 2 with locking brakes. Noise-free and floor-safe.
- **Ergonomic Handles**: Double-sided tubular handles at standard working height for reduced operator fatigue.
- **Low Maintenance & Long Life**: Fully welded joints, rustproof material, rounded corners, and flat surfaces for easy cleaning.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel  
- Shelves: 2 / 3 / 4 Tiers  
- Shelf Load Capacity: 30–80 kg per shelf (model dependent)  
- Wheel Size: 4" / 5" Nylon or Rubber Castors  
- Brake Option: 2 Wheels with Locking Brakes  
- Handle Design: Double-Sided Tubular SS Handles  
- Finish: Matte / Mirror Finish  
- Dimensions: Standard or Custom  
- Optional Accessories: Tray holders, waste bins, towel hooks, bumpers  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Banquet Halls  
- Restaurants & Cafés  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities  
- Corporate & Industrial Canteens  
- Airline & Railway Catering Services  
- Commercial Kitchens & Cloud Kitchens  

### Customization Options
- Size & Shelf Spacing  
- Removable or Foldable Shelves  
- Built-in Insulated Compartments  
- Drawer Units or Cutlery Sections  
- Color-coded Bumpers  
- Powder-coated or Dual-material Finishes  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Serving Trolleys?
✔ Premium food-grade stainless steel  
✔ Heavy-duty, durable, and mobile  
✔ Multiple configurations and custom designs  
✔ Trusted by India’s top hospitality brands  
✔ Low maintenance with long operational life  
✔ 15+ Years of fabrication and engineering expertise  
✔ Export-ready and compliant packaging  

### After-Sales Service & Support
- One-year manufacturing warranty  
- On-call maintenance support  
- Spare wheels, trays, bumpers, and parts  
- Replacement or repair guidance  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Heavy-duty protective packaging with bubble wrap and edge guards  
- PAN India shipping and export crate packaging for international clients  

📞 Order Your Serving Trolley Today: Enhance your food service operations with a premium-grade serving trolley designed to move and built to last.`,

      id: 709,
      name: 'Utility Trolley ',
      slug: 'utility-trolley',
      image: '/Utility Trolley.jpg',

      shortDescription: 'Robust stainless steel utility trolley for smooth transport of goods, utensils, or food items in commercial kitchens, hospitals, hotels, and industrial facilities.',
      longDescription: `Streamline your operations with the Utility Trolley from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a robust and versatile stainless steel transport solution designed for smooth and safe movement of goods, utensils, food trays, or cleaning supplies within commercial kitchens, hospitals, hotels, and industrial facilities.

Built for mobility, hygiene, and load capacity, our utility trolleys are manufactured using high-grade stainless steel, heavy-duty wheels, and ergonomic designs that allow staff to work efficiently while minimizing physical strain.

Whether you're operating a commercial kitchen, institutional canteen, hospital, bakery, or food production unit, SAG Engineering’s utility trolleys ensure organized and effortless movement in demanding environments.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **High-Quality Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 grade, rust-proof, food-safe, easy to clean. Fully welded joints with rounded corners.
- **Multiple Shelf Options**: 2-shelf, 3-shelf, and 4-shelf configurations. Shelves with guard rails; optional solid, slotted, or perforated surfaces.
- **Heavy-Duty Wheels for Smooth Movement**: 360-degree swivel castor wheels (two with brakes), shock-resistant, smooth rolling.
- **Ergonomic & User-Friendly Design**: Comfortable push handles, standard working height 850–900 mm, lightweight yet sturdy.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel  
- Shelf Options: 2 / 3 / 4 Shelves  
- Shelf Type: Solid / Slotted / Perforated  
- Wheel Type: 4 Swivel Castors (2 with brakes)  
- Load Capacity: 75–150 kg (per model)  
- Dimensions: Standard: 750 x 450 x 900 mm or Customized  
- Side Guard Rails: Optional three-side rail per shelf  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror Finish  
- Optional Features: Rubber Bumpers, Detachable Trays, Lockable Doors  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Commercial Kitchens & Food Service Outlets  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities  
- Hotels & Banquet Halls  
- Industrial & Manufacturing Units  
- Educational Institutions & Hostels  

### Customization Options
- Custom dimensions to fit lifts or corridors  
- Combination trolleys with drawers, bins, or lockable cabinets  
- Multi-compartment shelves for medicine or waste segregation  
- Color-coded wheels or handles for workflow distinction  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Utility Trolley?
✔ Rust-proof, food-grade stainless steel  
✔ Heavy-duty, smooth & silent castor wheels  
✔ Sturdy design with high load-bearing capacity  
✔ Hygienic, easy to clean & sanitize  
✔ Standard & customized models  
✔ Suitable for kitchen, hospital & industrial use  
✔ 15+ years of fabrication expertise  
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, supplied across India & overseas  

### After-Sales Support & Warranty
- One-year warranty on welds and structural integrity  
- Technical guidance and support for bulk orders  
- Spare wheels, trays, and handles available  
- Quick service support across India  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Bubble-wrapped and edge-protected for safe shipping  
- Optional knock-down or fully assembled dispatch  
- PAN India delivery with export packaging on request

    {
      id: 710,
      name: 'Dirty Dish Trolley ',
      slug: 'dirty-dish-trolley',
      image: '/Dirty Dish Trolley.webp',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Stainless steel trolley for hygienic collection and transport of soiled crockery, trays, and utensils in commercial kitchens, hospitals, and catering setups.',
      longDescription: `The Dirty Dish Trolley from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a smart and efficient solution for the hygienic collection and transport of soiled crockery, cutlery, trays, and serving ware in commercial kitchens and food service environments. Designed for smooth mobility and easy cleaning, this trolley plays a crucial role in maintaining workflow efficiency and hygiene standards — especially in high-traffic operations such as hotels, banquets, restaurants, corporate kitchens, and catering setups.

Manufactured with heavy-duty stainless steel and built for day-long usage, this trolley ensures quick clearance of dining areas and a clean, organized transfer of dirty dishes to the wash area.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Durable Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade stainless steel, rust-resistant, reinforced frame supports heavy loads.
- **Spacious & Practical Design**: Multi-tier shelving (2–3 shelves) with raised edges or guard rails; flat top shelf for larger items.
- **Smooth Mobility**: Four heavy-duty castor wheels (two with brakes), optional bumpers, handles on both ends.
- **Hygienic & Easy to Clean**: Welded joints and smooth surfaces, food-safe finish, easy to hose down or wipe.
- **Customizable Layout**: Open, rack-style, or closed trolley models; options for GN pans, trays, baskets, or plastic dish tubs.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel  
- Standard Shelves: 2 or 3 (customizable)  
- Frame Type: Square or round tube with full welding  
- Load Capacity: 75–100 kg (per trolley)  
- Mobility: 4 PU/Nylon castor wheels (2 with brakes)  
- Handle: Dual-sided push handles  
- Finish: Matt (standard) or mirror (on request)  
- Dimensions: Custom sizes based on kitchen layout  
- Optional Add-ons: Tray rails, dish baskets, rubber bumpers, labels  

### Ideal For Use In
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Restaurants  
- Industrial & Corporate Canteens  
- Banquet Halls & Function Centres  
- Hospitals, Colleges, & School Cafeterias  
- Catering Operations & Cloud Kitchens  
- Buffet Lines & Quick-Service Outlets  
- Religious Kitchens & Community Halls  

### Customization Options
- Number of shelves and load capacity  
- Open, half-closed, or fully enclosed trolley design  
- GN pan holders or plastic tub slots  
- Drainage-friendly models for wash zones  
- Integration with dishwashing racks or conveyor systems  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Dirty Dish Trolley?
✔ Premium Stainless Steel, built in Mumbai  
✔ Compact, silent, and easy to operate  
✔ Heavy load capacity, long-lasting durability  
✔ Hygienic & easy to maintain  
✔ Fully customizable sizes and features  
✔ Bulk orders welcome, ideal for hotels, caterers, institutions  
✔ 15+ years of fabrication & engineering experience  

### After-Sales Support
- 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects  
- Spare parts and wheel replacements available  
- Installation assistance and usage guidance  
- Responsive customer service for servicing or custom modifications  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Scratch-proof, foam-protected, edge-guarded packaging  
- PAN India delivery, export-ready crate options available  

📞 Order your Dirty Dish Trolley today to improve hygiene and efficiency in dish handling operations.`,

    {
      id: 711,
      name: 'Storage Rack and Pot Rack ',
      slug: 'storage-rack-and-pot-rack',
      image: '/Storage Rack & pot Rack.webp',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty stainless steel storage and pot racks for organized, hygienic, and efficient kitchen storage in commercial and industrial settings.',
      longDescription: `Efficient storage is the backbone of any well-functioning commercial kitchen. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we design and manufacture high-quality Stainless Steel Storage Racks and Pot Racks that offer optimal space utilization, durability, and hygiene. Crafted for heavy-duty use in hotels, restaurants, industrial kitchens, hospitals, and catering units, our racks are engineered to support your workflow by keeping your kitchen clean, clutter-free, and compliant with food safety norms.

Whether you need a multi-shelf storage solution for dry goods or a robust pot rack for heavy utensils, our products are built to last — with over 15 years of stainless steel fabrication expertise backing every unit.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Premium Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade stainless steel, rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, non-toxic, and food-safe.
- **Strong, Load-Bearing Design**: Supports heavy kitchenware, containers, or bulk storage boxes; welded or bolted options available.
- **Adjustable & Customizable Layouts**: Multiple shelves (2–6 tiers), shelf heights customizable, wall-mounted or freestanding models.
- **Easy to Clean & Maintain**: Smooth matt or mirror finish, rounded edges, clean welds, open rack styles for ventilation.
- **Non-Slip & Stable Installation**: Bullet feet or caster wheels for leveling and mobility, anti-slip base caps.

### Types of Racks
- **Stainless Steel Storage Racks**: Multi-shelf racks for dry storage (groceries, containers, trays, utensils), customizable sizes, slotted/perforated/flat shelves.
- **Pot Racks / Utensil Racks**: Tiered or single-level formats for large pots and cookware, optional hooks or crossbars.
- **Wall-Mounted Racks**: Above-counter storage to save floor space.
- **Over-Sink / Drying Racks**: Mounted above sinks, perforated or pipe-style for fast drainage.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 / SS 202 (on request)  
- Frame Size: 25mm / 38mm / 50mm pipe or angle  
- Shelf Type: Solid / Perforated / Slotted / Pipe  
- No. of Shelves: 2 to 6 (customizable)  
- Load Capacity: 80–200 kg per shelf (model-dependent)  
- Mounting Options: Floor standing / Wall mounted / Mobile  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror finish  
- Footing: Adjustable bullet feet or PU wheels  
- Accessories: Hooks, trays, removable pans (optional)

### Industries & Applications
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Kitchens  
- Commercial Catering Units  
- Industrial & Corporate Canteens  
- Hospitals & Food Labs  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSRs  
- Religious Kitchens (Langars, Temples)  
- Bakeries, Sweet Shops, and Cafés  
- Food Processing Units  

### Customization Capabilities
- Tailored sizes and dimensions  
- Reinforced heavy-load models  
- Mobile units with lockable caster wheels  
- Wall brackets for suspended storage  
- Multi-use racks with GN pan inserts or utensil holders  
- Corner rack configurations  
- Complete layout support for optimizing kitchen storage zones  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering Products?
✔ Based in Mumbai with PAN India Service  
✔ 15+ Years of Stainless Steel Expertise  
✔ Quality-Focused, Engineer-Led Manufacturing  
✔ Food-Safe, Rust-Resistant Products  
✔ Custom Sizes and Bulk Order Capabilities  
✔ Affordable Pricing with Long-Term Value  
✔ Preferred by Leading Consultants and Kitchen Designers  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation support on request  
- 1-Year Warranty on weld and structure  
- Prompt after-sales service  
- Spare parts and accessories always in stock  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-protected and shrink-wrapped packaging  
- Wooden crate packing for long-distance or export  
- Quick dispatch across Mumbai, Maharashtra, and PAN India  
- International shipping and documentation available

    {
      id: 712,
      name: 'Dinning Table',
      slug: 'dinning-table',
      image: '/Dining Table.webp',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Heavy-duty stainless steel dining tables for commercial and institutional use, designed for hygiene, durability, and high-traffic dining environments.',
      longDescription: `The Dining Tables manufactured by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, are designed for high-traffic food service environments that demand strength, hygiene, and long service life. Crafted from premium-grade stainless steel, these tables are ideal for industrial canteens, hostels, school/college messes, hospitals, temples, community kitchens, corporate cafeterias, and other large-scale food distribution setups.

Whether you're looking for a basic SS table for seating or an integrated unit with stools, backrests, or under-shelves, we offer both standard and custom-built models to match your space and service requirements.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304/202-grade stainless steel, corrosion-resistant, scratch-proof, and reinforced for added load capacity.
- **Seating Configurations Available**: 4, 6, 8, 10, 12-seaters; fixed or pivoted stools, backrest-supported benches, or detached benches/chairs.
- **User-Friendly Design**: Ergonomic height, smooth edges, integrated footrests/leg buffers, anti-skid shoes, easy-to-clean surfaces.
- **Weather & Spill Resistant**: Suitable for indoor and semi-outdoor use; anti-bacterial finish, resists moisture and food spills.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 / SS 202 Stainless Steel  
- Top Finish: 16 / 18 gauge SS sheet with optional sound dampening  
- Frame: SS Square / Round Pipe  
- Seating: Fixed/Pivoted SS Stool or Bench  
- Legs: SS Pipe with rubber or nylon shoes  
- Standard Sizes: 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 seaters (custom sizes available)  
- Height: 750 mm (standard)  
- Optional Add-ons: Tray sliders, glass racks, under-shelves, partitions, drainage hole  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror polish  

### Ideal For
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- School & College Dining Halls  
- Corporate Offices & IT Park Cafeterias  
- Hospitals & Medical Hostels  
- Temples, Langars & Community Kitchens  
- Railway Kitchens, CRPF Camps, Armed Forces Dining Units

      id: 713,
      name: 'A Canteen Table',
      slug: 'canteen-table',

      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Durable, hygienic, and space-efficient dining tables for institutional and commercial use, designed for high-traffic canteens and dining areas.',
      longDescription: `The Dining Canteen Table by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a robust and space-optimized solution designed for institutional, industrial, and commercial dining environments. Engineered for durability and hygiene, our canteen tables are ideal for high-traffic areas such as schools, colleges, factories, hostels, hospitals, corporate offices, and public food courts.

Built from high-quality stainless steel and powder-coated structures, these tables are designed to last for years without rusting, bending, or breaking — even under continuous heavy use. Available in multiple configurations, with or without attached seating, our dining tables ensure organized, efficient, and comfortable meal service.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Rugged Construction for Long Life**: SS 304-grade stainless steel or MS with powder-coated finish, welded framework, anti-rust, termite-proof, and weather-resistant.
- **Space-Saving Integrated Design**: Fixed or foldable stools or benches attached; eliminates need for separate chairs, optimizing floor usage.
- **User-Friendly & Hygienic**: Smooth surface finish, rounded corners, tabletop options in SS, granite, or laminated wood.
- **Stable & Anti-Skid Base**: Rubber or PVC base supports prevent wobbling; ensures stability on all floor types.
- **Seating Capacity Options**: 4, 6, 8, or 10 persons; custom configurations available.

### Technical Specifications
- Table Frame Material: SS 304 / MS with powder coating  
- Tabletop: SS sheet / Granite / Laminated Wood  
- Seat Type: Fixed Round Stools / Benches / Foldable  
- Seat Material: SS / Powder-Coated MS / HDPE  
- Seating Capacity: 4, 6, 8, or 10 Persons  
- Table Dimensions: Standard 1200 mm x 750 mm or as per request  
- Mounting: Floor-standing with optional bolt-down  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror (SS) or Epoxy Coated (MS)  

### Applications & Use Cases
- Industrial & Factory Canteens  
- Schools, Colleges & Universities  
- Hospitals & Healthcare Institutes  
- Corporate Office Pantries  
- Government Institution Messes  
- Railway, Defense & Police Messes  
- Religious Community Kitchens (Langars)  
- Public Food Courts & Dhabas  

### Customization Options
- Tabletop finish: SS / Granite / Laminated  
- Seating: Attached stools, benches, or detachable chairs  
- Seat color customization  
- Foldable or stackable options  
- Provision for floor bolting or leveling feet  
- Add-ons: Footrest bars, tray holders, bag hooks  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Industry Experience  
✔ Designed for High Footfall Dining Environments  
✔ Premium-Grade Raw Materials  
✔ Long Life, Easy to Clean, Low Maintenance  
✔ Compact & Ergonomic Layouts  
✔ Export-Ready Quality & Finishing  
✔ Quick Dispatch & Custom Manufacturing Available  

### After-Sales Support & Service
- Assembly & installation guidance

- Maintenance tips  
- One-year warranty on manufacturing defects  
- Nationwide delivery & service support  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Protective foam and shrink-wrap  
- Wooden crate packaging for export  
- PAN India delivery  
- Bulk dispatch support

    {
      id: 714,
      name: 'Barbeque Nationa Table',
      slug: 'barbeque-nationa-table',
      image: '/Barbeque Nation table.jpeg',
      category: 'work-and-preparation-table',
      shortDescription: 'Interactive dining tables with built-in grills, designed for Barbeque Nation-style restaurants, rooftop grills, and buffet zones. Durable, hygienic, and fully customizable.',
      longDescription: `Elevate your restaurant’s dining experience with the Barbeque Nation Table manufactured by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed to bring the grill right to the customer’s table, this solution blends style, safety, and performance—perfect for live grill dining concepts such as Barbeque Nation-style restaurants, rooftop grills, buffet zones, and specialty food outlets.

Crafted with precision stainless steel engineering and premium wood or granite finishes, our BBQ tables allow diners to enjoy grilled starters and skewers hot off the grill—right at their seats. Built for durability, hygiene, and heat safety, each table is designed to deliver a memorable and interactive culinary experience.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Built-In Charcoal or Gas Grill**: Central embedded grill with charcoal, gas, or electric options; uniform flame and smoke dispersion; integrated ash collector tray or drip pan.
- **Premium Tabletop Finish**: High-pressure laminate (HPL), engineered wood, granite, or SS top; heat- and stain-resistant; optional skewer holders and cutlery slots.
- **Robust Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade inner structure; welded framework; reinforced base; fully concealed piping or wiring options.
- **Fire-Safe Design**: Thermally insulated grill zone; optional grill cover; optional exhaust port for smoke extraction.
- **Aesthetic & Brand-Aligned Designs**: Customizable finishes, LED underlighting, logo engraving, brand-color panels.

### Technical Specifications
- Table Structure: SS 304 Framework with Premium Cladding  
- Top Material Options: Engineered Wood / Granite / SS / HPL  
- Grill Type: Charcoal / Gas / Electric  
- Table Size: 2-Seater, 4-Seater, 6-Seater, 8-Seater (Custom)  
- Skewer Slots: 6–12 slots (Customizable)  
- Exhaust Provision: Optional Suction Port or Ducting  
- Accessories: Ash Tray, Drip Tray, Cutlery Drawer  
- Finish Options: Wood Grain, Matte Black, Brushed Steel, Custom Branding  
- Usage: Indoor or Semi-Outdoor  

### Ideal For
- Barbeque Restaurants  
- Buffet-Style & Grill Concept Chains  
- Live Cooking Counters  
- Hotels & Rooftop Restaurants  
- Resorts & Lounges  
- Luxury Food Courts & Breweries  

### Customization Options
- Custom table sizes (2–8 seaters or larger communal setups)  
- Grill type selection (charcoal/gas/electric/infrared)  
- Integrated storage for skewers, condiments, or ash bins  
- Branding and logo application on panels or tabletops  
- Integrated LED lighting or ambient edge glow  
- Matching benches, chairs, or stools  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Experience  
✔ Trusted by Restaurants & Hotel Chains Across India  
✔ Designed for Safety, Durability & Guest Comfort  
✔ Fully Customizable for Brand Identity & Seating Needs  
✔ Premium Materials for Commercial Foodservice Use  
✔ Easy Maintenance with Long Service Life  
✔ Export-Grade Quality Available  

### Support & Services
- Design consultations and CAD drawings  
- Delivery & setup support for bulk orders  
- One-year warranty on structural components  
- Spare parts and post-sales service  
- Installation training for staff  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-lined crates or customized wooden boxes  
- Delivered ready-to-install or with minimal assembly  
- PAN India logistics network & export-ready documentation

    {
      id: 801,
      name: 'Commercial Kitchen Exhaut Hood',
      slug: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      image: '/Commercial Kitchen Exhaut Hood 2.jpeg',
      category: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial kitchen exhaust hoods designed for smoke-free, hygienic, and safe cooking environments, built from premium stainless steel with customizable sizes and features.',
      longDescription: `Ensure a safe, smoke-free, and hygienic cooking environment with Commercial Kitchen Exhaust Hoods from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Engineered for high-performance ventilation in commercial cooking environments, our hoods effectively remove heat, smoke, grease, steam, and airborne particles — making your kitchen cleaner, cooler, and compliant with fire and hygiene standards.

With over 15 years of expertise, SAG Engineering offers custom-built SS exhaust hoods designed to suit Indian and international kitchen standards. Whether you operate a hotel, restaurant, cloud kitchen, or institutional canteen, our exhaust systems are built to perform and built to last.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Efficient Smoke & Grease Extraction**: High-efficiency removal of oil fumes, steam, odors, and smoke; maintains better air quality and prevents grease accumulation.
- **Premium Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body for durability and hygiene; fully welded with smooth corners for long-term use.
- **Baffle Filter System (Standard)**: Removable SS baffle filters trap oil and grease without restricting airflow; dishwasher-safe and easy to clean.
- **Integrated Lighting & Noise Reduction**: Optional LED/halogen lighting; sound-dampening structure for quiet operation.
- **Custom Sizes & Ducting Interface**: Wall-mounted, island-type, or ductless models; integrates with external ductwork and blowers; provisions for connection flanges and drain systems.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 (standard) / SS 316 (on request)  
- Filter Type: SS Baffle Filters (Removable)  
- Mounting Type: Wall-Mounted / Island / Ceiling-Suspended  
- Lighting: LED / Halogen (Optional)  
- Fan/Blower: Supplied separately or integrated on request  
- Duct Connection: Rear / Top / Side Exit with Flange  
- Standard Lengths: 3 ft, 4 ft, 6 ft, 8 ft, 10 ft, Custom  
- Width & Height: Tailored to suit cooking area and ceiling height  
- Optional Add-ons: Grease drain channel, makeup air inlet, speed controller  

### Ideal For
- Hotels, Restaurants & Banquet Kitchens  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Cafés, Food Trucks & Catering Units  
- School, College & Hospital Kitchens  
- Offshore, Marine & Rail Galley Kitchens  

### Customization Options
- Custom length, width, and depth based on kitchen layout  
- Provision for fire suppression systems (on request)  
- Integrated blowers or external duct fan assistance  
- Island-type hoods for central cooking counters  
- Make-up air hoods for large or air-tight kitchens  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ Engineered for maximum airflow and grease control  
✔ Built from hygienic and durable stainless steel  
✔ Precise fabrication for a perfect kitchen fit  
✔ Quick filter removal and easy maintenance  
✔ Supports all major ducting and ventilation standards  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of commercial kitchen experience  
✔ Made in Mumbai; Supplied across India & Export  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation support and technical guidance  
- Replacement filters and spares on request  
- Warranty on fabrication and welds  
- On-call assistance for performance upgrades or ducting integration  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam and film wrap protection  
- Export-grade packaging available (wooden crate or metal cage)  
- Prompt delivery across India and international destinations  

📞 Get the Right Ventilation Solution Today
Share your kitchen layout for a free consultation, get a personalized quotation, or order a complete hood + duct + blower combo.

👉 [Request a Quote] | 👉 [Download Brochure] | 👉 [Talk to Our Technical Consultant]`,

    {
      id: 802,
      name: 'Burner With Exhaust System ',
      slug: 'burner-with-exhaust-system',
      image: '/Burner with Exhaust System.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      shortDescription: 'Integrated cooking and ventilation system combining a high-performance gas burner with a built-in exhaust hood for compact, efficient, and safe commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, brings you an advanced solution for modern cooking spaces — the Burner with Exhaust System. This all-in-one unit combines a high-performance burner with a built-in exhaust hood, delivering efficient cooking and effective ventilation in a compact, user-friendly design.

Ideal for environments where space is limited or fire safety and air quality are top priorities, this system ensures smoke, heat, grease, and fumes are immediately extracted — protecting both food quality and kitchen staff.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual Function – Cooking + Ventilation**: Integrates a gas burner and overhead exhaust hood into one compact system. Efficient flame cooking while eliminating smoke, heat, and grease vapors at the source.
- **High-Quality Gas Burner**: Heavy-duty cast iron or brass burner (per client requirement), compatible with LPG/PNG. Flame control valves with ISI-marked knobs ensure safe cooking.
- **Built-In SS Exhaust Hood**: SS 304 stainless steel captures heat and smoke effectively, includes grease filter baffles, removable trays, and optionally motor-fitted blowers.
- **Durable Construction**: Full-body food-grade SS – rust-proof, easy to clean, long-lasting. Heavy-duty framework with reinforced legs and adjustable feet.
- **Space-Saving Design**: Perfect for compact kitchens, kiosks, food courts, snack shops, and cloud kitchens; eliminates the need for separate chimney systems.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 Stainless Steel  
- Burner Type: Single / Double Cast Iron / Brass Burner  
- Fuel Type: LPG / PNG  
- Exhaust Hood: Built-in SS Hood with Grease Filters  
- Exhaust Options: Ducting Ready / Motorized Exhaust (optional)  
- Electrical Supply (if motorized): 230V AC, Single Phase  
- Controls: Flame Regulator Valve / Knob-based Ignition  
- Mounting: Floor-mounted with hood frame or table-top (customizable)  
- Available Sizes: 24”, 36”, 48” or custom on request  
- Finish: Matt / Polished SS, Laser-cut edges  

### Applications & Industries
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery Units  
- Street Food Counters & Kiosks  
- Hotel and Restaurant Side Kitchens  
- Catering Units and Outdoor Events  
- Open Show Kitchens  
- Small Commercial Setups with Fire Restrictions  

### Customization Options
- Burner size and number (single or double)  
- Custom height and width based on space or chef’s reach  
- Ductless filtration with activated carbon filters (optional)  
- Exhaust hood motor capacity based on kitchen volume  
- Integrated lighting, utility tray, or utensil rack  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ Smart combination of heat and airflow management  
✔ Food-grade SS and industrial-grade burners  
✔ Safety-first design minimizes fire risk and smoke  
✔ Easy to clean with removable filters and trays  
✔ 15+ years of trusted experience across India  
✔ PAN India delivery & export-ready packaging  
✔ Free kitchen planning consultation on request  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation & setup guidance  
- Warranty on body and burners  
- Service contracts & on-demand maintenance  
- Availability of motors, filters, knobs, and accessories  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Sturdy packing with thermocol and crate protection  
- Custom labeling and bulk dispatch support  
- Nationwide shipping & export documentation

    {
      id: 803,
      name: 'Steam Cooking Plant ',
      slug: 'steam-cooking-plant',
      image: '/Steam Cooking Plant.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      shortDescription: 'Fuel-efficient, hygienic, and high-capacity steam cooking system designed for large-scale institutional and commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Steam Cooking Plant from SAG Engineering Products is a robust, eco-friendly solution designed to handle large-scale food preparation with unmatched efficiency and hygiene. Ideal for bulk cooking operations in canteens, hostels, community kitchens, religious institutions, corporate campuses, and hospitals, our steam-based systems offer a safe, smoke-free, and nutrient-preserving cooking method powered by engineering precision.

Manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with over 15 years of commercial kitchen expertise, SAG Engineering delivers high-performance steam cooking units tailored to your capacity, layout, and budget.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Complete Modular System**: Includes Steam Generator/Boiler, Steam Cooking Vessels, Idli/Dhokla Steamers, Milk Boilers, Tilting Pans, Condensate Return Systems, and Steam Lines with Safety Valves.
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: Fabricated from SS 304 / SS 316 for hygiene, corrosion resistance, and durability.
- **Energy-Efficient Steam Generation**: Electric, LPG, PNG, or Wood-fired boilers with high-efficiency insulation.
- **Advanced Safety & Control**: Pressure release valves, steam traps, gauges, optional digital monitoring, and automatic water-level cut-off.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304/316 Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
- Steam Source: LPG / PNG / Electric / Wood-fired Boiler  
- Operating Pressure: 3–7 psi (low pressure)  
- Capacity Range: 60 to 5000 meals/day  
- Steam Vessels: Fixed or Tilting Type  
- Lid Type: Hinged / Clamped / Insulated  
- Control System: Manual / Semi-Automatic / Digital  
- Finish: Matt / Mirror SS Finish  
- Mounting: Floor-standing with adjustable legs  
- Safety Features: Pressure Relief Valve, Water Level Sensor, Auto Shut-off  

### Applications & Industries
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Community Kitchens & NGOs  
- Temple Kitchens & Religious Trusts  
- School, College & Hostel Kitchens  
- Hospital Kitchens  
- Military Mess & Defense Installations  
- CSR Projects & Rural Meal Programs  
- Large-Scale Caterers and Commissaries  

### Customization Options
- Vessel capacities: 60, 100, 150, 250 liters & above  
- Tilting or fixed body steam vessels  
- Wall-mounted, floor-mounted, or skid-mounted boilers  
- Pre-assembled pipeline layouts  
- Optional condensate return systems  
- Integration with kitchen design and exhaust systems  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai, trusted across India  
✔ 15+ years of commercial kitchen engineering experience  
✔ Custom-designed for each project based on meal count, space & utilities  
✔ Fuel-efficient designs reduce operational cost  
✔ High hygiene standards for public food service  
✔ Installation support, operator training & long-term service assistance  
✔ Export-compliant build and documentation  

### After-Sales Service & Support
- Installation and commissioning assistance  
- One-year warranty on boilers and steam vessels  
- Spare parts and consumables on demand  
- Periodic maintenance programs  
- Operator training on safety and usage  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Pre-assembled or knock-down packaging  
- Heavy-duty crating for interstate and export orders  
- Timely dispatch and PAN India delivery  

📞 Get Started with a Free Consultation
Share your meal plan or floor layout, request a detailed proposal or site visit.

👉 [Request a Quote] | 👉 [Download Product Brochure] | 👉 [Book a Site Survey]`,

    {
      id: 804,
      name: 'Island Exhaust Hood',
      slug: 'island-exhaust-hood',
      image: '/Island Exhaust Hood.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      shortDescription: 'Efficient ventilation for island-style cooking stations, designed to maintain hygienic, smoke-free, and odorless commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Ensure your commercial kitchen stays smoke-free, odorless, and compliant with hygiene standards using the Island Exhaust Hood by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Specially designed for centrally located cooking stations or island-style counters, our exhaust hoods provide powerful air extraction, advanced grease filtration, and long-lasting durability — making them a top choice for hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, and institutional cooking setups.

Whether you're running a busy fine-dine open kitchen or a high-volume industrial canteen, this hood is engineered to remove heat, oil vapors, and cooking fumes efficiently while maintaining a clean and breathable kitchen environment.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: Entire body crafted from SS 304 grade for corrosion resistance, polished/satin finish, and easy cleaning.
- **Centrally Suspended for Island Cooking Stations**: 360-degree coverage for uniform fume and heat extraction above free-standing cooking islands.
- **High-Efficiency Baffle Filters**: Removable stainless steel filters for superior grease separation; fire-safe design.
- **Customizable Air Flow & Ducting Integration**: Duct collar/flange placement, make-up air integration, tailored suction power.
- **Integrated Lighting & Noise Reduction**: Optional LED/fluorescent lighting and insulated silencers to reduce noise.

### Technical Specifications
- Material: SS 304 (Standard), SS 316 (Optional)  
- Mounting: Ceiling-Suspended (Island Style)  
- Filtration: Stainless Steel Baffle Filters  
- Lighting: Optional LED/Fluorescent Tube Light  
- Exhaust Outlet: Circular or rectangular duct flange  
- Size Range: Custom sizes from 3ft x 3ft to 10ft x 6ft or more  
- Finish: Satin / Matt / Mirror Finish  
- Noise Level: < 65 dB (with silencer)  
- Optional Accessories: Volume Control Dampers, Pre-Filters, Silencers, Fresh Air Diffusers  

### Ideal For
- Hotel & Restaurant Open Kitchens  
- Food Courts & Mall Counters  
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery Units  
- Catering Units with Central Cooking  
- Commercial Canteens & Mess Kitchens  
- Industrial or Corporate Kitchen Blocks  
- Marine Galleys & Offshore Installations  

### Custom-Built to Your Kitchen
Each Island Hood is built-to-order based on:
- Kitchen dimensions and ceiling height  
- Cooking equipment placement  
- Required airflow (CFM) and duct path  
- Heat and fume load per cooking station  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Island Exhaust Hood?
✔ Mumbai-based Manufacturer with 15+ Years of Experience  
✔ Precision Fabrication with Food-Grade Stainless Steel  
✔ Built to Match Indian & International Ventilation Standards  
✔ Engineered for Durability, Easy Maintenance & Safety  
✔ Rapid Delivery for Standard Sizes | Full Support for Custom Orders  
✔ Integrated Exhaust + Fresh Air System Designs Available  

### After-Sales Support & Installation Guidance
- Optional on-site installation support (Mumbai & nearby regions)  
- Coordination with ducting and HVAC contractors  
- 1-year warranty on structure and filters  
- Spare parts and accessories available  
- Quick-response customer service team  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Foam-wrapped and wooden-crated for safe transport  
- Secure loading, unloading, and onsite handling support  
- Fast lead times with PAN India delivery and export packing available  

📞 Get a Custom Quote for Your Kitchen
Upgrade your kitchen ventilation with a professionally designed Island Exhaust Hood.  

👉 [Request a Quote] | 👉 [Download Brochure] | 👉 [Consult with an Expert]`,

    {
      id: 805,
      name: 'Kitchen Exhaust Hood',
      slug: 'kitchen-exhaust-hood',
      image: '/Kitchen Exhaust Hood.jpg',
      category: 'commercial-kitchen-exhaut-hood',
      shortDescription: 'Smoke-free, odor-free, and heat-controlled ventilation for commercial kitchens, engineered for efficiency, hygiene, and durability.',
      longDescription: `Ensure a smoke-free, odor-free, and heat-controlled environment in your commercial kitchen with SAG Engineering Products' Kitchen Exhaust Hoods — designed and manufactured in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Built with precision and engineered for efficiency, our hoods are a vital part of any professional cooking space, ensuring compliance with hygiene standards and protecting both kitchen staff and equipment from heat, grease, and airborne contaminants.

Ideal for hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, industrial canteens, and institutional kitchens, our exhaust systems are crafted in food-grade stainless steel, tailored to your cooking equipment layout, and compatible with all ventilation ducting systems.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Premium-Grade Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel, TIG-welded, satin or matt finish, corrosion-resistant and durable.
- **Efficient Fume Extraction**: High suction efficiency capturing smoke, steam, grease, and airborne oil particles.
- **Removable Baffle Filters**: Heavy-duty, easy to clean and maintain; optional mesh or carbon filters.
- **Built-in LED Lighting (Optional)**: Improves visibility and safety in kitchen operations.
- **Custom Fit for Every Kitchen**: Wall-mounted, island-style, low-ceiling variants; tailored duct connections and plenum boxes.

### Technical Specifications
- Body Material: SS 304 (standard), SS 316 (on request)  
- Filter Type: SS Baffle Filter (removable, washable)  
- Fan/Blower Compatibility: Ducted or Ductless, Wall or Roof-mounted Fan Unit  
- Lighting: LED Strip or Panel Light (optional)  
- Mounting Type: Wall-mounted / Island-mounted  
- Size Options: Custom lengths and depths from 2 ft to 15+ ft  
- Duct Opening Size: Custom as per blower capacity (in mm/inch)  
- Finish: Brushed, Satin, or Mirror Finish  
- Noise Level: Low-noise compatible (blower-dependent)  
- Accessories: Volume Control Dampers, Rain Covers, Drain Holes  

### Applications Across Sectors
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Kitchens  
- Restaurants & Fast Food Chains  
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery-Only Outlets  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Hospitals, Hostels & Educational Institutes  
- Food Courts, Malls & Cafés  
- Catering Units & Outdoor Installations  
- Offshore Galleys & Compact Electric Kitchens  

### Customization Services
- Length, depth & hood height customization  
- Multi-duct outlets and plenum boxes  
- Special splash shields or filter banks  
- Curved or sloped hood design for aesthetic kitchens  
- Integration with auto-clean systems or fire suppression systems (optional)

### Installation & Compatibility
- Easy mounting on walls or ceilings using SS brackets or threaded rods  
- Compatible with major brands of blowers, ducting, and fire dampers  
- Modular panels for large-scale kitchens for easy transport and on-site assembly  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Exhaust Hood?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai with strict quality control  
✔ Food-grade, rust-proof stainless steel fabrication  
✔ Maximum fume and heat capture  
✔ Compatible with existing ventilation setup  
✔ Attractive finish and commercial-grade durability  
✔ Trusted by leading hotels, institutions, and QSR chains  
✔ Backed by 15+ years of stainless steel fabrication expertise  

### After-Sales & Support
- Warranty on fabrication and workmanship  
- Installation and site customization support  
- Spare parts, accessories, and filter replacement  
- Quick-response team for repairs and upgrades  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Custom crated packaging for safe handling during transit  
- PAN India delivery and export-ready solutions  
- On-site coordination for large kitchen installations  

📞 Get the Right Hood for Your Kitchen: smoke-free, energy-efficient, hygiene-compliant, and professionally installed.

👉 [Request a Quote] | 👉 [Download Catalog] | 👉 [Talk to Our Consultant]`,

    {
      id: 901,
      name: 'Food Processing Equipments',
      slug: 'food-processing-equipments',
      image: '/Food Processing Equipments.jpeg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance food processing machines for commercial kitchens and industrial food units, built for hygiene, efficiency, and durability.',
      longDescription: `From preparation to pre-cooking, every step in a commercial kitchen or food production facility demands efficiency, consistency, and hygiene. At SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, we specialize in manufacturing high-performance Food Processing Equipment that meets the demanding needs of hotels, restaurants, cloud kitchens, canteens, and industrial food units.

Built with precision engineering and food-grade stainless steel, our machines streamline operations, reduce manual labor, and increase throughput — while maintaining high levels of hygiene and product quality.

### Food Processing Equipment Range
- **Vegetable Cutting Machine**: Multiple blade sets for dicing, slicing, shredding & julienne cuts.
- **Dough Kneading Machine**: Spiral or planetary mixer for uniform dough kneading.
- **Dough Ball Making Machine**: Consistent dough ball shaping, output 2,000–3,000 balls/hour.
- **Pulverizer / Masala Grinder**: For spices, grains, pulses; fine or coarse powder.
- **Wet Grinder / Tilting Grinder**: For idli, dosa, vada batter preparation.
- **Juicer & Pulp Extractor**: Heavy-duty SS juice chamber for fruits and vegetables.
- **Potato Peeling Machine**: Abrasive-coated drum for uniform peeling.
- **Onion Cutter / Chopper**: Blade-based or rotary drum design.
- **Meat Mincer / Keema Machine**: SS contact parts, adjustable mince size.
- **Other Custom Units**: Fruit washers, spice roasting pans, trolleys, SS mixing bowls, vegetable washers.

### Technical Highlights & Key Features
- **Material**: SS 304 food-grade stainless steel for hygiene and corrosion resistance.  
- **Motors**: ISI-marked heavy-duty motors with overload protection.  
- **Design**: Compact footprint with easy-to-clean surfaces.  
- **Capacity**: Multiple variants (5 kg to 100+ kg per batch/hour).  
- **User Safety**: Emergency stop, thermal cutoff, sealed components.  
- **Mobility**: Optional castor wheels.  
- **Power Source**: Single or three-phase supply.  
- **Finish**: Matt or mirror finish with optional laser-cut detailing.  

### Industries & Kitchens Served
- Hotels & Restaurants  
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens  
- Caterers & Event Kitchens  
- Food Processing Units  
- Canteens – Corporate, Government, School, College, Hospitals  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Export-Focused Food Businesses  
- Religious Institutions (Langars, Temples, Gurudwaras)  

### Customization Services
- Size & capacity adjustments  
- Integration with chapati-making lines or packaging conveyors  
- Multi-utility machines for combined operations  
- Custom tray sizes, discharge ports, or product collectors  
- Optional sound insulation, airflow vents, hygienic covers  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Premium-Grade Stainless Steel Construction  
✔ Fully Customizable to Your Workflow  
✔ ISI-Approved Motors & Certified Components  
✔ Easy Maintenance & Operator-Friendly Design  
✔ PAN India Delivery & Export-Compliant  
✔ Trusted by Food Service Brands, Government Units & Export Houses  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation support and user training  
- 1-year warranty on equipment and motors  
- Spare parts readily available  
- On-site and virtual troubleshooting  
- Annual maintenance contracts available  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Robust wooden or steel frame packaging  
- PAN India delivery  
- International shipments with export support  

📞 Streamline Your Kitchen Operations with SAG Engineering Food Processing Equipment  

👉 [Request a Quote] | 👉 [Download Full Product Catalog] | 👉 [Book a Free Consultation]`,
