    {
      id: 902,
      name: 'Bowl Chopper ',
      slug: 'bowl-chopper',
      image: '/Bowl Chopper.jpg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-speed commercial bowl chopper for uniform chopping, mixing, and emulsifying of meat, vegetables, nuts, and other ingredients in professional kitchens.',
      longDescription: `The Bowl Chopper from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a high-performance food processing machine designed for fast, uniform chopping, mixing, mincing, and emulsifying of meat, vegetables, nuts, cheese, and other ingredients. Built for high-volume commercial use, this machine delivers consistency, hygiene, and speed — ideal for industrial kitchens, meat processing units, and institutional catering facilities.

With robust stainless steel construction, precision-engineered rotating blades, and variable-speed settings, our bowl chopper is engineered for chefs and food processors who need professional-grade results in record time.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Speed Cutting & Mixing**: Dual-action rotating bowl and spinning cutter blades work simultaneously for fine, uniform chopping.  
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body and contact parts for hygiene and durability.  
- **Precision Cutter Blades**: Hardened stainless steel knives (2–6 blades depending on model) for micro-fine cutting without overprocessing.  
- **Variable Speed Operation**: Independent motors for bowl and blades allow flexible processing from coarse chopping to fine emulsification.  
- **Safety & Ease of Operation**: Safety interlocks, emergency stop, transparent lid, tilting or fixed bowl options for easy unloading and cleaning.  

### Technical Specifications
Feature | Specification
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Bowl Capacity | 5L / 10L / 20L / 30L / 50L (model-dependent)
Blade Material | Hardened Stainless Steel
Number of Blades | 2 to 6 (Removable)
Power Supply | 220V / 415V, Single or Three Phase
Blade Speed | 1500 – 3000 RPM (Adjustable)
Bowl Speed | 10 – 20 RPM
Control Panel | Manual or Digital (optional)
Lid Type | Transparent / SS with Safety Lock
Output Capacity | 50 – 500 kg/hr (model-dependent)

### Applications & Use Cases
- Meat Processing Plants: Sausages, kebabs, patties, meat paste  
- Vegetarian Kitchens & Canteens: Onions, ginger-garlic, chutneys, fillings  
- Hotel & Institutional Kitchens: Sauces, pastes, blended mixes  
- Ready-to-Eat (RTE) Food Factories: Emulsification and mixing  
- Commercial Catering Units: High-speed chopping and pre-processing  
- Bakery & Confectionery Units: Nut chopping, dry fruit mixes, fillings  

### Customization & Upgrades
- Bowl size and blade count  
- Fixed or tilting bowl mechanism  
- Motor capacity adjustments  
- Digital control panel with programmable settings  
- Vacuum mixing option for meat emulsions (on request)  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Bowl Chopper?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Experience

    {
      id: 903,
      name: 'Vegetable Cutter',
      slug: 'vegetable-cutter',

      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-speed commercial vegetable cutter for slicing, dicing, chopping, grating, and julienne cutting with consistent results and hygiene.',
      longDescription: `Make food prep fast, safe, and consistent with the Vegetable Cutter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for commercial kitchens, cloud kitchens, canteens, and food processing units, this high-speed machine slices, dices, chops, and grates vegetables with uniformity and speed, reducing manual labor and food wastage.

Manufactured from SS 304 food-grade stainless steel and equipped with interchangeable blades, this cutter streamlines kitchen operations while maintaining strict hygiene and safety standards.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Multi-Function Cutting**: Slices, dices, shreds, juliennes, and grates a wide variety of vegetables including onions, tomatoes, potatoes, carrots, capsicums, beetroots, cucumbers, and cabbage.  
- **High Output Capacity**: Handles large volumes (100–300 kg/hour depending on model). Ideal for kitchens preparing hundreds to thousands of meals per day.  
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body ensures rust resistance, hygiene, and easy cleaning. Smooth, easy-to-dismantle contact parts.  
- **Powerful Motor with Safety Lock**: Heavy-duty electric motor with interlock and overload protection for stable performance and safety.  
- **User-Friendly & Low Maintenance**: Simple plug-and-play operation, compact design, detachable parts for easy cleaning, and long service life.  

### Technical Specifications
Parameter | Specification
--- | ---
Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Motor Power | 0.5 HP to 2 HP (based on model)
Power Supply | 230V / 415V, Single or Three Phase
Output Capacity | 100 – 300 kg/hour
Blade Types | Slicing, Dicing, Grating, Shredding, Julienne
Cut Size Options | 1 mm to 10 mm (depending on blade)
Safety Features | Interlock, Overload Protection
Mounting | Tabletop or with SS Stand
Cleaning | Detachable, water-washable parts
Dimensions | Customizable
Noise Level | Low (<70 dB)

### Ideal For
- Hotels & Restaurants – Bulk vegetable prep  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains – Fast slicing for delivery timelines  
- Catering Units & Banquet Kitchens – Large event meal prep  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens – Cooking for hundreds/thousands daily  
- Food Processing Plants – Pre-processing for packaging or ready-to-cook products  
- Schools, Colleges & Hospitals – Uniform cutting for proper cooking and nutrition  

### Customization Available
- Manual feed or semi-automatic hopper style  
- Optional storage cabinet base or wheeled stand  
- Motor rating adjustment based on load  
- Add-ons: vegetable washers, prep counters  
- Integration with trolleys or GN pans  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Vegetable Cutter?
✔ Built in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Experience  
✔ SS 304 Construction for Hygiene & Durability  
✔ Powerful Motor with Overload Protection  
✔ Interchangeable Blades for Versatile Cutting  
✔ Energy-Efficient & Easy Maintenance  
✔ Competitive Pricing & PAN India Delivery  

### After-Sales Support
- Installation & operating guidance  
- One-year warranty on motor and electrical parts  
- Spare blades and accessories available  
- Dedicated service team for maintenance and troubleshooting  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-proof packaging for safe transit  
- Fast dispatch and door delivery in India  
- Export packaging available  

📞 Order Now – Optimize Your Kitchen Efficiency  
Send your requirement and volume, get a custom blade or setup, or schedule a live demo.

      shortDescription: 'High-speed, food-grade stainless steel machine for uniform chopping of dry fruits like almonds, cashews, pistachios, and walnuts with minimal waste.',
      longDescription: `The Dry Fruits Tukda Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is a specialized cutting solution for commercial kitchens, sweet manufacturers, bakeries, and food processing units that require consistent, fine chopping of dry fruits like almonds, cashews, pistachios, walnuts, and more.

Designed to deliver high-speed, uniform tukda (pieces) with minimal waste, this machine enhances production efficiency while maintaining hygiene and food-grade quality. Built from SS 304 stainless steel, it is compact yet powerful, suitable for operations where precision cutting and speed are essential.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Speed Cutting with Uniform Output**: Sharp, hardened steel cutting blades for quick, even chopping suitable for sweets, bakery, ice cream toppings, or garnish use without crushing.  
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304-grade body and contact parts, corrosion-resistant, hygienic, and easy to clean.  
- **Compact Design**: Tabletop or stand-mounted; space-saving for small to large production setups.  
- **Safe & Easy Operation**: Manual feed chute with safety guard, vibration-free heavy-duty motor, simple ON/OFF control.  

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Cutting Blades | Hardened Steel / SS Blades (optional)
Motor Capacity | 0.5 HP to 1.5 HP (as per model)
Production Capacity | 15 – 50 kg/hour
Cutting Type | Tukda (coarse chopped)
Power Supply | 220V / 50Hz – Single Phase
Operation | Semi-Automatic
Output Size | 2–5 mm tukda (adjustable)
Mounting Type | Tabletop / Stand Mounted
Noise Level | Low
Finish | Matt / Mirror Finish SS

### Suitable For
- Sweet Manufacturers – barfi, laddoo, katli, halwa  
- Bakery Units – pastries, cakes, biscuits  
- Ice Cream & Dairy – dry fruit mix-ins  
- Food Processing Units – bulk production  
- Cloud Kitchens & Dessert Parlors – toppings & garnish  
- Dry Fruit Retailers – ready-to-pack portions  

### Customization Options
- Blade type: coarse, medium, or fine tukda  
- Motor upgrade for higher output  
- Mobile trolley base  
- Dust collection tray / GN pan support  
- Custom in-feed/out-feed trays  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Dry Fruits Tukda Machine?

    {
      id: 905,
      name: 'Dry Fruits Chips and Machine ',
      slug: 'dry-fruits-chips-and-machine',

      shortDescription: 'Dual-purpose machine for slicing dry fruits into chips and grinding them into fine powder with high speed, hygiene, and uniform output.',
      longDescription: `Take your food processing capabilities to the next level with the Dry Fruit Chips and Powder Making Machine from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Specifically designed to cut hard dry fruits into thin chips and grind them into fine powder, this dual-purpose machine is widely used in commercial kitchens, sweet shops, bakery units, catering services, and food processing facilities where speed, hygiene, and consistency are critical.

Fabricated using food-grade stainless steel, the machine is compact, easy to operate, and highly efficient—ideal for handling dry fruits such as almonds (badam), cashews (kaju), pistachios (pista), walnuts (akhrot), and more.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual Functionality – Chips & Powder**: Interchangeable blades or plates for slicing or grinding; consistent output without wastage.  
- **Compact, Robust Design**: Tabletop-friendly size, SS 304 stainless steel body, corrosion-resistant, hygienic, and easy to clean.  
- **High-Speed Motor**: 0.5–1 HP electric motor; uniform slicing/grinding, low noise, low power consumption.  
- **Easy Operation & Maintenance**: Simple feed mechanism, removable collection tray, blade assembly for quick cleaning, minimal training required.  

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Function Modes | Chips Cutting & Powder Grinding
Dry Fruits Processed | Almond, Cashew, Pistachio, Walnut, etc.
Motor Power | 0.5 – 1 HP
Power Supply | 220V / 50Hz – Single Phase
Capacity | 15 – 30 kg/hour (varies by fruit type)
Blade Assembly | Interchangeable – Chip Cutter & Grinder Plate
Operation Type | Semi-Automatic
Mounting | Tabletop / Stand-mounted
Dimensions | Compact (custom sizes available)
Weight | Approx. 40–60 kg

### Applications
- Sweet Shops & Halwai Units  
- Dry Fruit Retailers & Wholesalers  
- Bakeries & Confectionery Manufacturers  
- Hotels & Catering Kitchens  
- Ice Cream Parlors & Dessert Lounges  
- Health Food & Nutritional Product Makers  

### Customization Options
- Blade sharpness, size, and shape  
- Powder fineness adjustment  
- Additional output trays or cover lids  
- Optional stand or wheeled base  
- Integration with nut-roasting or sifting units  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Machine?

✔ Fast, Clean & Uniform Output

      longDescription: `Upgrade your food preparation process with the Chilly Cutter from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a rugged and efficient solution for commercial kitchens that demand high-speed, consistent, and hygienic chopping of green chilies, onions, garlic, and similar ingredients. Designed to reduce manual labor and enhance productivity, this machine is perfect for restaurants, hotels, canteens, catering units, food courts, and food processing facilities.

Crafted using high-grade stainless steel, our chilly cutter is engineered to handle continuous operations, ensuring smooth, precise cuts while maintaining the freshness, aroma, and texture of ingredients.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **High-Speed Precision Cutting**: Even-size chopping of chilies, onions, garlic, ginger, and leafy greens; retains natural moisture and color.  
- **Heavy-Duty SS Construction**: SS 304 body and cutting chamber, corrosion-resistant, hygienic, and durable.  
- **Sharp Stainless Steel Blades**: Razor-sharp, food-grade blades, easily detachable for cleaning or replacement.  
- **User-Friendly & Safe**: Stable base, ergonomic design, optional interlock, transparent top cover for monitoring, low-noise operation.  
- **Low Power Consumption & High Output**: Efficient motor reduces electricity usage and manual labor.

Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel

Blade Material | High-speed SS blades

Usage | Chilly, Onion, Garlic, Ginger, Leaves

Mounting | Tabletop / Floor-Standing (optional)

### Applications & Industries
- Commercial Kitchens (Hotels, Restaurants, Cafeterias)

- Food Courts & Quick-Service Restaurants (QSRs)

      longDescription: `Effortlessly handle bulk meat grinding with the Meat Mincer from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for heavy-duty commercial use, this robust and hygienic machine delivers consistent results with minimal effort. Whether preparing minced meat for kebabs, sausages, burgers, or stuffing, our meat mincer provides high efficiency, safety, and long-term reliability in professional kitchens.

Crafted using food-grade stainless steel and powered by a high-torque motor, the SAG Engineering Meat Mincer is ideal for hotels, butcheries, restaurants, commercial kitchens, and meat processing units.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Heavy-Duty Motor & High Output**: Industrial-grade motor capable of mincing 100–300 kg/hour, depending on model; smooth, uniform texture.  
- **Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 body and food-contact parts ensure hygiene, corrosion resistance, and durability.  
- **Precision Cutting Blades & Plates**: Interchangeable blades and plates for fine, medium, or coarse textures; suitable for fresh or semi-frozen meat.  
- **Safety & Ease of Operation**: Emergency stop switch, safety interlocks, meat pusher tool, and anti-slip base for stability.  
- **Low Maintenance & Easy Cleaning**: Modular design allows quick disassembly; dishwasher-safe or easy hand-cleaning; long-life motor.

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Motor Capacity | 1 HP – 3 HP (depending on model)
Output Capacity | 100 – 300 kg/hr
Voltage | 220V – Single Phase / 415V – Three Phase
Cutting Blades | High-Carbon Steel / SS
Mincer Plate Options | 3 mm, 5 mm, 8 mm
Hopper Capacity | 5–10 kg
Feed Type | Manual Feed
Safety Features | Overload protection, Meat pusher
Mounting | Table-top or Floor-standing
Finish | Matt Finish / Mirror Polish (Optional)

### Applications & Industries
- Hotels & Fine-Dine Restaurants  
- Commercial Kitchens & Central Kitchens  
- Meat Processing Units  
- Butcher Shops & Delis  
- Cloud Kitchens & QSR Chains  
- Catering & Institutional Kitchens  
- Sausage & Kebab Manufacturers  

### Customization Options
- Motor capacity to match daily throughput  
- Hopper size for large-batch operations  
- Stainless steel trolley or mobile stand  
- Optional attachments for sausage stuffing, kibbeh, etc.  
- Custom branding or labeling for OEM partners  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Meat Mincer?
✔ Made in Mumbai by Trusted Engineering Experts  
✔ Food-Grade Stainless Steel Construction  
✔ Consistent, Fine Quality Mincing Output  
✔ Long Service Life with Low Operational Costs  
✔ Ideal for Indian & Global Culinary Requirements  
✔ Easy Integration into Kitchen Lines  
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  

### After-Sales Support & Services
- Installation support and operational training  
- Warranty on motor and structural components  
- Nationwide availability of spare parts and accessories  
- Dedicated customer service for troubleshooting  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-grade wooden crates or reinforced cartons  
- Foam-cushioned for transit safety  
- PAN India delivery and export support

      longDescription: `Designed for heavy-duty, high-volume use, the Commercial Blender by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is perfect for professional kitchens, cafés, juice centers, and food production units. With robust motor capacity, durable construction, and precision blending blades, this unit handles everything from smoothies and sauces to grinding spices, batters, gravies, and ice.

Engineered for performance, speed, and durability, our commercial blender delivers consistent results even during extended use—making it a must-have appliance for modern foodservice operations.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Powerful Motor for High Performance**: Industrial motor 1–3 HP, suitable for wet and dry grinding.  
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Jar**: SS 304-grade jars (1L–5L), corrosion-resistant and hygienic. Optional transparent polycarbonate jars.  
- **Precision Blade Assembly**: Hardened stainless steel cutting blades for fast, uniform blending; removable for easy cleaning.  
- **Variable Speed Control**: Multi-speed or stepless control, pulse function, optional digital timer.  
- **Built for Continuous Operation**: Overload protection, air-cooled motor housing, stable anti-vibration base.  
- **Compact, Countertop Design**: Space-saving with commercial-grade performance; easy integration into prep lines and smoothie stations.

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Motor Power | 1 HP / 2 HP / 3 HP (Custom Options)
Voltage | 230V / 415V – Single or Three Phase
Jar Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel / Polycarbonate (Optional)
Jar Capacity | 1L to 5L
Blade Type | Stainless Steel, Hardened, Removable
Speed Control | 3-Speed / Variable / Pulse
Body Material | Powder-Coated MS / SS Body
Safety Features | Overload Protection, Rubber Base
Mounting | Countertop
Finish | Industrial Grey / Custom Color (on request)

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Restaurants  
- Juice Bars & Beverage Kiosks  
- Cloud Kitchens & Delivery Kitchens  
- Food Courts & Canteens  
- Catering Units & Central Kitchens  
- Ayurvedic & Herbal Food Preparers  
- Spice Grinders & Sauce Producers  
- Bakeries & Dairy Product Units  

Perfect for preparing smoothies, milkshakes, masala pastes, chutneys, idli/dosa batter, gravies, soups, dry masalas, and ice crushing.

### Customization & Accessories
- Single or multiple jars (wet + dry grinding)  
- Jar locking mechanisms for high-speed safety  
- Noise-reduction housing (optional)  
- Tabletop or cabinet-mounted models  
- Branding or private labeling for bulk buyers  

Our in-house team can suggest the best blender configuration based on application and daily load.

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Commercial Blender?

      id: 909,
      name: 'Juice Dispenser',
      slug: 'juice-dispenser',
      image: '/Juice Dispenser.jpg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Elegant and durable commercial juice dispenser for hotels, restaurants, corporate offices, and buffet setups, designed for hygienic and spill-free serving.',
      longDescription: `Serve chilled, refreshing beverages the smart way with the Juice Dispenser from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a stylish and durable solution for self-service beverage stations in hotels, restaurants, canteens, corporate offices, and buffets. Designed for commercial use, this dispenser is made with food-grade stainless steel and premium polycarbonate, ensuring hygiene, visibility, and long-lasting performance.

Whether you're offering fresh juices, flavored water, iced tea, or cold beverages, our dispensers help maintain the perfect temperature while elevating your service counter's presentation.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Modern Aesthetic & Robust Design**: Crystal-clear container for visibility, SS 304 base for durability, perfect for buffet lines and breakfast counters.
- **Cold Retention for Hours**: Internal ice core or cooling rod keeps juice chilled without dilution; ideal for mobile or semi-outdoor setups.
- **Food-Grade & Hygienic Materials**: BPA-free polycarbonate container, corrosion-resistant and non-reactive contact parts.
- **Drip-Free Dispensing Tap**: Anti-drip manual lever ensures controlled flow, avoids spills, and is easy for all users.
- **Stable Base & Easy Cleaning**: Heavy-duty SS base with rubber feet, detachable components, optional drip tray for hygiene.

### Technical Specifications
Feature | Specification
--- | ---
Material (Body) | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Container Material | Transparent Food-Grade Polycarbonate
Capacity Options | 6 L / 8 L / 10 L / 12 L (per tank)
Number of Tanks | Single / Dual / Triple
Cooling Type | Ice Tube / Cold Core
Tap Type | Manual Lever, Anti-Drip
Mounting | Tabletop
Finish | Mirror Polish / Brushed Steel
Optional Accessories | Drip Tray, Branding Sticker, Lockable Cover

### Ideal For
- Hotels & Resorts – Breakfast Counters  
- Restaurants & Banquet Halls  
- Corporate Office Canteens  
- Airports & Lounge Cafes  
- Schools, Colleges & Institutional Kitchens  
- Event & Outdoor Catering Companies  
- Cafeterias & Beverage Counters  
- Buffet & Brunch Service Lines  

### Customization Available
- Single, Double, or Triple Tank Configurations  
- Custom container sizes and cooling systems  
- Logo branding, color accents, or custom name plates  
- Stainless steel or wooden base finishing  
- Optional electric cooling model  
- Integrated dispenser stations with cutlery holders, napkin stands, and trash disposal units

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Juice Dispenser?
✔ Manufactured in Mumbai by hospitality equipment experts  
✔ Premium-grade materials with elegant design  
✔ Spill-free serving with minimal maintenance  
✔ No electricity required – ideal for mobile or outdoor use  
✔ Easy to clean, refill & transport  
✔ Competitive pricing for bulk orders & hospitality chains  
✔ 15+ years of industry experience

### After-Sales Service & Support

      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial slush machine for cafés, juice bars, malls, restaurants, and event venues, delivering colorful, icy beverages efficiently.',
      longDescription: `Bring vibrant color, icy refreshment, and high-margin beverages to your business with the Slush Machine from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for commercial use, this machine is ideal for cafés, juice bars, cinemas, restaurants, malls, and event venues looking to serve ice-cold slush, granitas, frozen cocktails, mocktails, and chilled beverages in an attractive and efficient manner.

Backed by SAG Engineering’s 15+ years of manufacturing experience, this machine blends robust performance, user-friendly controls, and eye-catching design, ensuring quick returns on investment and maximum customer satisfaction.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual/Triple Tank Configuration**: Single, double, or triple tank models (10L–15L per tank). Serve multiple flavors at once. Transparent illuminated tanks boost visibility and impulse sales.
- **Fast Freezing Technology**: High-efficiency compressor with rapid chilling, auto temperature control. Ready-to-serve slush within 30–45 minutes.
- **Simple Controls & Smooth Operation**: Front-facing digital or mechanical panel, independent switches for each tank, stirring paddles ensure uniform texture.
- **Hygienic & Easy to Clean**: Food-grade polycarbonate tanks, stainless steel body, detachable drip trays and tank covers.
- **Silent & Compact Design**: Quiet operation, sleek countertop design, suitable for self-service or staff operation.

### Technical Specifications
Feature | Specification
--- | ---
Tank Capacity | 10L / 15L per tank
Model Options | Single / Double / Triple Tank
Body Material | Stainless Steel (SS 304)
Tank Material | Transparent Food-Grade Polycarbonate
Compressor Type | High-efficiency, CFC-free
Cooling System | Air-cooled, Silent Operation
Refrigerant | R134a / R404A (Environmentally Friendly)
Power Supply | 220V, 50Hz (Single Phase)
Power Consumption | Approx. 500W–1200W (Model Dependent)
Controls | Digital/Manual (Cooling, Mixing, Lighting)
Temperature Range | -2°C to -4°C
Machine Type | Countertop, Plug & Play
Weight | Varies by model (20kg – 50kg approx.)

### Ideal For
- Juice Bars & Ice Cream Parlors  
- Food Courts & Malls  
- Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs)

- Hotels, Resorts & Beach Cafés

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Slush Machine?

      id: 911,
      name: 'Coffee Machine',
      slug: 'coffee-machine',
      image: '',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial coffee machine designed for cafés, restaurants, hotels, and corporate offices, delivering consistent, aromatic coffee at scale.',
      longDescription: `Meet the demands of modern coffee lovers with the Commercial Coffee Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai. Designed for high-performance brewing in busy commercial setups, this machine delivers rich, aromatic coffee — consistently, efficiently, and at scale.

Perfect for cafés, restaurants, hotels, corporate offices, food courts, and catering businesses, this machine is built to handle peak-time pressure while maintaining quality and flavor in every cup. Whether you're serving espresso, cappuccino, latte, or filter coffee, our coffee machines are engineered for speed, reliability, and taste precision.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Fast Brewing & Consistent Flavor**: Built-in heating system with stable temperature control for multiple coffee varieties (espresso, Americano, latte, cappuccino, filter coffee).  
- **Heavy-Duty, User-Friendly Design**: Stainless steel or food-grade ABS body; intuitive control panel with backlit buttons and LED indicators.  
- **Multiple Brewing Heads (Optional)**: Single, dual, or triple head models for high-volume output; simultaneous cup dispensing for buffets or cafés.  
- **Automatic Operation with Manual Override**: Programmable brew volumes and temperature; manual steam wand and hot water outlet.  
- **Low Maintenance & Easy Cleaning**: Self-cleaning functions, detachable drip tray, water tank, and waste bin; compatible with water filters.  

### Technical Specifications
Feature | Specification
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 / Food-grade ABS
Model Options | 1-Group / 2-Group / 3-Group Heads
Output Capacity | 60 to 300 cups/day
Power Supply | 220V–240V AC / 50Hz
Power Consumption | 2.5 kW to 5.5 kW
Water Tank Capacity | 5L to 15L (Built-in or Direct Line)
Boiler Type | Copper / Stainless Steel
Pump Pressure | 9–15 bars (Espresso)
Control Type | Manual, Semi-Automatic, Fully Automatic
Cleaning System | Auto Cleaning Cycle
Optional Features | Milk Frother, Hot Water Dispenser, Cup Warmer

### Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- Cafés & Coffee Shops  
- Hotels & Restaurant Kitchens  
- Corporate Offices & Co-working Spaces  
- Event Catering Services  
- Fast Food Chains & Food Courts  
- Airport Lounges & Waiting Areas  
- College Canteens & Hospital Cafés  

### Customization Options
- Single or multiple dispenser models  
- Branding with café name or logo  
- Custom programming for volume, brew time, and drink type  
- Built-in or countertop models  
- Modular integration with beverage stations  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Coffee Machine?
✔ 15+ Years of Engineering Expertise  
✔ Heavy-Duty Commercial Use  
✔ Stable Performance During Rush Hours  
✔ Consistent Taste & Aroma  
✔ Hygienic, Safe & Easy to Operate  
✔ Competitive Pricing & Long-Term ROI  
✔ Reliable After-Sales Support  
✔ PAN India Delivery

    {
      id: 912,
      name: 'Soup Machine',
      slug: 'soup-machine',
      image: '/soup machine.jpeg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-performance commercial soup machine for hotels, restaurants, buffets, and catering services, ensuring consistent heating, hygienic serving, and easy maintenance.',
      longDescription: `The Soup Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, is an essential addition to any commercial kitchen, buffet line, or institutional setup that serves soups, gravies, or warm beverages. Built to ensure consistent temperature control, easy cleaning, and elegant food presentation, this unit combines high performance with hygienic operation — ideal for high-volume service environments.

Whether operating a restaurant, hotel, cafeteria, or catering business, our soup machines are designed to keep soups hot, fresh, and ready to serve throughout the day while enhancing the dining experience.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Efficient Heating System**: Thermostatically controlled electric heating element maintains consistent temperature between 60°C – 90°C. Dry heat or water jacket models available.  
- **High-Grade Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304 body, inner tank, and lid ensure hygiene, durability, and rust resistance. Double-walled insulation for safety and energy efficiency.  
- **Convenient Design**: Removable inner pot, hinged/lift-off lid with cool-touch knob, compact footprint for tabletop or buffet counter use.  
- **Aesthetic Presentation**: Sleek stainless steel finish for professional appearance, suitable for live counters, self-serve buffets, or service stations.  

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Capacity Options | 5 L / 8 L / 10 L / 15 L
Heating Type | Electric – Thermostatic Control
Temperature Range | 60°C – 90°C
Power Supply | 230V AC / 50Hz – Single Phase
Control System | Rotary Thermostat or Digital Controller
Design Options | Round Top-Loading or Cylindrical with Lid
Mounting Type | Tabletop
Finish | Satin / Mirror Finish
Optional Features | Indicator Lights, Drain Tap, Glass Lid, Branding Plate

### Applications & Ideal Use Cases
- Hotels & Restaurant Buffets  
- Cafeterias & Corporate Kitchens  
- Institutional Dining (Schools, Colleges, Hospitals)  
- Caterers & Outdoor Food Service Events  
- Food Courts & Self-Service Zones  
- Banquet Halls & Event Setups  

Suitable for soups, gravies, curry bases, stews, broths, and hot beverages (milk, hot chocolate, tea).

### Customization Options
- Various capacities and finishes  
- Optional tap/faucet for easy dispensing  
- Digital temperature display and touch controls (premium models)  
- Custom branding or labeling for chain restaurants and events  
- Stackable or modular units for space efficiency  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Soup Machine?
✔ Premium SS Material  
✔ 15+ Years of Expertise in Commercial Kitchen Equipment  
✔ Reliable Temperature Control for Consistent Quality  
✔ Aesthetic Design for Professional Presentation  
✔ Easy Maintenance and Operator-Friendly  
✔ Custom-Built Units Available for Bulk Orders  
✔ Energy Efficient and Long-Lasting  

### After-Sales Support
- One-year warranty on electrical components  
- Spare parts available across India  
- Installation and operation guidance  
- Fast-response technical support from Mumbai service team  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Export-quality packaging with foam insulation  
- Wooden crating for bulk orders  
- PAN India delivery within committed timelines  
- Export shipping support with documentation

      id: 914,
      name: 'Pulveriser',
      slug: 'pulveriser',
      image: '/Pulveriser.jpg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-speed commercial pulveriser machine for grinding spices, grains, herbs, and dry food ingredients with hygienic processing and robust performance.',
      longDescription: `Boost your kitchen or food production unit’s efficiency with the Pulveriser Machine by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a robust and high-performance grinding solution designed for bulk pulverizing of spices, grains, herbs, and dry food ingredients. Whether you're running a commercial kitchen, cloud kitchen, catering business, or food processing unit, our pulveriser ensures uniform grinding, reduced processing time, and hygienic output.

Manufactured using premium stainless steel with industrial-grade components, this machine is engineered for continuous operation, minimal maintenance, and long service life — even in demanding environments.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Powerful Grinding Performance**: High-speed rotating blades and efficient sieving mechanism for fine and uniform powder. Suitable for spices, cereals, herbs, rice, wheat, pulses, etc.  
- **Food-Grade Stainless Steel Body**: SS 304/316 construction ensures hygiene, corrosion resistance, and durability. Dust-free grinding chamber design for easy cleaning.  
- **High Output Capacity**: Capacities from 10 kg/hr to 100+ kg/hr with fine powder ranging from 100 to 300 mesh. Supports continuous and batch operations.  
- **Safe & Easy Operation**: Thermal overload protection, safety lock, optional emergency stop. Low noise design with rubber feet or castor base.  
- **Energy Efficient & Maintenance-Friendly**: High-efficiency copper-wound motors, minimal moving parts, easy dismantling for cleaning or replacement.  

### Technical Specifications
Parameter | Details
--- | ---
Body Material | SS 304 / SS 316
Motor Power | 2 HP to 10 HP (as per model)
Capacity | 10 – 100+ kg/hour
Grinding Type | Impact / Hammer / Blade Mechanism
Feeding Type | Top Hopper Feed
Particle Size | Adjustable (100–300 mesh)
Power Supply | 230V / 415V AC, Single or Three Phase
Machine Type | Tabletop / Floor-Standing
Dust Collector | Optional Attachment
Mounting | Rubber Feet / SS Castor Wheels
Safety Features | Overload Protector, Emergency Stop (Optional)

### Ideal Applications
- Commercial & Central Kitchens  
- Catering Units & Food Processing Plants  
- Spice Grinding Operations  
- Snack & Namkeen Production Units  
- Bakeries, Cafés & Dry Ingredient Blending Lines  
- Ayurvedic Medicine & Herbal Product Units  
- Grain and Flour Preparation Units  

### Customization & Accessories
- Capacity upgrades (10 to 100+ kg/hr)  
- Dust collector integration for cleanroom or indoor use  
- Interchangeable sieve sets for variable mesh size  
- Auto-feeding hopper or vibration feeding tray  
- Sound insulation casing for silent zones  
- Tabletop compact versions for cloud kitchens or small-scale producers  
- Integration into full processing line setups

      id: 915,
      name: 'Masala Wet Grinder',
      slug: 'masala-wet-grinder',
      image: '/Masala Wet Grinder.jpg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity commercial masala wet grinder for grinding spices, chutneys, gravies, and food pastes with hygienic, efficient, and consistent output.',
      longDescription: `Designed for commercial kitchens that demand consistency, speed, and hygiene, the Masala Wet Grinder by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, delivers high-capacity wet grinding for spices, chutneys, gravies, and food pastes with unmatched efficiency. Built for continuous operation, this machine is an essential addition to hotels, restaurants, canteens, catering services, cloud kitchens, and food processing units.

Constructed using SS 304 food-grade stainless steel and engineered with precision, our masala wet grinders provide a reliable and safe grinding solution that saves time, reduces labor, and enhances food quality.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **High-Efficiency Grinding Performance**: Specially designed for soaked ingredients like turmeric, ginger, garlic, onion, green chilies, coconut, coriander, and other wet masalas. Delivers fine, uniform, and lump-free pastes.  
- **Robust Food-Grade Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel drum and body. Rust-resistant, hygienic, and long-lasting. Equipped with abrasion-resistant grinding stones or blades.  
- **Heavy-Duty Motor with Overload Protection**: Industrial-grade motor with thermal overload protection. Smooth, low-vibration operation.  
- **Ease of Use & Cleaning**: Ergonomic design, removable/tilting drum, leak-proof discharge, and easy cleaning.  

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel (Drum & Body)
Capacity Options | 5L, 10L, 20L, 40L, 60L (Custom sizes on request)
Motor Power | 1 HP to 5 HP (Based on model)
Grinding Type | Stone grinding / Blade-based
Drive Mechanism | Belt-driven or direct motor
Power Supply | 230V / 415V – Single or Three Phase
Tilting Mechanism | Manual or Gear-operated
Output Consistency | Fine paste within minutes
Usage Type | Wet grinding only
Mobility | With or without castor wheels

### Ideal Applications
- Hotels, Fine-Dine & Multi-cuisine Restaurants  
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens  
- Cloud Kitchens & Catering Units  
- Commercial Tiffin Services  
- Temple & Religious Kitchens  
- Food Processing Units & Commercial Spice Preparation  
- South Indian Cuisine Restaurants for Chutneys & Batters

- Custom capacity drums from 5L to 100L  
- Tilting or fixed model configuration  
- Stone-based or blade-based versions  
- Optional SS legs, castor wheels, or under-table mount  
- Hinged lid, transparent cover, or splash guard available  

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Masala Wet Grinder?
✔ Engineered in Mumbai with 15+ Years of Industry Expertise

✔ High-Speed, Heavy-Duty Motor with Safe Electricals

      id: 916,
      name: 'Tilting Wet Grinder',
      slug: 'tilting-wet-grinder',
      image: '/Tilting Wet Grinder.jpeg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'High-capacity commercial tilting wet grinder for uniform batter and wet grinding with effortless discharge and superior hygiene.',
      longDescription: `For commercial kitchens that require fast, uniform, and hygienic wet grinding, the Tilting Wet Grinder by SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, delivers uncompromising performance. Built for high-volume grinding of soaked rice, pulses, dals, and masalas, this machine is ideal for hotels, canteens, restaurants, caterers, and food processing units.

Engineered using heavy-duty stainless steel construction, a stone-based grinding system, and an easy-tilt discharge mechanism, this grinder ensures smooth operation, minimal manual effort, and maximum hygiene. Whether you're preparing batter for idli, dosa, vada, or chutneys, this is the dependable solution that helps scale up your production with ease.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Efficient Grinding Performance**: Natural granite roller stones provide authentic grinding texture. High-torque motor ensures faster grinding of large quantities with uniform consistency.
- **Tilting Mechanism for Easy Discharge**: Food-grade SS drum with smooth tilting lever allows batter to pour effortlessly, reducing manual labor and ensuring safer operation.
- **Stainless Steel Build for Hygiene & Durability**: SS 304-grade drum, body, and structure. Corrosion-resistant, food-safe, and easy to clean.
- **Powerful & Silent Motor**: Heavy-duty industrial motor with overload protection, low noise, and minimal vibration.
- **User-Friendly Operation**: Push-button start/stop, optional transparent lid, easy stone removal, and drum cleaning.

### Technical Specifications
Specification | Details
--- | ---
Model Types | 5L / 10L / 15L / 20L / 30L / 40L / 50L (Customizable)
Body & Drum Material | SS 304 Food-Grade Stainless Steel
Grinding Stones | Natural Granite Rollers
Tilting Mechanism | Manual Lever or Assisted Tilt
Motor Power | 1 HP to 3 HP (Based on model)
Power Supply | 230V Single Phase / 415V Three Phase
Control Panel | Basic Start/Stop or Optional Digital Timer
Finish | Matt or Mirror SS Finish
Mobility | Fixed Legs / Optional Wheels

### Applications & Use Cases
- Hotels & Large Restaurants  
- Industrial & Institutional Canteens  
- Cloud Kitchens & Food Production Units  
- Catering Services & Mess Kitchens  
- Dosa/Idli Batter Units & South Indian Cuisine Chains  
- Temple Kitchens & Community Cooking Setups  
- Food Export Units Processing Batter or Pastes  

### Customization Options
- Custom drum capacities and footprints  
- Optional tilt assist mechanisms for large models  
- Digital timer-based control panel for auto shut-off  
- Lid variations – SS lid, acrylic view lid, or open top

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Tilting Wet Grinder?
✔ 15+ Years of Manufacturing Expertise  
✔ Industrial-Grade SS 304 Construction for Durability & Hygiene  
✔ Heavy-Duty Motor with Consistent Output

      id: 917,
      name: 'Garlic And Potato Peeler',
      slug: 'garlic-and-potato-peeler',
      image: '/Garlic Potato Peeler.jpg',
      category: 'food-processing-equipments',
      shortDescription: 'Dual-function garlic and potato peeler for fast, hygienic, and labor-free peeling in commercial kitchens.',
      longDescription: `Peeling garlic and potatoes is one of the most time-consuming and labor-intensive tasks in any kitchen. With the Garlic and Potato Peeler from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai, you can eliminate manual peeling, save time, reduce wastage, and improve overall kitchen efficiency.

This dual-function peeler machine is built for commercial use, capable of peeling both garlic cloves and potatoes with precision and minimal loss. Ideal for hotels, industrial canteens, cloud kitchens, food processing units, and caterers, this machine is a game-changer for bulk prep operations where speed, hygiene, and output consistency matter.

### Key Features & Benefits
- **Dual-Purpose Peeling**: Peels garlic and potatoes in the same machine with separate attachments/settings. Saves space and cost. Adjustable settings ensure accurate peeling without damaging the product.
- **High-Speed Operation**: Peels 10–25 kg per batch in 2–5 minutes. Designed for continuous or batch operation.
- **Hygienic & Food-Grade Construction**: SS 304 stainless steel body. Smooth finish, rust-resistant, and easy to clean.
- **Minimal Wastage**: Optimized design removes only the skin, saving up to 30% of raw material.
- **User-Friendly Controls**: Single push-button operation, optional transparent lid, safety lock, and auto-cutoff features.

### Technical Specifications
Feature | Specification
--- | ---
Machine Type | Garlic and Potato Peeler (Dual Function)
Body Material | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Capacity | 10 kg – 25 kg per batch (Model Dependent)
Cycle Time | 2–5 minutes per batch
Peeling System | Abrasive Drum (Potato), Rubber Liner (Garlic)
Motor Power | 0.5 HP to 1.5 HP
Power Supply | 220V – Single Phase
Control Panel | Manual with Timer (Digital optional)
Waste Outlet | Separate chute for skin and peels
Drain System | Built-in for water removal (potato mode)
Mobility | Fixed legs or wheels (optional)
Finish | Matt or Mirror Finish Stainless Steel

### Ideal For
- Hotels & Restaurants  
- Industrial & Institutional Kitchens  
- Food Processing Units  
- Cloud Kitchens & Commissary Kitchens  
- Catering Units  
- Hostel, School & Hospital Kitchens  

### Customization Options
- Garlic-only or potato-only models  
- Increased capacity for higher output  
- Drain tray, peel collector bins, or splash covers  
- Digital timers and programmable cycles  
- Castor wheels for portability  
- Integration into automated kitchen prep lines

### Why Choose SAG Engineering’s Garlic and Potato Peeler?
✔ Dual-function machine saves space & capital  
✔ Made in Mumbai with 15+ years of experience  
✔ Hygienic, food-safe, and built for commercial use  
✔ Energy-efficient motor, minimal maintenance  
✔ High ROI — reduces labor cost & speeds prep  
✔ Trusted by hotels, kitchens & food brands nationwide  

### After-Sales Support
- One-year warranty on motor and parts  
- Installation support and operator training  
- Readily available spare parts and liners  
- Preventive maintenance and troubleshooting guidance  

### Packaging & Delivery
- Shock-proof packaging for safe delivery  
- PAN India delivery and export-ready crates  
- Fast dispatch and responsive logistics

Available in 600, 1000, and 2000 chapatis per hour capacity, our machines are ideal for mid-to-large-scale food operations seeking to reduce manual labor, maintain consistency, and meet rising food demand without compromising quality.

      longDescription: `Boost your kitchen’s productivity and streamline operations with the Semi-Automatic Chapati Making Machine from SAG Engineering Products — a trusted manufacturer based in Mumbai with 15+ years of expertise in commercial kitchen engineering.

      longDescription: `Optimize your food production line with the Dough Ball Making Machine with Compressor from SAG Engineering Products, Mumbai — a high-efficiency, semi-automatic solution for shaping perfect dough balls quickly, consistently, and hygienically. Ideal for commercial kitchens, cloud kitchens, canteens, catering services, hotels, and food processing units involved in large-scale chapati, puri, and paratha production.

Built using food-grade stainless steel and powered by a high-quality air compressor, this system ensures consistent portioning, smooth texture, and round-shaped dough balls with minimum wastage.

### Key Features & Advantages
- **Precision Ball Making**: Uniform shape, weight, and texture for dough balls, eliminating human error.  
- **Integrated Air Compressor System**: Smooth release and rounding, increasing speed and output.  
- **Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Construction**: SS 304, hygienic, corrosion-proof, durable, and compact.  
- **High Output Capacity**: Produces 2,000–3,000 dough balls per hour, adjustable 25–45g per ball.  
- **Easy to Operate & Maintain**: Single-operator friendly, simple feed, easy cleaning, and low power consumption.  

### Technical Specifications

--- | ---
Machine Body | SS 304 Stainless Steel
Compressor | Integrated – Oil-free / Low-noise
Production Capacity | 2000–3000 balls/hour
Ball Weight Range | 25g – 45g (Adjustable)
Power Supply | 220V / 50Hz – Single Phase
Control System | Manual / Push Button
Dough Feed Type | Hopper or Manual Feed

Dimensions | Customizable as per kitchen size
